--
rconsolecreate()
--
local Start = tick()
local Executor = identifyexecutor()

-- print = function(str)
-- 	rconsoleprint(str .. "\n")
-- end

local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")

local GarbageCollection = getgc(true)
local LocalPlayer = game:GetService("Players").LocalPlayer

local Character = LocalPlayer.Character
local Humanoid = Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")

local Whitelist = {
	{ 2, "Highlight", "Highlight", false },
	{ 1 },
	{ { 1 }, 0 },
	{ "2", "" },
}

local IsTableWhitelisted = function(Table)
	if not Table then
		return false
	end

	for WhitelistIndex, WhitelistEntry in ipairs(Whitelist) do
		local IsMatch = false

		if type(WhitelistEntry) == "table" then
			if #WhitelistEntry == #Table then
				IsMatch = true
				for EntryIndex, EntryValue in ipairs(WhitelistEntry) do
					if type(EntryValue) == "table" then
						if type(Table[EntryIndex]) ~= "table" or #EntryValue ~= #Table[EntryIndex] then
							IsMatch = false
							break
						end
						for SubIndex, SubValue in ipairs(EntryValue) do
							if Table[EntryIndex][SubIndex] ~= SubValue then
								IsMatch = false
								break
							end
						end
						if not IsMatch then
							break
						end
					else
						if Table[EntryIndex] ~= EntryValue then
							IsMatch = false
							break
						end
					end
				end
			end
		else
			if #Table == 1 and Table[1] == WhitelistEntry then
				IsMatch = true
			end
		end

		if IsMatch then
			return true
		end
	end

	return false
end

for _, Table in GarbageCollection do
	if type(Table) ~= "table" then
		continue
	end

	if rawget(Table, 2) == Character and rawget(Table, 0) == Humanoid then
		local Table1 = rawget(Table, 7)
		local Table2 = rawget(Table, 10)

		Table1[2] = nil
		Table2[2] = nil

		local Expected1
		local Expected2

		setmetatable(Table1, {
			__index = function()
				if IsTableWhitelisted(Expected1) then
					rconsoleprint("Sanity Check Attempt #1")
					return Expected1
				else
					rconsoleprint("Index Attempt #1")
				end
			end,
			__newindex = function(_, _, Value)
				Expected1 = Value

				rconsoleprint("Ban Attempt #1: " .. HttpService:JSONEncode(Value))
			end,
		})

		setmetatable(Table2, {
			__index = function()
				if IsTableWhitelisted(Expected2) then
					rconsoleprint("Sanity Check Attempt #2")
					return Expected2
				else
					rconsoleprint("Index Attempt #2")
				end
			end,
			__newindex = function(_, _, Value)
				Expected2 = Value

				rconsoleprint("Ban Attempt #2: " .. HttpService:JSONEncode(Value))
			end,
		})

		rconsoleprint("Loaded Part 1")
	end
end

for _, Table in GarbageCollection do
	if type(Table) ~= "table" then
		continue
	end

	if typeof(rawget(Table, 1)) == "Instance" and rawget(Table, 1).Name == "Remotes" then
		local Table1 = rawget(Table, 4)

		local Expected1

		setmetatable(Table1, {
			__index = function()
				if IsTableWhitelisted(Expected1) then
					rconsoleprint("Sanity Check Attempt #3")
					return Expected1
				else
					rconsoleprint("Index Attempt #3")
				end
			end,
			__newindex = function(_, _, Value)
				Expected1 = Value

				rconsoleprint("Ban Attempt #3: " .. HttpService:JSONEncode(Value))
			end,
		})

		rconsoleprint("Loaded Part 2")
	end
end

local function SecureRequest(Data)
	return request(Data)
	--[[if isfunctionhooked(request) then 
        LPH_CRASH();
    end; 

    local Index = 0
    local IsCooked = false;
    local function Cook() 
        if IsCooked then 
            LPH_CRASH();
        end;
        IsCooked = true
    end;
                    
    local MT = setmetatable(Data, { 
        __concat = function()
                    
        end;
                    
        __tostring = function() 
            Cook() 
        end;
                    
        __namecall = function() 
            Cook() 
        end;
                    
        __newindex = function() 
            Cook() 
        end;
                    
        __index = function() 
            Index+=1 
            if Index >= 3 then 
                LPH_CRASH()
            end;
        end;
    });
    return request(MT)]]
end

				return gethui()
			end

			if Service == "CoreGui" and game.GetService(game, "RunService"):IsStudio() then
				return game.GetService(game, "Players").LocalPlayer.PlayerGui
			end

			local SERVICE

			if cloneref then
				SERVICE = cloneref(game.GetService(game, Service))
			else
				SERVICE = game.GetService(game, Service)
			end

			if not Framework.Services[Service] then
				Framework.Services[Service] = SERVICE
			end

			return SERVICE
		end)
	end
	--
	do --// Fonts
		LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
			local HttpService = Framework.GetService("HttpService")
			local assetloader = getcustomasset
			Font = assetloader and setreadonly(Font, false) or Font
			if assetloader then
				function Font:Register(Name, Weight, Style, Asset)
					if not isfile(Asset.Id) then
						writefile(Asset.Id, Asset.Font)
					end

					local Data = {
						name = Name,
						faces = {
							{
								name = "Regular",
								weight = Weight,
								style = Style,
								assetId = getcustomasset(Asset.Id),
							},
						},
					}

					writefile(Name .. ".font", HttpService:JSONEncode(Data))
					return getcustomasset(Name .. ".font")
				end
				--
				function Font:GetRegistry(Name)
					if isfile(Name .. ".font") then
						return assetloader(Name .. ".font")
					end
				end
			end
			--
			Font = assetloader and setreadonly(Font, true) or Font

			Framework.Fonts.Functions.Register = function(Name, Weight, Style, Asset)
				if assetloader then
					return Font.new(Font:Register(Name, Weight, Style, Asset))
				else
					return Font.new("rbxasset://fonts/families/Ubuntu.json", Enum.FontWeight.Bold)
				end
			end
			--
			do --// Fonts Registration
				local RubikBase64 =
					""

				local SourceSansBase64 =
					""

				local VerdanaBase64 =
					""

				local MinecraftBase64 =
					""

				local SmallFontBase64 =
					""

				local RobotoBase64 =
					""
				local TahomaBase64 =
					""

				local Micro =
					""

				local ConsolaBoldBase64 =
					""

				local ConsolaBase64 =
					""

				if crypt and crypt.base64 then
					local Rubik = Framework.Fonts.Functions.Register(
						"Rubik",
						200,
						"normal",
						{ Id = "Rubik.ttf", Font = crypt.base64.decode(RubikBase64) }
					)

					local SourceSansBold = Framework.Fonts.Functions.Register(
						"SourceSansBold",
						200,
						"normal",
						{ Id = "SourceSansBold.ttf", Font = crypt.base64.decode(SourceSansBase64) }
					)

					local Verdana = Framework.Fonts.Functions.Register(
						"Verdana-fix",
						200,
						"normal",
						{ Id = "Verdana-fix.ttf", Font = crypt.base64.decode(VerdanaBase64) }
					)

					local Roboto = Framework.Fonts.Functions.Register(
						"RobotoBold",
						200,
						"normal",
						{ Id = "RobotoBold.ttf", Font = crypt.base64.decode(RobotoBase64) }
					)

					local TahomaBold = Framework.Fonts.Functions.Register(
						"Tahoma-Bold",
						200,
						"normal",
						{ Id = "Tahoma-Bold.ttf", Font = crypt.base64.decode(TahomaBase64) }
					)

					local Consola = Framework.Fonts.Functions.Register(
						"Consola",
						200,
						"normal",
						{ Id = "Consola.ttf", Font = crypt.base64.decode(ConsolaBase64) }
					)

					local ConsolaBold = Framework.Fonts.Functions.Register(
						"ConsolaBold",
						200,
						"normal",
						{ Id = "ConsolaBold.ttf", Font = crypt.base64.decode(ConsolaBoldBase64) }
					)

					local MicroGama = Framework.Fonts.Functions.Register(
						"Microgama",
						200,
						"normal",
						{ Id = "MicroGama.ttf", Font = crypt.base64.decode(Micro) }
					)

					local SmallFont = Framework.Fonts.Functions.Register(
						"SmallestPixel7",
						400,
						"normal",
						{ Id = "smallest-pixel7.ttf", Font = crypt.base64.decode(SmallFontBase64) }
					)

					local Minecraft = Framework.Fonts.Functions.Register(
						"Minecraft",
						400,
						"normal",
						{ Id = "Minecraft.ttf", Font = crypt.base64.decode(MinecraftBase64) }
					)

					Framework.Fonts.Cache.SmallFont = SmallFont
					Framework.Fonts.Cache.Rubik = Rubik
					Framework.Fonts.Cache.SourceSansBold = SourceSansBold
					Framework.Fonts.Cache.Consola = Consola
					Framework.Fonts.Cache.ConsolaBold = ConsolaBold

					Framework.Fonts.Cache.TahomaBold = TahomaBold
					Framework.Fonts.Cache.RobotoBold = Roboto
					Framework.Fonts.Cache.Verdana = Verdana
					Framework.Fonts.Cache.Minecraft = Minecraft
					Framework.Fonts.Cache.SmallFont = SmallFont
				else
					Framework.Fonts.Cache.Verdana =
						Font.new("rbxasset://fonts/families/Ubuntu.json", Enum.FontWeight.Bold)
					Framework.Fonts.Cache.SmallFont =
						Font.new("rbxasset://fonts/families/Ubuntu.json", Enum.FontWeight.Bold)
				end
			end
		end)()

	--
	do --// Threads
		Framework.Thread.__index = Framework.Thread
		--
		function Framework.Thread:Run()
			local Success, Error = pcall(self.Function)
			if not Success and Error and not tostring(Error):find("The current thread") then
				local ErrorMessage = string.format(
					"Error occurred in %s thread, '%s', Priority '%s'",
					self.Name,
					tostring(Error),
					self.Priority
				)
				print("corescript", ErrorMessage)
				return ErrorMessage, Error
			end
		end
		--
		function Framework:NewThread(Name, Function, Priority)
			local Thread = setmetatable({
				Name = Name,
				Function = Function,
				Priority = Priority,
			}, Framework.Thread)

			if not Priority then
				Priority = "Render"
			end
			Thread.Priority = Priority

			local Index = #Framework.Threads[Priority] + 1
			Framework.Threads[Priority][Index] = Thread
			return Framework.Threads[Priority][Index]
		end
	end
	--
	do --// Skyboxes
		local Lighting = Framework.GetService("Lighting")
		function Framework.Sky:NewSky(Data)
			pcall(function()
				local Name = Data.Name
				Framework.Skyboxes[Name] = {
					SkyboxBk = Data.SkyboxBk,
					SkyboxDn = Data.SkyboxDn,
					SkyboxFt = Data.SkyboxFt,
					SkyboxLf = Data.SkyboxLf,
					SkyboxRt = Data.SkyboxRt,
					SkyboxUp = Data.SkyboxUp,
					MoonTextureId = Data.Moon or "rbxasset://sky/moon.jpg",
					SunTextureId = Data.Sun or "rbxasset://sky/sun.jpg",
				}
			end)
		end

		function Framework.Sky:SwitchSkybox(Name)
			local OldSky = Lighting:FindFirstChildOfClass("Sky")
			if OldSky then
				OldSky:Destroy()
			end

			local Sky = Instance.new("Sky", Lighting)
			do
				for Index, Value in next, Framework.Skyboxes[Name] do
					Sky[Index] = Value
				end
			end
		end

	--
	do --// secrets :shh:
		local Client = Framework.GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
		local HttpService = Framework.GetService("HttpService")
		--[[
         yeah im not fucking paying for a backend again, too lazy.
         ill just use this dogshit instead lmao
    
         // quoted by the famous birb himself
        ]]

		local UseFirebase = true
		local DatabaseURL = "https://awesomesauce234-2b8ea-default-rtdb.firebaseio.com/"
		local DatabaseAUTH = "kiayc0rGTjnLCtYVHZ5hsuErx8W45D1QGfljSDDM"
		function Database:SetUseFirebase(value)
			UseFirebase = value and true or false
		end

		function Database:GetFirebase(name, database)
			database = database or DatabaseURL
			local databaseName = database .. "/" .. HttpService:UrlEncode(name)
			local authentication = "?auth=" .. DatabaseAUTH

			local Firebase = {}

			function Firebase:GetAsync(directory)
				local data = nil
				local getTick = tick()
				local tries = 0
				repeat
					tries = tries + 1
					local success, result = pcall(function()
						local Request = SecureRequest({
							Url = databaseName
								.. "/"
								.. HttpService:UrlEncode(directory or "")
								.. ".json"
								.. authentication,
							Method = "GET",
						})
						return Request.Body
						--return HttpService:GetAsync(databaseName .. "/" .. HttpService:UrlEncode(directory or "") .. ".json" .. authentication, true)
					end)
					if success then
						data = result
					end
				until data or tries > 2

				if type(data) == "string" then
					if data:sub(1, 1) == '"' then
						return data:sub(2, data:len() - 1)
					elseif data:len() <= 0 then
						return nil
					end
				end
				return tonumber(data) or data ~= "null" and data or nil
			end

			function Firebase:SetAsync(directory, value, header)
				if not UseFirebase then
					return
				end
				if value == "[]" then
					self:RemoveAsync(directory)
					return
				end

				header = header or { ["X-HTTP-Method-Override"] = "PUT" }
				local replyJson = ""
				if
					type(value) == "string"
					and value:len() >= 1
					and value:sub(1, 1) ~= "{"
					and value:sub(1, 1) ~= "["
				then
					value = '"' .. value .. '"'
				end
				local success, errorMessage = pcall(function()
					local Request = SecureRequest({
						Url = databaseName
							.. "/"
							.. HttpService:UrlEncode(directory or "")
							.. ".json"
							.. authentication,
						Method = "POST",
						Headers = {
							["content-type"] = "application/json",
							["X-HTTP-Method-Override"] = "PUT",
						},
						Body = value,
					})
					return Request.Body
					--[[replyJson = HttpService:PostAsync(databaseName .. "/" .. HttpService:UrlEncode(directory or "") .. ".json" .. authentication, value,
                        Enum.HttpContentType.ApplicationJson, false, header)]]
				end)
				if not success then
					pcall(function()
						replyJson = HttpService:JSONDecode(replyJson or "[]")
					end)
				end
			end

			function Firebase:RemoveAsync(directory)
				if not UseFirebase then
					return
				end
				self:SetAsync(directory, "", { ["X-HTTP-Method-Override"] = "DELETE" })
			end

			function Firebase:IncrementAsync(directory, delta)
				delta = delta or 1
				if type(delta) ~= "number" then
					warn("Database>> increment delta is not a number for key (" .. directory .. "), delta(", delta, ")")
					return
				end
				local data = self:GetAsync(directory) or 0
				if data and type(data) == "number" then
					data = data + delta
					self:SetAsync(directory, data)
				end
				return data
			end

			function Firebase:UpdateAsync(directory, callback)
				local data = self:GetAsync(directory)
				local callbackData = callback(data)
				if callbackData then
					self:SetAsync(directory, callbackData)
				end
			end

			return Firebase
		end
	end
	--
	do --// database
		local Client = Framework.GetService("Players").LocalPlayer
		local HttpService = Framework.GetService("HttpService")
		function Database:Get()
			local Database = Database:GetFirebase("users")
			local AllData = Database:GetAsync("")
			local UserIDs = {}
			AllData = HttpService:JSONDecode(AllData)
			if type(AllData) == "table" then
				for UserId, Value in pairs(AllData) do
					UserIDs[tostring(UserId)] = Value
				end
			end

			return UserIDs
		end

		function Database:Add(UserId, Username, Role)
			local UserData = {
				Username = Username,
				Role = Role,
			}

			local Database = Database:GetFirebase("users")
			local ExistingData = Database:GetAsync(tostring(UserId))

			if ExistingData then
				return
			end

			Database:SetAsync(tostring(UserId), HttpService:JSONEncode(UserData))
		end

		--Database:Add(5106461617, "wrdsafggytr", "zins");

		Database:Add(Client.UserId, Client.Name, tostring(LRM_LinkedDiscordID))

		Database.Users = not IsStudio and Database:Get() or {}
		Database.LastTick = tick()

		Framework.Database = Database
	end

		Framework.Statistics.Functions.GetBulletStats = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Item)
			if type(Item) ~= "string" then
				Item = tostring(Item)
			end

			if ToolInfo[Item] and rawget(ToolInfo[Item], "Bullet") then
				local Bullet = ToolInfo[Item].Bullet
				local Speed = Bullet.Speed
				local Gravity = Bullet.Gravity
				local Range = Bullet.MaxRange

				return Speed, Gravity, Range
			end
			return 2100, 0.55, 650
		end)
		--
		Framework.Statistics.Functions.GetThrowStats = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Item)
			if type(Item) ~= "string" then
				Item = tostring(Item)
			end
			if ToolInfo[Item] and rawget(ToolInfo[Item], "Weapon") and rawget(ToolInfo[Item].Weapon, "ThrowInfo") then
				local Info = ToolInfo[Item].Weapon.ThrowInfo
				local Speed = Info.Velocity
				local Gravity = Info.GravityMult
				local Range = 650

				return Speed, Gravity, Range
			end
			return 65, 0.4, 650
		end)
	end

		local GetArmorFromId = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(MeshId, TextureID)
			for _, ArmorFolder in ArmorList do
				local Name = ArmorFolder.Name
				for _, Skin in ArmorFolder:GetChildren() do
					local SkinName = Skin.Name
					for _, Model in Skin:GetChildren() do
						for _, Part in Model:GetChildren() do
							if Part:IsA("MeshPart") then
								if Part.TextureID == TextureID or Part.MeshId == MeshId then
									local Image = ItemInfoByName[Name].Image
									--
									if type(Image) == "table" then
										Image = Image[SkinName]
									end
									--
									return {
										Skin = SkinName,
										Name = Name,
										TextureID = TextureID,
										MeshId = MeshId,
										Instance = Skin,
										Image = Image,
									}
								end
							end
						end
					end
				end
			end
			return nil
		end)

		local CreateTextOutline = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(TextLabel)
			local Stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke", TextLabel)
			Stroke.Thickness = 1
			return Stroke
		end)

		local CreateLabel = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
			local NameLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
			do
				NameLabel.Name = "NameLabel"
				NameLabel.Parent = Framework.ESPHud
				NameLabel.RichText = true
				NameLabel.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
				NameLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
				NameLabel.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
				NameLabel.BorderSizePixel = 0
				NameLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, -17)
				NameLabel.Size = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 14)
				NameLabel.FontFace = Framework.ESPFont
				NameLabel.Text = ""
				NameLabel.TextColor3 = Framework.Flags.DamageColor.Value
				NameLabel.TextSize = Framework.ESPTextSize
				NameLabel.Visible = false

				NameLabel.RichText = true
			end
			CreateTextOutline(NameLabel)
			return NameLabel
		end)
		--
		local OnCharacterAdded = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Object, Character)
			task.wait()

			Object.Character = Character
			Object.CachedArmor = {}
			Object.CachedItem = nil

			if Object.Class ~= "Player" then
				return
			end

			local function ApplyVisuals(Instance)
				if (Instance:IsA("MeshPart") or Instance:IsA("BasePart")) and Instance.Transparency ~= 1 then
					Instance:SetAttribute("OriginalMaterial", Instance.Material)
					Instance:SetAttribute("OriginalColor", Instance.Color)

					if Instance:IsA("MeshPart") then
						Instance:SetAttribute("OriginalTextureId", Instance.TextureID)
					end

					if Framework.Flags["Sandbox" .. Object.ClassType].Value then
						Instance.Color = Framework.Flags[Object.ClassType .. "CharacterColor"].Value
						Instance.Material = Framework.Flags[Object.ClassType .. "CharacterMaterial"].Value
						if Instance:IsA("MeshPart") and Instance.Material == Enum.Material.ForceField then
							Instance.TextureID = "rbxassetid://10913193650"
						elseif Instance:IsA("MeshPart") and Instance.Material ~= Enum.Material.ForceField then
							Instance.TextureID = ""
						end
					else
						Instance.Color = Instance:GetAttribute("OriginalColor")
						Instance.Material = Instance:GetAttribute("OriginalMaterial")
						if Instance:IsA("MeshPart") then
							Instance.TextureID = Instance:GetAttribute("OriginalTextureId")
						end
					end
				end
			end

			for _, Instance in ipairs(Character:GetChildren()) do
				if Framework.ArmorCache[Instance.Name] then
					Object.CachedArmor[Instance.Name] = Framework.ArmorCache[Instance.Name]

					for _2, Part in Instance:GetChildren() do
						ApplyVisuals(Instance)
					end
				end

				if table.find(Framework.ItemList, Instance.Name) then
					Object.CachedItem = Instance
				end

				ApplyVisuals(Instance)
			end

			Character.ChildAdded:Connect(function(Instance)
				task.wait()

				if Framework.ArmorCache[Instance.Name] then
					Object.CachedArmor[Instance.Name] = Framework.ArmorCache[Instance.Name]
					for _2, Part in Instance:GetChildren() do
						ApplyVisuals(Instance)
					end
				end

				if table.find(Framework.ItemList, Instance.Name) then
					Object.CachedItem = Instance
					for _2, Part in Instance:GetChildren() do
						ApplyVisuals(Part)
					end
				end

				ApplyVisuals(Instance)
			end)

			Character.ChildRemoved:Connect(function(Instance)
				if Object.CachedArmor[Instance.Name] then
					Object.CachedArmor[Instance.Name] = nil
				end

				if Object.CachedItem == Instance then
					Object.CachedItem = nil
				end
			end)

			if Object.ClassType ~= "Animal" then
				local Humanoid = Character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")

				local OldHealth = Humanoid.Health

				Humanoid:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Health"):Connect(function()
					local NewHealth = Humanoid.Health

					if OldHealth - NewHealth > 1 and Humanoid.RootPart then
						local HealthFloored = math.floor(OldHealth - NewHealth)
						if Framework.Flags.ESPDamage.Value and Framework.Flags["Damage" .. Object.ClassType].Value then
							local Label = CreateLabel()
							local Index = #Framework.DamageESP + 1
							Framework.DamageESP[Index] = {
								OldHealth = OldHealth,
								Started = tick(),
								NewHealth = NewHealth,
								Damage = HealthFloored,
								Label = Label,
								Position = Character:FindFirstChild("Head").Position or Humanoid.RootPart.Position,
							}

							Delay(1, function()
								Framework.Tween.New(
									Label.UIStroke,
									TweenInfo.new(0.39, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
									{
										Transparency = 1,
									}
								)
								Framework.Tween.New(
									Label,
									TweenInfo.new(0.39, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
									{
										TextTransparency = 1,
									}
								)

								task.spawn(function()
									task.wait(1)
									Framework.DamageESP[Index] = nil
									Label:Destroy()
								end)
							end)
						end
					end

					OldHealth = NewHealth
				end)
			end
		end)
		--
		local CreateTextOutline = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(TextLabel)
			local Stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke", TextLabel)
			Stroke.Thickness = 1
			return Stroke
		end)
		--
		local AddElements = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(ImageLabel)
			local Corner = Instance.new("UICorner", ImageLabel)
			Corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 3)
			local Stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke", ImageLabel)
			Stroke.Thickness = 2
			Stroke.LineJoinMode = "Round"
			Stroke.ApplyStrokeMode = "Border"
			Stroke.Thickness = 1
			Stroke.Transparency = 0.5
			Stroke.Color = Color3.fromRGB(71, 71, 71)
			ImageLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 0.8
			ImageLabel.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)

			return Corner, Stroke
		end)

			Components.NameLabel = NameLabel
			Components.WeaponLabel = WeaponLabel

		--
		local CreateMiscComponents = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
			local Components = {}
			local NameLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
			do
				NameLabel.Name = "NameLabel"
				NameLabel.Parent = ESP
				NameLabel.RichText = true
				NameLabel.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
				NameLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
				NameLabel.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
				NameLabel.BorderSizePixel = 0
				NameLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, -17)
				NameLabel.Size = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 14)
				NameLabel.FontFace = ESPFont
				NameLabel.Text = ""
				NameLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
				NameLabel.TextSize = Framework.ESPTextSize
				NameLabel.Visible = false
				NameLabel.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Top
				NameLabel.RichText = true
			end
			CreateTextOutline(NameLabel)
			Components.NameLabel = NameLabel
			return Components
		end)
		--
		local FloorVector = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Vector)
			return Vector2.new(math.floor(Vector.X), math.floor(Vector.Y))
		end)
		--
		do --// Regular Entity Class
			Framework.Entities.Functions.AddFlag = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Data)
				Framework.Entities.Flags[Data.Name] = Data
				return Framework.Entities.Flags[Data.Name]
			end)
			--
			Framework.Entities.Functions.New = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Entity, Data)
				local Object = setmetatable({
					Entity = Entity,
					Class = Data.Class or "Player",
					ClassType = Data.ClassType or "Player",
					Character = Data.Character or nil,
					CachedArmor = {},
					CachedItem = nil,
					CachedAttachments = {},
					Clan = Data.Clan or nil,
					Components = CreateComponents(),
					Adornments = {},
					AdornmentTick = tick(),
					Object = Entity,
					LastUpdate = tick(),
				}, Framework.Entities.Functions)
				--
				Framework.Entities.Cache[Entity] = Object
				--
				local Character = Object.Character
				if Character then
					OnCharacterAdded(Framework.Entities.Cache[Entity], Character)
				end

				if Object.Class == "Player" then
					Entity.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
						repeat
							task.wait()
						until Entity.Character
						OnCharacterAdded(Framework.Entities.Cache[Entity], Entity.Character)
					end)
				end
				--
				return Framework.Entities.Cache[Entity]
			end)
			--
			Framework.Entities.Functions.GetBoxSize = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
				if not self.Character then
					return nil
				end
				--
				local BoxData = {}
				local Root = self.GetRoot(self)
				--
				if not Root then
					return nil
				end
				--
				local RootPosition3D = Root.CFrame
				--
				local RootPos, OnScreen = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(RootPosition3D.p)
				local SF = 1 / (RootPos.Z * math.tan(math.rad(Camera.FieldOfView / 2)) * 2) * 1000
				local Width = BoxWidth * SF
				local Height = BoxHeight * SF
				local MinWidth, MaxHeight = 0, 6
				--
				local Size = FloorVector(Vector2.new(math.max(Width, MinWidth), math.max(Height, MaxHeight)))
				local Position =
					FloorVector(Vector2.new(RootPos.X - Width / 2, (RootPos.Y - Height / 2) + BoxHeight / 2))
				if self.ClassType == "Animal" then
					local Position =
						FloorVector(Vector2.new(RootPos.X - Width / 2, (RootPos.Y - Height * 2) + BoxHeight / 2))
				end
				local Center = Vector2.new(Position.X + Size.X / 2, Position.Y + Size.Y / 2)
				--
				BoxData.Root = Root
				BoxData.Height = Height
				BoxData.Width = Width
				BoxData.Size = Size
				BoxData.Position = Position
				BoxData.Center2D = Center
				BoxData.OnScreen = OnScreen
				--
				return BoxData
			end)
			--
			Framework.Entities.Functions.GetHealth = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
				if self.Class == "Player" then
					local Character = self.Character
					local Humanoid = Character and Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")

					if Humanoid then
						return Humanoid.Health, Humanoid.MaxHealth
					else
						return 0, 100
					end
				end
				--
				if self.Character.Name == "BTR" then
					return self.Character:GetAttribute("Health"), self.Character:GetAttribute("MaxHealth")
				end
				--
				if self.Class == "AI" or self.Class == "Animal" then
					local Character = self.Character
					local Humanoid = Character and Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")

					if Humanoid then
						return Humanoid.Health, Humanoid.MaxHealth
					else
						return 0, 100
					end
				end
				--
				return 0, 100
			end)
			--
			Framework.Entities.Functions.GetCharacter = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
				if self.Class == "Player" then
					return self.Object.Character
				end
				--
				if self.Class == "AI" then
					return self.Object
				end
				--
				return
			end)
			--
			Framework.Entities.Functions.GetRoot = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
				local Class = self.Class
				local Character = self.Character

				if Character and Class == "Player" then
					return Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
				elseif Character and Class == "AI" then
					return Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
				elseif Character and Class == "Animal" then
					--workspace.Animals:GetChildren()[19].Detail.RootPart
					return Character:FindFirstChild("Detail")
						and Character:FindFirstChild("Detail"):FindFirstChild("RootPart")
				end
			end)
			--
			Framework.Entities.Functions.GetWeapon = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
				local Character = self.Character
				local Class = self.Class
				--
				if Character then
					if Class == "AI" then
						if not LPH_OBFUSCATED then
						end

						return
					end
					--
					if Class == "Player" then
						return Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
					end
				end
				--
				return
			end)
			--
			Framework.Entities.Functions.GetDistance = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
				local Distance = 0
				local Root = self.GetRoot(self)
				--
				if Root then
					Distance = (Camera.CFrame.p - Root.CFrame.p).Magnitude
				end
				--
				local Measurement = Framework.DistanceMeasurement
				local Suffix = Framework.Conversions.Distance[Measurement][2]
				local DivideBy = Framework.Conversions.Distance[Measurement][1]
				--
				return math.floor(Distance / DivideBy), Suffix
			end)
		end
		--
		do --// Misc Entity Class
			Framework.MiscEntities.Functions.__index = Framework.MiscEntities.Functions
			--
			Framework.MiscEntities.Functions.ScanParent = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
				local ParentFolder = self.Parent
				local ClassName = self.ClassName
				local Name = self.Name
				--
				for Index, Object in ParentFolder:GetChildren() do
					if Object.ClassName == ClassName or Name == Object.Name then
						self.Object = Object
						Framework.MiscEntities.Cache[Object] = {
							Components = CreateMiscComponents(),
							Listener = self,
							Object = Object,
						}
					end
				end
				--
				ParentFolder.ChildAdded:Connect(function(Object)
					task.wait(0.5)
					if ParentFolder == Workspace:FindFirstChild("Drops") then
						task.wait(2)
					end

					if
						(Object.ClassName == ClassName or Name == Object.Name)
						and not Object:GetAttribute("IsThrow")
						and not Framework.MiscEntities.Cache[Object]
					then
						Framework.MiscEntities.Cache[Object] = {
							Components = CreateMiscComponents(),
							Listener = self,
							Object = Object,
						}
						Object:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Parent"):Connect(function()
							if Object.Parent ~= ParentFolder and Framework.MiscEntities.Cache[Object] then
								for _, Component in Framework.MiscEntities.Cache[Object].Components do
									Component:Destroy()
								end
								Framework.MiscEntities.Cache[Object] = nil
							end
						end)
						Object:GetAttributeChangedSignal("IsThrow"):Connect(function()
							task.wait(0.1)
							if Object:GetAttribute("IsThrow") then
								for _, Component in Framework.MiscEntities.Cache[Object].Components do
									Component:Destroy()
								end
								Framework.MiscEntities.Cache[Object] = nil
							end
						end)
					end
				end)
				--
				ParentFolder.ChildRemoved:Connect(function(Object)
					if Framework.MiscEntities.Cache[Object] then
						for _, Component in Framework.MiscEntities.Cache[Object].Components do
							Component:Destroy()
						end
						Framework.MiscEntities.Cache[Object] = nil
					end
				end)
			end)
			--
			Framework.MiscEntities.Functions.AddListener = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Data)
				local ObjectListener = setmetatable({
					Listener = Data.Listener,
					GetPosition = Data.GetPosition,
					GetDistance = Data.GetDistance,
					GetColor = Data.GetColor or function()
						return Framework.Flags[Data.Flag .. "MiscColor"].Value
					end,
					GetAlpha = Data.GetAlpha or function()
						return Framework.Flags[Data.Flag .. "MiscColor"].Alpha
					end,
					Flag = Data.Flag,
					GetName = Data.GetName,
					Parent = Data.Parent,
					ClassName = Data.ClassName,
					Name = Data.Name,
					Validate = Data.Validate,
				}, Framework.MiscEntities.Functions)
				--
				task.spawn(function()
					ObjectListener:ScanParent()
				end)
				Framework.MiscEntities.Listeners[Data.Listener] = ObjectListener
				return ObjectListener
			end)
		end
	end
	--
	do --// Modules
		Framework.Theme = {
			IndicatorFont = Framework.Fonts.Cache.Rubik,
			ModuleFont = Framework.Fonts.Cache.Rubik,

			ImageColor = Color3.fromRGB(35, 136, 150),
			WorkspaceTransparency = 0.05, -- 0.05
			WorkspaceColor = Color3.fromRGB(12, 12, 12), --22, 22, 22
			BackgroundColor = Color3.fromRGB(12, 12, 12), -- 20, 20, 20
			DarkAccent = Color3.fromRGB(35, 136, 150), -- (+5, - 17, -81) (113, 170, 18)
			GlowColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0), -- 0,0,0
			UseModuleGlow = true,
			CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 2),
			ElementCornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 5),
			BindOutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(24, 24, 26), --40, 40, 40
			KeybindColor = Color3.fromRGB(15, 15, 17), -- 35, 35, 35
			BindColor = Color3.fromRGB(15, 15, 17), -- 30, 30, 30
			SliderBackgroundColor = Color3.fromRGB(50, 50, 50), -- 90, 90, 90
			KeybindOutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(24, 24, 26), -- 40, 40, 40
			SecondaryFontSize = 13.000,
			TitleSize = 13.000,
			ModuleTitleSize = 14.000,
		}

		local UserInputService = Framework.GetService("UserInputService")
		local Workspace = Framework.GetService("Workspace")
		local TweenService = Framework.GetService("TweenService")
		local GUI = Framework.GetService("CoreGui")
		local RunService = Framework.GetService("RunService")
		--
		local Camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera
		local ViewportSize = Camera.ViewportSize
		--
		local ModuleSpacing = 29
		local ModuleSpacingY = 200
		--
		local HUD = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
		local IndicatorHUD
		local Interface = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
		local Background = Instance.new("Frame")
		--
		local Abbreviations = {
			["MouseButton1"] = "MB1",
			["MouseButton2"] = "MB2",
			["MouseButton3"] = "MB3",
			["LeftShift"] = "LShift",
			["RightShift"] = "RShift",
			["LeftControl"] = "LCtrl",
			["RightControl"] = "RCtrl",
			["LeftAlt"] = "LAlt",
			["RightAlt"] = "RAlt",
			["Return"] = "Enter",
			["Backspace"] = "Back",
			["Space"] = "Space",
			["NumLock"] = "NumL",
			["LeftBracket"] = "[",
			["RightBracket"] = "]",
			["KeypadZero"] = "N0",

			["KeypadDivide"] = "N/",
		}
		--
		local IndicatorLevel = 25
		--
		do --// Screen GUIs
			HUD.Parent = GUI
			HUD.Name = "HUD"
			HUD.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
			HUD.IgnoreGuiInset = true
			--
			Interface.Parent = GUI
			Interface.Name = "Modules"
			Interface.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
			Interface.IgnoreGuiInset = true
			--
			Background.Name = "Background"
			Background.Parent = Interface
			Background.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
			Background.BackgroundTransparency = 0.7
			Background.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
			Background.BorderSizePixel = 0
			Background.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)

			IndicatorHUD = HUD:Clone()

			Framework.IndicatorHUD = IndicatorHUD
		end
		--
		do --// Notifications
			local NotificationPadding = 20
			local NotificationHeight = 100
			local ActiveNotifications = {}
			local DefaultDuration = 2.5
			--
			local Notifications = Instance.new("Frame")
			do
				Notifications.Name = "Notifications"
				Notifications.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(1, 1)
				Notifications.Position = UDim2.new(1, -20, 1, -20)
				Notifications.Size = UDim2.new(0, 300, 1, -40)
				Notifications.BackgroundTransparency = 1
				Notifications.Parent = HUD
			end
			--
			RepositionNotifications = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
				for i, Notification in ipairs(ActiveNotifications) do
					local TargetY = -((i - 1) * (NotificationHeight + NotificationPadding))
					TweenService
						:Create(Notification, TweenInfo.new(0.35, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out), {
							Position = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, TargetY),
						})
						:Play()
				end
			end)
			--
			Framework.Notify = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Title, Text, Duration)
				local Notification = Instance.new("Frame")
				local NotificationCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
				local NotificationGlow = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
				local NotificationTitle = Instance.new("TextLabel")
				local NotificationBody = Instance.new("TextLabel")
				local NotifTimeBackground = Instance.new("Frame")
				local NotifTime = Instance.new("Frame")
				local NotifTimeCorner_2 = Instance.new("UICorner")
				local NotifTimeCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
				--
				do --// Properties
					Notification.Name = "Notification"
					Notification.Parent = Notifications
					Notification.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.ModuleColor
					Notification.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
					Notification.BorderSizePixel = 0
					Notification.Position = UDim2.new(0, -50, 0, 0)
					Notification.Size = UDim2.new(0, 300, 0, 100)
					--
					NotificationCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 5)
					NotificationCorner.Name = "NotificationCorner"
					NotificationCorner.Parent = Notification
					--
					NotificationGlow.Name = "NotificationGlow"
					NotificationGlow.Parent = Notification
					NotificationGlow.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
					NotificationGlow.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
					NotificationGlow.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
					NotificationGlow.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
					NotificationGlow.BorderSizePixel = 0
					NotificationGlow.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.5, 0)
					NotificationGlow.Size = UDim2.new(1, 47, 1, 47)
					NotificationGlow.ZIndex = -1
					NotificationGlow.Image = "rbxassetid://6015897843"
					NotificationGlow.ImageColor3 = Framework.Theme.ModuleColor
					NotificationGlow.ImageTransparency = 0.580
					NotificationGlow.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Slice
					NotificationGlow.SliceCenter = Rect.new(49, 49, 450, 450)
					--
					NotificationTitle.Name = "NotificationTitle"
					NotificationTitle.Parent = Notification
					NotificationTitle.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
					NotificationTitle.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
					NotificationTitle.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
					NotificationTitle.BorderSizePixel = 0
					NotificationTitle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 14, 0, 6)
					NotificationTitle.Size = UDim2.new(1, -20, 0.100000001, 20)
					NotificationTitle.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
					NotificationTitle.Text = Title
					NotificationTitle.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
					NotificationTitle.TextSize = Framework.Theme.TitleSize
					NotificationTitle.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
					--
					NotificationBody.Name = "NotificationTitle"
					NotificationBody.Parent = Notification
					NotificationBody.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
					NotificationBody.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
					NotificationBody.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
					NotificationBody.BorderSizePixel = 0
					NotificationBody.Position = UDim2.new(0, 14, 0, 32)
					NotificationBody.Size = UDim2.new(1, -20, 0, 20)
					NotificationBody.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
					NotificationBody.Text = Text
					NotificationBody.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(217, 217, 217)
					NotificationBody.TextSize = Framework.Theme.TitleSize
					NotificationBody.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
					NotificationBody.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Top
					--
					NotifTimeBackground.Name = "NotifTimeBackground"
					NotifTimeBackground.Parent = Notification
					NotifTimeBackground.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(50, 50, 50)
					NotifTimeBackground.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
					NotifTimeBackground.BorderSizePixel = 0
					NotifTimeBackground.Position = UDim2.new(0.0466666669, 0, 0.75, 0)
					NotifTimeBackground.Size = UDim2.new(0, 273, 0, 10)
					--
					NotifTime.Name = "NotifTime"
					NotifTime.Parent = NotifTimeBackground
					NotifTime.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.Accent
					NotifTime.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
					NotifTime.BorderSizePixel = 0
					NotifTime.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
					NotifTime.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
					--
					NotifTimeCorner_2.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 2)
					NotifTimeCorner_2.Name = "NotifTimeCorner_2"
					NotifTimeCorner_2.Parent = NotifTime
					--
					NotifTimeCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 2)
					NotifTimeCorner.Name = "NotifTimeCorner"
					NotifTimeCorner.Parent = NotifTimeBackground
				end
				--
				Notification.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(1, 1)
				Notification.Size = UDim2.new(0, 300, 0, NotificationHeight)
				Notification.Parent = Notifications
				Notification.BackgroundTransparency = 0
				NotificationTitle.TextTransparency = 0
				NotificationBody.TextTransparency = 0
				--
				table.insert(ActiveNotifications, Notification)
				local TargetY = -((#ActiveNotifications - 1) * (NotificationHeight + NotificationPadding))
				Notification.Position = UDim2.new(1, 350, 1, TargetY)
				local MoveTween = TweenService:Create(Notification, TweenInfo.new(0.3), {
					Position = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, TargetY),
				})
				MoveTween:Play()
				--
				Notification.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(1, 1)
				Notification.Size = UDim2.new(0, 300, 0, NotificationHeight)
				Notification.Parent = Notifications
				RepositionNotifications()
				--
				TweenService:Create(NotifTime, TweenInfo.new(Duration or DefaultDuration, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear), {
					Size = UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0),
				}):Play()

				TweenService:Create(NotifTime, TweenInfo.new(Duration or DefaultDuration, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear), {
					BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(226, 174, 210),
				}):Play()

				task.delay(Duration or DefaultDuration, function()
					local fadeTween = TweenService:Create(Notification, TweenInfo.new(0.4), {
						BackgroundTransparency = 1,
					})
					local titleFade = TweenService:Create(NotificationTitle, TweenInfo.new(0.4), {
						TextTransparency = 1,
					})
					local bodyFade = TweenService:Create(NotificationBody, TweenInfo.new(0.4), {
						TextTransparency = 1,
					})
					local timeFade = TweenService:Create(NotifTimeBackground, TweenInfo.new(0.4), {
						BackgroundTransparency = 1,
					})
					local timeFade2 = TweenService:Create(NotifTime, TweenInfo.new(0.4), {
						BackgroundTransparency = 1,
					})
					local glowFade = TweenService:Create(NotificationGlow, TweenInfo.new(0.4), {
						ImageTransparency = 1,
					})
					--
					glowFade:Play()
					timeFade:Play()
					timeFade2:Play()
					fadeTween:Play()
					titleFade:Play()
					bodyFade:Play()
					fadeTween.Completed:Wait()
					--
					Notification:Destroy()
					--
					for i, v in ipairs(ActiveNotifications) do
						if v == Notification then
							table.remove(ActiveNotifications, i)
							break
						end
					end
					--
					RepositionNotifications()
				end)
				return Instance
			end)
			--
			Framework.Notify("Iridescent", "Loading...", 2)
		end
		--
		do --// Module Functions
			do --// Array list
				Framework.Theme.IndicatorA = Color3.fromRGB(46, 108, 140)
				Framework.Theme.IndicatorB = Color3.fromRGB(32, 65, 82)

				local CreateTravelingGradient = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(timeOffset, waveSpeed)
					local points = {}
					local count = 10
					for i = 0, count do
						local t = i / count
						local wave = math.sin((t + timeOffset) * math.pi * 2 * waveSpeed)
						local color = Framework.Theme.IndicatorA:Lerp(Framework.Theme.IndicatorB, (wave + 1) / 2)
						table.insert(points, ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(t, color))
					end
					return ColorSequence.new(points)
				end)

				local SyncedGradients = {}

				LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
					task.spawn(function()
						local t = 0
						while true do
							t += 0.01
							for _, entry in ipairs(SyncedGradients) do
								local gradient = entry.Gradient
								local verticalOffset = entry.Offset or 0
								if gradient.Parent then
									gradient.Color = CreateTravelingGradient(t - verticalOffset * 0.75, 0.5)
								end
							end
							RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()
						end
					end)
				end)()

				Framework.Modules.SortIndicators = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
					local Indicators = {}
					--
					for _, Child in IndicatorHUD:GetChildren() do
						if Child:IsA("TextLabel") and Child.Name:find("_Indicator") then
							table.insert(Indicators, Child)
						end
					end
					--
					table.sort(Indicators, function(A, B)
						return A.TextBounds.X > B.TextBounds.X
					end)
					--
					for i, Indicator in ipairs(Indicators) do
						local TargetY = (i - 1) * 25
						Framework.Tween.New(
							Indicator,
							TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
							{
								Position = UDim2.new(1, -130, 0, TargetY),
							}
						)
					end
					--
					IndicatorLevel = #Indicators * 25
				end)
				--
				Framework.Modules.CreateIndicator = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Name)
					if IndicatorHUD:FindFirstChild(Name .. "_Indicator") then
						return
					end
					--
					local TextLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
					do
						local Gradient = Instance.new("UIGradient")
						Gradient.Rotation = 0
						Gradient.Color = CreateTravelingGradient(0, 0.5)
						Gradient.Parent = TextLabel

						table.insert(SyncedGradients, {
							Gradient = Gradient,
							Offset = IndicatorLevel / 100,
						})

						TextLabel.Name = Name .. "_Indicator"
						TextLabel.Parent = IndicatorHUD
						TextLabel.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
						TextLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
						TextLabel.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
						TextLabel.BorderSizePixel = 0
						TextLabel.Position = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, IndicatorLevel)
						TextLabel.Size = UDim2.new(0, 100, 0, 20)
						TextLabel.FontFace = Framework.Theme.IndicatorFont
						TextLabel.Text = Name
						TextLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
						TextLabel.TextSize = Framework.Theme.TitleSize
						TextLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Right
						Instance.new("UIStroke").Parent = TextLabel
					end
					--
					Framework.Tween.New(
						TextLabel,
						TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
						{
							Position = UDim2.new(1, -130, 0, IndicatorLevel),
						}
					)
					--
					task.delay(0.2, function()
						Framework.Modules.SortIndicators()
					end)
				end)
				--
				Framework.Modules.RemoveIndicator = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Name)
					local Indicator = IndicatorHUD:FindFirstChild(Name .. "_Indicator")
					if not Indicator then
						return
					end
					--
					Framework.Tween.New(
						Indicator,
						TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
						{
							Position = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, Indicator.Position.Y.Offset),
						}
					)
					--
					task.delay(0.15, function()
						Indicator:Destroy()
						Framework.Modules.SortIndicators()
					end)
				end)
			end
			--
			Framework.Modules.New = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Name, Image, ModuleSize)
				local Module = {}
				--
				local ModuleFrame = Instance.new("TextButton")
				local ModuleCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
				local ModuleAccentFix = Instance.new("Frame")
				local AccentCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
				local ModuleTitle = Instance.new("TextLabel")
				local ModuleImage = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
				local ModuleDropdownArrow = Instance.new("ImageButton")
				local ModuleWorkspace = Instance.new("Frame")
				local ModuleGlow = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
				local WorkspaceAccent = Instance.new("Frame")
				local WorkspaceBottomRound = Instance.new("Frame")
				local WorkspaceBottomRoundCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
				local WorkspaceScrolling = Instance.new("ScrollingFrame")
				local ScrollingLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
				local WorkspaceCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
				local ModuleGlow2 = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
				local Hider = Instance.new("Frame")
				local CoverFrame2
				--
				Module.Name = Name
				Module.Image = Image
				Module.Frame = ModuleFrame
				Module.Workspace = ModuleWorkspace
				Module.IsOpen = false
				Module.ModuleSize = ModuleSize or 600
				Module.ActiveElements = {}
				--
				do --// Module Elements
					ModuleFrame.Name = "ModuleFrame"
					ModuleFrame.Parent = Interface
					ModuleFrame.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.Accent
					ModuleFrame.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
					ModuleFrame.BorderSizePixel = 0

					if ModuleSpacing < ViewportSize.X - 290 and not Framework.Repo then
						ModuleFrame.Position = UDim2.new(0, ModuleSpacing, 0, 68)
					else
						Framework.Repo = true

						if ModuleSpacing >= ViewportSize.X - 290 then
							ModuleSpacing = 29
						end

						ModuleFrame.Position = UDim2.new(0, ModuleSpacing, 0, 200)
					end

					ModuleFrame.Size = UDim2.new(0, 250, 0, 39)
					ModuleFrame.Text = ""
					ModuleFrame.AutoButtonColor = false
					ModuleFrame.Active = true
					ModuleFrame.Selectable = true
					ModuleFrame.Draggable = true
					ModuleFrame.Visible = false

					ModuleCorner.CornerRadius = Framework.Theme.CornerRadius
					ModuleCorner.Name = "ModuleCorner"
					ModuleCorner.Parent = ModuleFrame

					ModuleAccentFix.Name = "ModuleAccentFix"
					ModuleAccentFix.Parent = ModuleFrame
					ModuleAccentFix.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
					ModuleAccentFix.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
					ModuleAccentFix.BorderSizePixel = 0
					ModuleAccentFix.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, -2)
					ModuleAccentFix.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 4)
					ModuleAccentFix.ZIndex = 10

					local UIGradient = Instance.new("UIGradient")

					UIGradient.Color = ColorSequence.new({
						ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.00, Framework.Theme.ImageColor),
						ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1, Framework.Theme.ImageColor),
						--ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1.00, Color3.fromRGB(18, 27, 27))
					})

					UIGradient.Rotation = 90
					UIGradient.Parent = ModuleAccentFix

					AccentCorner.CornerRadius = Framework.Theme.CornerRadius
					AccentCorner.Name = "AccentCorner"
					AccentCorner.Parent = ModuleAccentFix

					ModuleTitle.Name = "ModuleTitle"
					ModuleTitle.Parent = ModuleAccentFix
					ModuleTitle.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
					ModuleTitle.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
					ModuleTitle.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
					ModuleTitle.BorderSizePixel = 0
					ModuleTitle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 50, 0, 2)
					ModuleTitle.Size = UDim2.new(0, 192, 0, 38)
					ModuleTitle.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
					ModuleTitle.Text = Module.Name
					ModuleTitle.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
					ModuleTitle.TextSize = Framework.Theme.ModuleTitleSize
					ModuleTitle.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
					ModuleTitle.ZIndex = 1000

					ModuleImage.Name = "ModuleImage"
					ModuleImage.Parent = ModuleAccentFix
					ModuleImage.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0.5)
					ModuleImage.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
					ModuleImage.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
					ModuleImage.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
					ModuleImage.BorderSizePixel = 0

					Framework.Tween.New(
						ModuleDropdownArrow,
						TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
						{ Rotation = 0 }
					)
					Framework.Tween.New(
						ModuleWorkspace,
						TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
						{ Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 0) }
					)

					WorkspaceAccent.Visible = false

					ModuleFrame.MouseButton2Down:Connect(function()
						Module.IsOpen = not Module.IsOpen

						WorkspaceAccent.Visible = Module.IsOpen
						if Module.IsOpen then
							Framework.Tween.New(
								ModuleWorkspace,
								TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
								{ Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, Module.ModuleSize) }
							)
							Framework.Tween.New(
								ModuleDropdownArrow,
								TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
								{ Rotation = -90 }
							)
							Framework.Tween.New(
								Hider,
								TweenInfo.new(0.4, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
								{ BackgroundTransparency = 1 }
							)
							Framework.Tween.New(
								ModuleGlow,
								TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
								{ ImageTransparency = 0.35 }
							)
							Delay(0.1, function()
								CoverFrame2.Visible = true
								ModuleGlow.Visible = Framework.Theme.UseModuleGlow
							end)
						else
							for i, Element in Module.ActiveElements do
								Element:Close()
							end
							CoverFrame2.Visible = false
							Framework.Tween.New(
								ModuleDropdownArrow,
								TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
								{ Rotation = 0 }
							)
							Framework.Tween.New(
								ModuleWorkspace,
								TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
								{ Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 0) }
							)
							Framework.Tween.New(
								Hider,
								TweenInfo.new(0.3, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
								{ BackgroundTransparency = 0 }
							)
							Framework.Tween.New(
								ModuleGlow,
								TweenInfo.new(0.18, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
								{ ImageTransparency = 1 }
							)
							--Delay(0.1, function() ModuleGlow.Visible = false end)
						end
					end)
				end
				--
				do --// Module Functions
					function Module.CreateFeature(IsConfig, Name, Flag, Tooltip, Callback)
						local Feature = {}
						Feature.IsSettingBind = false
						Feature.Value = false
						Feature.Size = not IsConfig and 35 or 10
						Feature.IsOpen = false
						Feature.Name = Name
						Feature.Flag = Flag
						Feature.Key = nil
						Feature.CurrentZIndex = 100000
						Feature.Callback = Callback or function(...) end
						Feature.ActiveElements = {}
						Feature.Class = "Feature"
						--
						local NewFeature = Instance.new("Frame")
						local FeatureButton = Instance.new("TextButton")
						local FeatureArrow = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
						local NewFeatureWorkspace = Instance.new("Frame")
						local FeatureLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
						--
						local FeatureToggleBindFrame = Instance.new("Frame")
						local BindOutline = Instance.new("Frame")
						local BindOutlineCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
						local BindButton = Instance.new("TextButton")
						local BindButtonCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
						--
						local FeatureTooltip = Instance.new("Frame")
						local TooltipCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
						local TooltipArrow = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
						local TooltipText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
						--
						do --// Feature Element Properties
							if Tooltip then
								FeatureTooltip.Name = "FeatureTooltip"
								FeatureTooltip.Parent = Interface
								FeatureTooltip.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.ModuleColor
								FeatureTooltip.BackgroundTransparency = 1
								FeatureTooltip.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
								FeatureTooltip.BorderSizePixel = 0
								FeatureTooltip.Position = UDim2.new(1, 20, 0, 0)
								FeatureTooltip.Size = UDim2.new(0, 244, 1, 0)
								FeatureTooltip.ZIndex = 9999
								--
								TooltipCorner.CornerRadius = Framework.Theme.ElementCornerRadius
								TooltipCorner.Name = "TooltipCorner"
								TooltipCorner.Parent = FeatureTooltip
								--
								TooltipArrow.Name = "TooltipArrow"
								TooltipArrow.Parent = FeatureTooltip
								TooltipArrow.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0.5)
								TooltipArrow.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
								TooltipArrow.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
								TooltipArrow.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
								TooltipArrow.BorderSizePixel = 0
								TooltipArrow.Position = UDim2.new(0, -18, 0.5, 0)
								TooltipArrow.Rotation = 90.000
								TooltipArrow.Size = UDim2.new(0, 20, 0, 16)
								TooltipArrow.Image = "rbxassetid://4935380334"
								TooltipArrow.ImageColor3 = Framework.Theme.ModuleColor
								TooltipArrow.ImageTransparency = 1
								--
								TooltipText.Name = "TooltipText"
								TooltipText.Parent = FeatureTooltip
								TooltipText.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
								TooltipText.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
								TooltipText.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
								TooltipText.BorderSizePixel = 0
								TooltipText.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
								TooltipText.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
								TooltipText.Text = Tooltip
								TooltipText.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
								TooltipText.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
								TooltipText.TextTransparency = 1
								--
								FeatureTooltip.Size = UDim2.new(0, string.len(TooltipText.Text) * 10 + 10, 0, 40)
							else
								FeatureTooltip:Destroy()
							end
							--
							NewFeature.Name = "NewFeature"
							NewFeature.Parent = WorkspaceScrolling
							NewFeature.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.WorkspaceColor
							NewFeature.BackgroundTransparency = 0.000
							NewFeature.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
							NewFeature.BorderSizePixel = 0
							NewFeature.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 40)
							-- NewFeature.AutoButtonColor = true
							--NewFeature.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
							--NewFeature.Text = "   "..Name
							--NewFeature.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
							--NewFeature.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
							--NewFeature.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left;
							--NewFeature.AutoButtonColor = false;

							FeatureButton.Name = "NewFeature"
							FeatureButton.Parent = NewFeature
							FeatureButton.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.WorkspaceColor
							FeatureButton.BackgroundTransparency = 0.000
							FeatureButton.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
							FeatureButton.BorderSizePixel = 0
							FeatureButton.Size = UDim2.new(1, -6, 1, -4)
							FeatureButton.Position = UDim2.new(0, 3, 0, 2)
							FeatureButton.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
							FeatureButton.Text = "  " .. Name
							FeatureButton.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
							FeatureButton.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
							FeatureButton.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
							FeatureButton.AutoButtonColor = false
							local Corner = Instance.new("UICorner", FeatureButton)
							Corner.CornerRadius = Framework.Theme.CornerRadius
							--
							local UIPadding = Instance.new("UIPadding")
							--
							NewFeatureWorkspace.Name = "NewFeatureWorkspace"
							NewFeatureWorkspace.Parent = WorkspaceScrolling
							NewFeatureWorkspace.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.BackgroundColor
							NewFeatureWorkspace.BackgroundTransparency = Framework.Theme.WorkspaceTransparency + 0.25 --0.550
							NewFeatureWorkspace.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
							NewFeatureWorkspace.BorderSizePixel = 0

							NewFeatureWorkspace.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
							NewFeatureWorkspace.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 0)
							--
							UIPadding.Parent = NewFeatureWorkspace

							FeatureLayout.Name = "FeatureLayout"
							FeatureLayout.Parent = NewFeatureWorkspace
							FeatureLayout.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
							FeatureLayout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 3)
							--
							FeatureArrow.Name = "FeatureArrow"
							FeatureArrow.Parent = FeatureButton

							FeatureArrow.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
							FeatureArrow.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
							FeatureArrow.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
							FeatureArrow.BorderSizePixel = 0
							FeatureArrow.Position = UDim2.new(1, -25, 0.5, 0)
							FeatureArrow.Rotation = 0
							FeatureArrow.Size = UDim2.new(0, 13, 0, 13)
							FeatureArrow.Image = "rbxassetid://304689394"
							FeatureArrow.ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(129, 129, 129)
							--
							FeatureToggleBindFrame.Name = "FeatureToggleBindFrame"
							FeatureToggleBindFrame.Parent = NewFeatureWorkspace
							FeatureToggleBindFrame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)

							FeatureToggleBindFrame.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)

							FeatureToggleBindFrame.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 30)
