							BindOutline.Parent = FeatureToggleBindFrame
							BindOutline.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.BindOutlineColor
							BindOutline.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
							BindOutline.BorderSizePixel = 0
							BindOutline.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 0)
							BindOutline.Size = UDim2.new(0, 232, 0, 20)
							BindOutline.BackgroundTransparency = 0 --Framework.Theme.WorkspaceTransparency;
							--
							BindOutlineCorner.CornerRadius = Framework.Theme.ElementCornerRadius
							BindOutlineCorner.Name = "BindOutlineCorner"
							BindOutlineCorner.Parent = BindOutline
							--
							BindButton.Name = "BindButton"
							BindButton.Parent = BindOutline
							BindButton.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.BindColor
							BindButton.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
							BindButton.BorderSizePixel = 0
							BindButton.Position = UDim2.new(0, 1, 0, 1)
							BindButton.Size = UDim2.new(1, -2, 1, -2)
							BindButton.AutoButtonColor = false
							BindButton.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
							BindButton.Text = "Bind: None"
							BindButton.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
							BindButton.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
							BindButton.BackgroundTransparency = 0.1 --Framework.Theme.WorkspaceTransparency
							--
							BindButtonCorner.CornerRadius = Framework.Theme.ElementCornerRadius
							BindButtonCorner.Name = "BindButtonCorner"
							BindButtonCorner.Parent = BindButton

							if IsConfig then
								FeatureToggleBindFrame:Destroy()
							end
						end
						--
						do --// Feature Functions
							function Feature:Set(Value)
								if not IsConfig then
									Feature.Value = Value

									if Feature.Value then
										-- FeatureArrow.ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(129, 129, 129)
										Framework.Modules.CreateIndicator(Feature.Name)
										Framework.Tween.New(
											FeatureButton,
											TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{ BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.ModuleOn }
										)
										Framework.Tween.New(
											FeatureArrow,
											TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{ ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255) }
										)
									else
										Framework.Modules.RemoveIndicator(Feature.Name)
										Framework.Tween.New(
											FeatureButton,
											TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{ BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.WorkspaceColor }
										)
										Framework.Tween.New(
											FeatureArrow,
											TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{ ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(129, 129, 129) }
										)
									end

									task.spawn(function()
										pcall(Feature.Callback, Feature.Value)
									end)
								end
							end
							--
							function Feature:SetKey(Key)
								if Key == nil or Key == "" then
									BindButton.Text = "Bind: None"
									Feature.Key = ""
									return
								end
								Feature.Key = Key
								local KeyText = Key.Name
								if Abbreviations[KeyText] then
									KeyText = Abbreviations[KeyText]
								end

								BindButton.Text = "Bind: " .. KeyText
								Feature.IsSettingBind = false
							end
							--
							function Feature:AddToggle(Name, Flag, Callback)
								local Toggle = {}
								Toggle.Name = Name
								Toggle.Flag = Flag
								Toggle.Value = false
								Toggle.Class = "Toggle"
								Toggle.Callback = Callback or function(...) end
								--
								local FeatureToggle = Instance.new("TextButton")
								local ToggleVisualizer = Instance.new("Frame")
								local ToggleCircleFrame = Instance.new("Frame")
								local ToggleCircle = Instance.new("UICorner")
								local ToggleVIsualizerCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
								local ToggleTitle = Instance.new("TextLabel")
								--
								do --// Element Properties;
									FeatureToggle.Parent = NewFeatureWorkspace
									FeatureToggle.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									FeatureToggle.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
									FeatureToggle.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									FeatureToggle.BorderSizePixel = 0
									FeatureToggle.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 17)
									FeatureToggle.AutoButtonColor = false
									FeatureToggle.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
									FeatureToggle.Text = ""
									FeatureToggle.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									FeatureToggle.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
									--
									Feature.Size = Feature.Size + 20
									--
									ToggleVisualizer.Name = "ToggleVisualizer"
									ToggleVisualizer.Parent = FeatureToggle
									ToggleVisualizer.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0.5)
									ToggleVisualizer.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(115, 115, 115)
									ToggleVisualizer.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									ToggleVisualizer.BorderSizePixel = 0
									ToggleVisualizer.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0.5, 0)
									ToggleVisualizer.Size = UDim2.new(0, 28, 0.5, 0)
									--
									ToggleCircleFrame.Name = "ToggleVisualizer"
									ToggleCircleFrame.Parent = ToggleVisualizer
									ToggleCircleFrame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									ToggleCircleFrame.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									ToggleCircleFrame.BorderSizePixel = 0
									ToggleCircleFrame.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, -3)
									ToggleCircleFrame.Size = UDim2.new(0, 15, 0, 15)
									--
									ToggleCircle.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
									ToggleCircle.Name = "ToggleCircle"
									ToggleCircle.Parent = ToggleCircleFrame
									--
									ToggleVIsualizerCorner.Name = "ToggleVIsualizerCorner"
									ToggleVIsualizerCorner.Parent = ToggleVisualizer
									--
									ToggleTitle.Name = "ToggleTitle"
									ToggleTitle.Parent = FeatureToggle
									ToggleTitle.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									ToggleTitle.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
									ToggleTitle.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									ToggleTitle.BorderSizePixel = 0
									ToggleTitle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 50, 0, 0)
									ToggleTitle.Size = UDim2.new(1, -50, 1, 0)
									ToggleTitle.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
									ToggleTitle.Text = Name
									ToggleTitle.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(210, 210, 210)
									ToggleTitle.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
									ToggleTitle.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
								end
								--
								do --// Element functions
									function Toggle:Set(Value)
										Toggle.Value = Value
										if not Toggle.Value then
											Framework.Tween.New(
												ToggleTitle,
												TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
												{ TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(210, 210, 210) }
											)
											Framework.Tween.New(
												ToggleCircleFrame,
												TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
												{ Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, -3) }
											)
											Framework.Tween.New(
												ToggleVisualizer,
												TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
												{ BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(115, 115, 115) }
											)
											Framework.Tween.New(
												ToggleCircleFrame,
												TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
												{ BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255) }
											)
										else
											Framework.Tween.New(
												ToggleTitle,
												TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
												{ TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255) }
											)
											Framework.Tween.New(
												ToggleCircleFrame,
												TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
												{ Position = UDim2.new(1, -15, 0, -3) }
											)
											Framework.Tween.New(
												ToggleVisualizer,
												TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
												{ BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.DarkAccent }
											)
											Framework.Tween.New(
												ToggleCircleFrame,
												TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
												{ BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.Accent }
											)
										end
										task.spawn(function()
											pcall(Toggle.Callback, Toggle.Value)
										end)
									end
								end
								--
								do --// Toggle Connections
									FeatureToggle.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
										Toggle:Set(not Toggle.Value)
									end)
								end
								--
								Framework.Flags[Toggle.Flag] = Toggle
								return Toggle
							end
							--
							function Feature:AddSlider(Name, Flag, SliderData, Callback)
								local Slider = {}
								Slider.Name = Name
								Slider.Class = "Slider"
								Slider.Flag = Flag
								Slider.Min = SliderData.Min or 0
								Slider.Max = SliderData.Max or 100
								Slider.Decimals = SliderData.Decimals or 0
								Slider.Suffix = SliderData.Suffix or ""
								Slider.Callback = Callback or function(...) end
								--
								local FeatureSlider = Instance.new("TextButton")
								local SliderTitle = Instance.new("TextLabel")
								local SliderButton = Instance.new("Frame")
								local SliderColor = Instance.new("Frame")
								local SliderCircle = Instance.new("Frame")
								local SliderCircleCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
								local SliderValue = Instance.new("TextLabel")
								--
								do --// Slider Elements
									FeatureSlider.Name = "FeatureSlider"
									FeatureSlider.Parent = NewFeatureWorkspace
									FeatureSlider.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
									FeatureSlider.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
									FeatureSlider.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									FeatureSlider.BorderSizePixel = 0
									FeatureSlider.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.522292972, 0)
									FeatureSlider.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 32)
									FeatureSlider.Text = ""
									FeatureSlider.AutoButtonColor = false

									SliderTitle.Name = "SliderTitle"
									SliderTitle.Parent = FeatureSlider
									SliderTitle.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									SliderTitle.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
									SliderTitle.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									SliderTitle.BorderSizePixel = 0
									SliderTitle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 0)
									SliderTitle.Size = UDim2.new(1, -20, 0, 14)
									SliderTitle.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
									SliderTitle.Text = Name
									SliderTitle.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									SliderTitle.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
									SliderTitle.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
									SliderTitle.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Top

									SliderButton.Name = "SliderButton"
									SliderButton.Parent = FeatureSlider
									SliderButton.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.SliderBackgroundColor
									SliderButton.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									SliderButton.BorderSizePixel = 0
									SliderButton.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 25)
									SliderButton.Size = UDim2.new(0, 230, 0, 2)

									SliderColor.Name = "SliderColor"
									SliderColor.Parent = SliderButton
									SliderColor.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.Accent
									SliderColor.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									SliderColor.BorderSizePixel = 0
									SliderColor.Size = UDim2.new(0, 100, 1, 0)

									SliderCircle.Name = "SliderCircle"
									SliderCircle.Parent = SliderColor
									SliderCircle.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.Accent
									SliderCircle.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									SliderCircle.BorderSizePixel = 0
									SliderCircle.Position = UDim2.new(1, -5, 0, -5)
									SliderCircle.Size = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 10)

									SliderCircleCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
									SliderCircleCorner.Name = "SliderCircleCorner"
									SliderCircleCorner.Parent = SliderCircle

									SliderValue.Name = "SliderValue"
									SliderValue.Parent = FeatureSlider
									SliderValue.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									SliderValue.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
									SliderValue.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									SliderValue.BorderSizePixel = 0
									SliderValue.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 0)
									SliderValue.Size = UDim2.new(1, -20, 0, 14)
									SliderValue.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
									SliderValue.Text = ""
									SliderValue.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									SliderValue.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
									SliderValue.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Right
									SliderValue.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Top
								end
								--
								do --// Slider Functions
									function Slider:Set(Value)
										Value = math.clamp(Value, self.Min, self.Max)

										local formattedValue = string.format("%." .. self.Decimals .. "f", Value)
										self.Value = tonumber(formattedValue)

										local normalizedValue = (self.Value - self.Min) / (self.Max - self.Min)
										Framework.Tween.New(
											SliderColor,
											TweenInfo.new(0.2, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{ Size = UDim2.new(normalizedValue, 0, 1, 0) }
										)

										SliderValue.Text = self.Value .. self.Suffix
										task.spawn(function()
											pcall(Slider.Callback, Slider.Value)
										end)
									end
								end
								--
								do --// Connections
									FeatureSlider.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
										if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
											local function UpdateSlider(inputPosition)
												local InputPosition = (
													inputPosition.X - FeatureSlider.AbsolutePosition.X
												) / FeatureSlider.AbsoluteSize.X
												local sliderValue = Slider.Min
													+ InputPosition * (Slider.Max - Slider.Min)
												Slider:Set(sliderValue)
											end
											--
											local connection
											connection = UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
												if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement then
													UpdateSlider(input.Position)
												end
											end)
											--
											input.Changed:Connect(function()
												if input.UserInputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
													connection:Disconnect()
												end
											end)
										end
									end)
								end
								--
								if SliderData.Default then
									Slider:Set(SliderData.Default)
								else
									Slider:Set(Slider.Max / 2)
								end
								--
								Feature.Size = Feature.Size + 40
								Framework.Flags[Slider.Flag] = Slider
								return Slider
							end
							--
							function Feature:AddDropdown(Name, Flag, Options, Callback)
								local Dropdown = {}
								Dropdown.Flag = Flag
								Dropdown.Name = Name
								Dropdown.Options = {}
								Dropdown.Callback = Callback or function(...) end
								Dropdown.Value = ""
								Dropdown.Open = false
								Dropdown.Class = "Dropdown"
								Dropdown.Size = 0
								--
								local FeatureDropdown = Instance.new("Frame")
								local DropdownButton = Instance.new("TextButton")
								local DropdownTitle = Instance.new("TextLabel")
								local DropdownArrow = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
								local DropdownOptions = Instance.new("Frame")
								local DropdownListLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
								--
								do --// Dropdown Elements
									FeatureDropdown.Name = "FeatureDropdown"
									FeatureDropdown.Parent = NewFeatureWorkspace
									FeatureDropdown.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(179, 0, 255)
									FeatureDropdown.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
									FeatureDropdown.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									FeatureDropdown.BorderSizePixel = 0
									FeatureDropdown.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.584568381, 0)
									FeatureDropdown.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 30)
									FeatureDropdown.ZIndex = Feature.CurrentZIndex
									--
									Feature.CurrentZIndex -= 1
									--
									DropdownButton.Name = "DropdownButton"
									DropdownButton.Parent = FeatureDropdown
									DropdownButton.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									DropdownButton.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
									DropdownButton.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									DropdownButton.BorderSizePixel = 0
									DropdownButton.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
									DropdownButton.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
									DropdownButton.Text = ""
									DropdownButton.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									DropdownButton.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
									--
									DropdownTitle.Name = "DropdownTitle"
									DropdownTitle.Parent = DropdownButton
									DropdownTitle.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									DropdownTitle.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
									DropdownTitle.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									DropdownTitle.BorderSizePixel = 0
									DropdownTitle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 0)
									DropdownTitle.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 1, 0)
									DropdownTitle.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
									DropdownTitle.Text = Name .. " ● None" --Dropdown ● Selection"
									DropdownTitle.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									DropdownTitle.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
									DropdownTitle.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
									--
									DropdownArrow.Name = "DropdownArrow"
									DropdownArrow.Parent = DropdownTitle
									DropdownArrow.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0.5)
									DropdownArrow.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									DropdownArrow.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
									DropdownArrow.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									DropdownArrow.BorderSizePixel = 0
									DropdownArrow.Position = UDim2.new(1, -25, 0.5, 0)
									DropdownArrow.Size = UDim2.new(0, 13, 0, 13)
									DropdownArrow.Image = "rbxassetid://304689394"
									DropdownArrow.ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(150, 150, 150)
									--
									DropdownOptions.Name = "DropdownOptions"
									DropdownOptions.Parent = DropdownTitle
									DropdownOptions.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.BackgroundColor
									DropdownOptions.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									DropdownOptions.BorderSizePixel = 0
									DropdownOptions.ClipsDescendants = true
									DropdownOptions.BackgroundTransparency = 1
									DropdownOptions.Position = UDim2.new(0, -2, 1, 0)
									DropdownOptions.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 0)
									--
									DropdownListLayout.Name = "DropdownListLayout"
									DropdownListLayout.Parent = DropdownOptions
									DropdownListLayout.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
								end
								--
								do --// Dropdown Functions
									function Dropdown:AddOption(Name)
										local Option = {}
										Option.Name = Name
										Option.IsSelected = false
										local DropdownOption = Instance.new("TextButton")
										Dropdown.Size += 1

										do --// Option Elements
											DropdownOption.Name = "DropdownOption"
											DropdownOption.Parent = DropdownOptions
											DropdownOption.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.BackgroundColor
											DropdownOption.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
											DropdownOption.BorderSizePixel = 0
											DropdownOption.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 20)
											DropdownOption.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
											DropdownOption.Text = Name
											DropdownOption.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(210, 210, 210)
											DropdownOption.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
											DropdownOption.AutoButtonColor = false
											DropdownOption.BackgroundTransparency =
												Framework.Theme.WorkspaceTransparency
										end

										do --// Option Connections
											DropdownOption.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
												Option.IsSelected = true

												Dropdown:Set(Option.Name)
											end)
										end

										Option.Button = DropdownOption
										return Option
									end
									--
									local OriginalSize
									--
									function Dropdown:Open()
										OriginalSize = NewFeatureWorkspace.Size

										local DropdownHeight = 20 * Dropdown.Size
										local DropdownPosition = DropdownOptions.AbsolutePosition
										local WorkspacePosition = NewFeatureWorkspace.AbsolutePosition
										local WorkspaceSize = NewFeatureWorkspace.AbsoluteSize

										local DropdownBottomY = DropdownPosition.Y + DropdownHeight
										local WorkspaceBottomY = WorkspacePosition.Y + WorkspaceSize.Y

										local Overflow = DropdownBottomY - WorkspaceBottomY
										local ShouldResize = Overflow > 0

										Framework.Tween.New(
											DropdownArrow,
											TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{
												Rotation = -90,
											}
										)

										Framework.Tween.New(
											DropdownOptions,
											TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{
												Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, DropdownHeight),
											}
										)

										if ShouldResize then
											Framework.Tween.New(
												NewFeatureWorkspace,
												TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
												{
													Size = OriginalSize + UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, Overflow),
												}
											)
										end

										Feature.ActiveElements[Dropdown.Flag] = Dropdown
										Module.ActiveElements[Dropdown.Flag] = Dropdown
									end
									--
									function Dropdown:Close()
										Framework.Tween.New(
											NewFeatureWorkspace,
											TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{ Size = OriginalSize }
										)
										Framework.Tween.New(
											DropdownArrow,
											TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{ Rotation = 0 }
										)
										Framework.Tween.New(
											DropdownOptions,
											TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{ Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 0) }
										)
										Feature.ActiveElements[Dropdown.Flag] = nil
										Module.ActiveElements[Dropdown.Flag] = nil
									end
									--
									function Dropdown:Set(Name)
										DropdownTitle.Text = Dropdown.Name .. " ● " .. Name
										for Index, Option in Dropdown.Options do
											if Option.Name == Name then
												Framework.Tween.New(
													Option.Button,
													TweenInfo.new(
														0.15,
														Enum.EasingStyle.Linear,
														Enum.EasingDirection.Out
													),
													{ BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.Accent }
												)
												Framework.Tween.New(
													Option.Button,
													TweenInfo.new(
														0.15,
														Enum.EasingStyle.Linear,
														Enum.EasingDirection.Out
													),
													{ TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255) }
												)
											else
												Framework.Tween.New(
													Option.Button,
													TweenInfo.new(
														0.15,
														Enum.EasingStyle.Linear,
														Enum.EasingDirection.Out
													),
													{ BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.BackgroundColor }
												)
												Framework.Tween.New(
													Option.Button,
													TweenInfo.new(
														0.15,
														Enum.EasingStyle.Linear,
														Enum.EasingDirection.Out
													),
													{ TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(210, 210, 210) }
												)
											end
										end
										Dropdown.Value = Name
										task.spawn(function()
											pcall(Dropdown.Callback, Dropdown.Value)
										end)
									end
								end
								--
								do --// Dropdown Connections
									DropdownButton.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
										Dropdown.IsOpen = not Dropdown.IsOpen
										if Dropdown.IsOpen then
											Dropdown:Open()
										else
											Dropdown:Close()
										end
									end)
									--
									for Index, OptionName in Options do
										local Option = Dropdown:AddOption(OptionName)
										Dropdown.Options[#Dropdown.Options + 1] = Option
									end

									Dropdown:Set(Dropdown.Options[1].Name)
								end
								--
								Feature.Size = Feature.Size + 35 --+ (Dropdown.Size*20)
								--
								Framework.Flags[Dropdown.Flag] = Dropdown
								return Dropdown
							end
							--
							function Feature:AddBind(Name, Flag, Mode, Callback)
								local Bind = {}
								Bind.Mode = Mode
								Bind.Flag = Flag
								Bind.Name = Name
								Bind.Value = false
								Bind.Class = "Bind"
								Bind.Key = ""
								Bind.Callback = Callback or function() end
								--
								local IsSettingBind = false
								--
								local FeatureKeybind = Instance.new("TextButton")
								local KeybindTitle = Instance.new("TextLabel")
								local KeybindButton = Instance.new("TextButton")
								local Stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
								--
								do --// Keybind Properties
									FeatureKeybind.Name = "FeatureKeybind"
									FeatureKeybind.Parent = NewFeatureWorkspace
									FeatureKeybind.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									FeatureKeybind.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
									FeatureKeybind.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									FeatureKeybind.BorderSizePixel = 0
									FeatureKeybind.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0.494652569, 0)
									FeatureKeybind.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 34)
									FeatureKeybind.AutoButtonColor = false
									FeatureKeybind.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
									FeatureKeybind.Text = ""
									FeatureKeybind.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									FeatureKeybind.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
									--
									Feature.Size = Feature.Size + 35
									--
									KeybindTitle.Name = "KeybindTitle"
									KeybindTitle.Parent = FeatureKeybind
									KeybindTitle.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0.5)
									KeybindTitle.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									KeybindTitle.BackgroundTransparency = 1.000
									KeybindTitle.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									KeybindTitle.BorderSizePixel = 0
									KeybindTitle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 45, 0.5, 0)
									KeybindTitle.Size = UDim2.new(1, -45, 1, 0)
									KeybindTitle.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
									KeybindTitle.Text = Name
									KeybindTitle.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									KeybindTitle.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
									KeybindTitle.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
									--
									KeybindButton.Parent = FeatureKeybind
									KeybindButton.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0.5)
									KeybindButton.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.KeybindColor
									KeybindButton.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
									KeybindButton.BorderSizePixel = 0
									KeybindButton.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0.5, 0)
									KeybindButton.Size = UDim2.new(0, 24, 0, 24)
									KeybindButton.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
									KeybindButton.Text = "..."
									KeybindButton.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									KeybindButton.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
									KeybindButton.AutoButtonColor = false
									--
									local Corner = Instance.new("UICorner", KeybindButton)
									Corner.CornerRadius = Framework.Theme.ElementCornerRadius
									--
									Stroke.Parent = KeybindButton
									Stroke.ApplyStrokeMode = "Border"
									Stroke.Thickness = 2
									Stroke.Color = Framework.Theme.KeybindOutlineColor
									--
								end
								--
								do --// Keybind Functions
									function Bind:Set(Key)
										if Key == nil or Key == "" then
											KeybindButton.Text = "..."
											Bind.Key = ""
											return
										end
										Bind.Key = Key
										local KeyText = Key.Name
										if Abbreviations[KeyText] then
											KeyText = Abbreviations[KeyText]
										end

										IsSettingBind = false
										Framework.Tween.New(
											KeybindButton,
											TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{ Size = UDim2.new(0, string.len(KeyText) * 10 + 10, 0, 24) }
										)
										Framework.Tween.New(
											KeybindTitle,
											TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{ Position = UDim2.new(0, string.len(KeyText) * 10 + 30, 0.5, 0) }
										)
										Delay(0.05, function()
											KeybindButton.Text = KeyText
										end)
									end
								end
								--
								do --// Keybind Connections
									KeybindButton.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
										if IsSettingBind then
											return
										end

										IsSettingBind = true
										--KeybindButton.Size = UDim2.new(0, 24, 0, 24)
										Framework.Tween.New(
											KeybindButton,
											TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{ Size = UDim2.new(0, string.len("Press a key...") * 10 + 10, 0, 24) }
										)
										Framework.Tween.New(
											KeybindTitle,
											TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{ Position = UDim2.new(0, string.len("Press a key...") * 10 + 30, 0.5, 0) }
										)
										Delay(0.05, function()
											KeybindButton.Text = "Press a key..."
										end)
									end)

									UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(Input)
										if not UserInputService:GetFocusedTextBox() and not IsSettingBind then
											if
												Bind.Key ~= ""
												and Input.KeyCode == Bind.Key
												and Bind.Mode == "Toggle"
											then
												Bind.Value = not Bind.Value
												task.spawn(function()
													pcall(Bind.Callback, Bind.Value)
												end)
											end

											if
												Bind.Key ~= ""
												and Input.KeyCode == Bind.Key
												and Bind.Mode == "Press"
											then
												task.spawn(function()
													pcall(Bind.Callback, Bind.Value)
												end)
											end
										end

										if IsSettingBind then
											if Input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Keyboard then
												local KeyCode = Input.KeyCode
												Bind:Set(Input.KeyCode)
											end
										end
									end)
								end
								Framework.Binds[Bind.Flag] = Bind
								Framework.Flags[Bind.Flag] = Bind
								return Bind
							end
							--
							function Feature:AddColorpicker(Name, Flag, Default, Alpha, Callback)
								local Colorpicker = {}
								do
									Colorpicker.Flag = Flag
									Colorpicker.Name = Name
									Colorpicker.Value = Default or Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
									Colorpicker.Class = "Colorpicker"
									local h, s, v = Color3.toHSV(Colorpicker.Value)
									Colorpicker.Hue = h
									Colorpicker.Saturation = s
									Colorpicker.Brightness = v

									Colorpicker.Alpha = Alpha or 0
									Colorpicker.Callback = Callback or function() end
								end
								--
								local FeatureColorpicker = Instance.new("TextButton")
								do
									FeatureColorpicker.ZIndex = Feature.CurrentZIndex
									Feature.CurrentZIndex -= 1
								end

								local ColorTitle = Instance.new("TextLabel")
								local ColorPreview = Instance.new("TextButton")
								local Stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
								local TransparencyPreview = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
								--
								do --// Default Element Properties
									FeatureColorpicker.Name = "FeatureColorpicker"
									FeatureColorpicker.Parent = NewFeatureWorkspace
									FeatureColorpicker.BackgroundTransparency = 1
									FeatureColorpicker.BorderSizePixel = 0
									FeatureColorpicker.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 0)
									FeatureColorpicker.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 35)
									FeatureColorpicker.AutoButtonColor = false
									FeatureColorpicker.Text = ""
									--
									ColorTitle.Name = "ColorTitle"
									ColorTitle.Parent = FeatureColorpicker
									ColorTitle.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0.5)
									ColorTitle.BackgroundTransparency = 1
									ColorTitle.Position = UDim2.new(0, 45, 0.5, 0)
									ColorTitle.Size = UDim2.new(1, -45, 1, 0)
									ColorTitle.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
									ColorTitle.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
									ColorTitle.Text = Name
									ColorTitle.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									ColorTitle.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
									--
									TransparencyPreview.Parent = FeatureColorpicker
									TransparencyPreview.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0.5)
									TransparencyPreview.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0.5, 0)
									--
									TransparencyPreview.BackgroundTransparency = 0
									TransparencyPreview.BorderSizePixel = 0
									TransparencyPreview.Size = UDim2.new(0, 24, 0, 24)
									TransparencyPreview.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=96978989117558"
									TransparencyPreview.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									--
									TransparencyPreview.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Tile
									TransparencyPreview.TileSize = UDim2.new(2, 0, 2, 0)
									--
									ColorPreview.Parent = FeatureColorpicker
									ColorPreview.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0.5)
									ColorPreview.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0.5, 0)
									ColorPreview.Size = UDim2.new(0, 24, 0, 24)
									ColorPreview.BackgroundColor3 = Colorpicker.Value
									ColorPreview.BackgroundTransparency = Colorpicker.Alpha
									ColorPreview.BorderSizePixel = 0
									ColorPreview.Text = ""
									ColorPreview.AutoButtonColor = false
									--
									local Corner = Instance.new("UICorner", ColorPreview)
									Corner.CornerRadius = Framework.Theme.ElementCornerRadius
									--
									Stroke.Parent = ColorPreview
									Stroke.ApplyStrokeMode = "Border"
									Stroke.Thickness = 2
									Stroke.Color = Framework.Theme.KeybindOutlineColor
								end
								--
								local PickerPopup = Instance.new("Frame")
								do
									PickerPopup.Name = "PickerPopup"
									PickerPopup.Visible = false
									PickerPopup.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 0)
									PickerPopup.ClipsDescendants = true
									PickerPopup.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 40)
									PickerPopup.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.PanelColor
									PickerPopup.BorderSizePixel = 0
									PickerPopup.Parent = FeatureColorpicker
								end
								--
								local SaturationPicker = Instance.new("ImageButton")
								do
									SaturationPicker.Size = UDim2.new(1, -20, 0, 140)
									SaturationPicker.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 10)
									SaturationPicker.Parent = PickerPopup
									SaturationPicker.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									SaturationPicker.Image = "rbxassetid://4155801252"
									SaturationPicker.ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
									SaturationPicker.AutoButtonColor = false
									SaturationPicker.BorderSizePixel = 0
									SaturationPicker.ImageRectOffset = Vector2.new(230, 40)
									SaturationPicker.ImageRectSize = Vector2.new(-230, 200)
								end
								--
								local HueSlider = Instance.new("ImageButton")
								do
									HueSlider.Size = UDim2.new(1, -20, 0, 10)
									HueSlider.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 155)
									HueSlider.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									HueSlider.Parent = PickerPopup
									HueSlider.AutoButtonColor = false
									HueSlider.BorderSizePixel = 0
								end
								--
								local HueGradient = Instance.new("UIGradient", HueSlider)
								do
									HueGradient.Color = ColorSequence.new({
										ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.00, Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)), --// Red
										ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.17, Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0)), --// Yellow
										ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.33, Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0)), --// Green
										ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.50, Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 255)), --// Cyan
										ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.67, Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 255)), --// Blue
										ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.84, Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 255)), --// Magenta
										ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1.00, Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)), --// Red (loop)
									})
									HueGradient.Name = "HueGradient"
									HueGradient.Parent = HueSlider
								end
								--
								local AlphaSlider = Instance.new("ImageButton")
								do
									AlphaSlider.Size = UDim2.new(1, -20, 0, 10)
									AlphaSlider.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 170)
									AlphaSlider.Parent = PickerPopup
									AlphaSlider.Image = "http://www.roblox.com/asset/?id=96978989117558"
									AlphaSlider.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									AlphaSlider.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Crop
									AlphaSlider.AutoButtonColor = false
									AlphaSlider.BorderSizePixel = 0
								end
								--
								local AlphaGradient = Instance.new("UIGradient")
								do
									AlphaGradient.Color = ColorSequence.new({
										ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.00, Colorpicker.Value),
										ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1.00, Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)),
									})
									AlphaGradient.Parent = AlphaSlider
								end
								--
								local SaturationIndicator = Instance.new("Frame")
								do
									SaturationIndicator.Size = UDim2.new(0, 6, 0, 6)
									SaturationIndicator.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
									SaturationIndicator.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									SaturationIndicator.BorderColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
									SaturationIndicator.BorderSizePixel = 1
									SaturationIndicator.BackgroundTransparency = 0
									SaturationIndicator.Parent = SaturationPicker
									Instance.new("UIStroke", SaturationIndicator)
									Instance.new("UICorner", SaturationIndicator).CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
								end
								--
								local function CreateTriangle()
									local triangle = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
									triangle.Size = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 10)
									triangle.BackgroundTransparency = 1
									triangle.Image = "rbxassetid://13069495837"
									--triangle.ResampleMode = "Pixelated"
									triangle.ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)

									local TriangleInner = triangle:Clone()
									TriangleInner.ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
									TriangleInner.Parent = triangle
									TriangleInner.Position = UDim2.new(0, 2, 0, 2)
									TriangleInner.Size = UDim2.new(1, -4, 1, -4)
									return triangle
								end

								local function CreateSliderIndicator(parent)
									local container = Instance.new("Frame")
									container.Size = UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0)
									container.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0)
									container.BackgroundTransparency = 1
									container.Parent = parent

									local Top = CreateTriangle()
									Top.Position = UDim2.new(0, -5, 0, -5)
									Top.Rotation = 180
									Top.Parent = container

									local Bottom = CreateTriangle()
									Bottom.Position = UDim2.new(0, -5, 1, -5)
									Bottom.Rotation = 0
									Bottom.Parent = container
									return container
								end

								local HueIndicator = CreateSliderIndicator(HueSlider)
								local AlphaIndicator = CreateSliderIndicator(AlphaSlider)

								--
								function Colorpicker:Set(Color, AlphaValue)
									local h, s, v = Color3.toHSV(Color)

									if s > 0 then
										Colorpicker.Hue = h
									end

									Colorpicker.Saturation = s
									Colorpicker.Brightness = v
									Colorpicker.Alpha = AlphaValue

									Colorpicker.Value = Color

									ColorPreview.BackgroundColor3 = Color
									ColorPreview.BackgroundTransparency = AlphaValue

									AlphaGradient.Color = ColorSequence.new({
										ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.00, Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)),
										ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1.00, Color),
									})

									SaturationIndicator.Position = UDim2.new(s, 0, 1 - v, 0)
									HueIndicator.Position = UDim2.new(Colorpicker.Hue, 0, 0, 0)
									AlphaIndicator.Position = UDim2.new(1 - (AlphaValue or 0), 0, 0, 0)
									SaturationPicker.ImageColor3 = Color3.fromHSV(Colorpicker.Hue, 1, 1)

									task.spawn(function()
										pcall(Colorpicker.Callback, Colorpicker.Value, Colorpicker.Alpha)
									end)
								end
								--
								local function UpdateSaturationBrightness(input)
									local x = (input.Position.X - SaturationPicker.AbsolutePosition.X)
										/ SaturationPicker.AbsoluteSize.X
									local y = (input.Position.Y - SaturationPicker.AbsolutePosition.Y)
										/ SaturationPicker.AbsoluteSize.Y

									local s = math.clamp(x, 0, 1)
									local v = math.clamp(1 - y, 0, 1)

									SaturationIndicator.Position = UDim2.new(s, 0, 1 - v, 0)

									Colorpicker.Saturation = s
									Colorpicker.Brightness = v

									local h = Colorpicker.Hue or 0

									local newColor = Color3.fromHSV(h, s, v)
									Colorpicker:Set(newColor, Colorpicker.Alpha)
								end
								--
								local function UpdateHue(input)
									local x = math.clamp(
										(input.Position.X - HueSlider.AbsolutePosition.X) / HueSlider.AbsoluteSize.X,
										0,
										1
									)
									Colorpicker.Hue = x
									local sat, val = Colorpicker.Saturation or 1, Colorpicker.Brightness or 1
									SaturationPicker.ImageColor3 = Color3.fromHSV(Colorpicker.Hue, 1, 1)
									HueIndicator.Position = UDim2.new(x, 0, 0, 0)
									Colorpicker:Set(Color3.fromHSV(x, sat, val), Colorpicker.Alpha)
								end
								--
								local function UpdateAlpha(input)
									local x = math.clamp(
										(input.Position.X - AlphaSlider.AbsolutePosition.X) / AlphaSlider.AbsoluteSize.X,
										0,
										1
									)
									AlphaIndicator.Position = UDim2.new(x, 0, 0, 0)
									Colorpicker:Set(Colorpicker.Value, 1 - x)
								end
								--
								local function ConnectDrag(button, UpdateFunction)
									local Connection
									local MouseLeaveConnection
									button.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
										if
											input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
											and not Colorpicker.InDrag
										then
											Colorpicker.InDrag = true
											UpdateFunction(input)
											Connection = UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(UpdateFunction)
										end
									end)
									--
									UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
										if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
											if Connection then
												Colorpicker.InDrag = false
												Connection:Disconnect()
												Connection = nil
											end
										end
									end)
									--
									--[[MouseLeaveConnection = button.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
                                        if Connection then
                                            Connection:Disconnect()
                                            Connection = nil
                                        end
                                    end)]]
								end
								--
								local OriginalSize
								--
								function Colorpicker:Open()
									if PickerPopup.Visible then
										return
									end

									OriginalSize = NewFeatureWorkspace.Size
									PickerPopup.Visible = true

									local PopupPosition = PickerPopup.AbsolutePosition
									local WorkspacePositionition = NewFeatureWorkspace.AbsolutePosition
									local WorkspaceSize = NewFeatureWorkspace.AbsoluteSize

									local TargetHeight = 190
									local PopupBottomY = PopupPosition.Y + TargetHeight
									local WorkspaceBottomY = WorkspacePositionition.Y + WorkspaceSize.Y

									local Overflow = PopupBottomY - WorkspaceBottomY
									local ShouldResize = Overflow > 0

									Framework.Tween.New(PickerPopup, TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear), {
										Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, TargetHeight),
									})

									if ShouldResize then
										Framework.Tween.New(
											NewFeatureWorkspace,
											TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear),
											{
												Size = OriginalSize + UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, Overflow),
											}
										)
									end
									Feature.ActiveElements[Colorpicker.Flag] = Colorpicker
									Module.ActiveElements[Colorpicker.Flag] = Colorpicker
								end
								--
								function Colorpicker:Close()
									if not PickerPopup.Visible then
										return
									end

									Framework.Tween.New(
										PickerPopup,
										TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear),
										{ Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 0) }
									)
									Framework.Tween.New(
										NewFeatureWorkspace,
										TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear),
										{ Size = OriginalSize }
									)
									Feature.ActiveElements[Colorpicker.Flag] = nil
									Module.ActiveElements[Colorpicker.Flag] = nil
									Delay(0.15, function()
										PickerPopup.Visible = false
									end)
								end
								--
								ConnectDrag(SaturationPicker, UpdateSaturationBrightness)
								ConnectDrag(HueSlider, UpdateHue)
								ConnectDrag(AlphaSlider, UpdateAlpha)
								--
								ColorPreview.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
									if PickerPopup.Visible then
										Colorpicker:Close()
									else
										Colorpicker:Open()
									end
								end)
								--
								Colorpicker:Set(Colorpicker.Value, Colorpicker.Alpha)
								Framework.Flags[Colorpicker.Flag] = Colorpicker
								Feature.Size = Feature.Size + 40
								return Colorpicker
							end
							--
							function Feature:AddButton(Name, Callback)
								local ButtonTable = {
									Name = Name,
									Callback = Callback,
								}

								local ButtonOutline = Instance.new("Frame")
								local ButtonOutlineCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
								local Button = Instance.new("TextButton")
								local ButtonCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
								Feature.Size = Feature.Size + 25
								--
								local NewButton = Instance.new("Frame", NewFeatureWorkspace)
								NewButton.BackgroundTransparency = 1
								NewButton.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 22)
								--
								ButtonOutline.Name = "ButtonOutline"
								ButtonOutline.Parent = NewButton
								ButtonOutline.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.BindOutlineColor
								ButtonOutline.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
								ButtonOutline.BorderSizePixel = 0
								ButtonOutline.Position = UDim2.new(0, 5, 0, 0)
								ButtonOutline.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 20)
								ButtonOutline.BackgroundTransparency = 0
								--
								ButtonOutlineCorner.CornerRadius = Framework.Theme.ElementCornerRadius
								ButtonOutlineCorner.Name = "ButtonOutlineCorner"
								ButtonOutlineCorner.Parent = ButtonOutline
								--
								Button.Name = "Button"
								Button.Parent = ButtonOutline
								Button.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.BindColor
								Button.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
								Button.BorderSizePixel = 0
								Button.Position = UDim2.new(0, 1, 0, 1)
								Button.Size = UDim2.new(1, -2, 1, -2)
								Button.AutoButtonColor = false
								Button.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
								Button.Text = Name
								Button.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
								Button.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
								Button.BackgroundTransparency = 0.1
								--
								ButtonCorner.CornerRadius = Framework.Theme.ElementCornerRadius
								ButtonCorner.Name = "ButtonCorner"
								ButtonCorner.Parent = BindButton
								ButtonTable.Button = Button
								Button.MouseButton1Down:Connect(Callback)
								return ButtonTable
							end

							function Feature:AddTextbox(Name, Flag, Callback)
								local Textbox = {
									Value = "",
									Flag = Flag,
									Name = Name,
									Callback = Callback,
									Class = "Textbox",
								}

								local ButtonOutline = Instance.new("Frame")
								local ButtonOutlineCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
								local Button = Instance.new("TextBox")
								local ButtonCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
								Feature.Size = Feature.Size + 25

								local NewButton = Instance.new("Frame", NewFeatureWorkspace)
								NewButton.BackgroundTransparency = 1
								NewButton.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 22)
								--
								ButtonOutline.Name = "ButtonOutline"
								ButtonOutline.Parent = NewButton
								ButtonOutline.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.BindOutlineColor
								ButtonOutline.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
								ButtonOutline.BorderSizePixel = 0
								ButtonOutline.Position = UDim2.new(0, 5, 0, 0)
								ButtonOutline.Size = UDim2.new(1, -10, 0, 20)
								ButtonOutline.BackgroundTransparency = 0
								--
								ButtonOutlineCorner.CornerRadius = Framework.Theme.ElementCornerRadius
								ButtonOutlineCorner.Name = "ButtonOutlineCorner"
								ButtonOutlineCorner.Parent = ButtonOutline
								--
								Button.Name = "Button"
								Button.Parent = ButtonOutline
								Button.BackgroundColor3 = Framework.Theme.BindColor
								Button.BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
								Button.BorderSizePixel = 0
								Button.Position = UDim2.new(0, 1, 0, 1)
								Button.Size = UDim2.new(1, -2, 1, -2)
								Button.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
								Button.Text = Name
								Button.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
								Button.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
								Button.BackgroundTransparency = 0.1
								--
								ButtonCorner.CornerRadius = Framework.Theme.ElementCornerRadius
								ButtonCorner.Name = "ButtonCorner"
								ButtonCorner.Parent = BindButton
								Textbox.Button = Button

								function Textbox:Set(Text, IsConfig)
									if IsConfig then
										return
									end
									Button.Text = Text
									Textbox.Value = Text
									if Callback then
										task.spawn(function()
											pcall(Textbox.Callback, Textbox.Value)
										end)
									end
								end

								Button.FocusLost:Connect(function()
									Textbox:Set(Button.Text)
								end)

								Framework.Flags[Textbox.Flag] = Textbox
							end
						end
						--
						do --// Feature Connections
							function Feature:Close() --// this is just used for closing features when module is closed
								Feature.IsOpen = false
								for i, Element in Feature.ActiveElements do
									Element:Close()
								end
								Framework.Tween.New(
									FeatureArrow,
									TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
									{ Rotation = 0 }
								)
								Framework.Tween.New(
									NewFeatureWorkspace,
									TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
									{ Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 0) }
								)
							end

							FeatureButton.MouseButton2Down:Connect(function()
								Feature.IsOpen = not Feature.IsOpen
								if Feature.IsOpen then
									Module.ActiveElements[Feature.Flag] = Feature
									Framework.Tween.New(
										FeatureArrow,
										TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
										{ Rotation = -90 }
									)
									Framework.Tween.New(
										NewFeatureWorkspace,
										TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
										{ Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, Feature.Size) }
									)
								else
									for i, Element in Feature.ActiveElements do
										Element:Close()
									end
									Framework.Tween.New(
										FeatureArrow,
										TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
										{ Rotation = 0 }
									)
									Framework.Tween.New(
										NewFeatureWorkspace,
										TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
										{ Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 0) }
									)
								end
							end)
							--
							FeatureButton.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
								Feature:Set(not Feature.Value)
								--task.spawn(function()pcall(Feature.Callback, Feature.Value)end);
							end)
							--
							BindButton.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
								if Feature.IsSettingBind then
									return
								end
								BindButton.Text = "Press any key..."
								Feature.IsSettingBind = true
							end)
							--
							UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(Input)
								if not UserInputService:GetFocusedTextBox() and not Feature.IsSettingBind then
									if Input.KeyCode == Feature.Key then
										Feature:Set(not Feature.Value)
										task.spawn(function()
											if not Framework.LoadingConfig and Framework.Flags.NotifyBinds.Value then
												task.wait()
												Framework.Notify(
													Feature.Name,
													"Set value to: " .. tostring(Feature.Value),
													2
												)
											end
										end)
									end
								end

								if Feature.IsSettingBind then
									if Input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Keyboard then
										local KeyCode = Input.KeyCode
										Feature:SetKey(Input.KeyCode)
									end
								end
							end)
							--
							FeatureButton.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
								FeatureTooltip.Position = UDim2.new(
									0,
									NewFeature.AbsolutePosition.X + 280,
									0,
									NewFeature.AbsolutePosition.Y + 55
								)
								Framework.Tween.New(
									TooltipText,
									TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
									{ TextTransparency = 0 }
								)
								Framework.Tween.New(
									TooltipArrow,
									TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
									{ ImageTransparency = Framework.Theme.WorkspaceTransparency }
								)
								Framework.Tween.New(
									FeatureTooltip,
									TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
									{ BackgroundTransparency = Framework.Theme.WorkspaceTransparency }
								)
							end)
							--
							FeatureButton.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
								--FeatureTooltip.Position = UDim2.new(0, NewFeature.AbsolutePosition.X + 200, 0, NewFeature.AbsolutePosition.Y)
								Framework.Tween.New(
									TooltipText,
									TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
									{ TextTransparency = 1 }
								)
								Framework.Tween.New(
									TooltipArrow,
									TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
									{ ImageTransparency = 1 }
								)
								Framework.Tween.New(
									FeatureTooltip,
									TweenInfo.new(0.15, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
									{ BackgroundTransparency = 1 }
								)
							end)
						end
						--
						Framework.Flags[Feature.Flag] = Feature
						return Feature
					end
				end
				--
				ModuleSpacing = ModuleSpacing + 275
				--
				Framework.Modules[Name] = Module
				return Module
			end)
			--
			UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(input)
				if not UserInputService:GetFocusedTextBox() and input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.RightShift then
					Interface.Enabled = not Interface.Enabled
				end
			end))
		end

			--// Moderator Entry Creation
			function Framework.ModeratorPanel:New(ActualTarget, Name, Role)
				local Moderator = {
					Name = Name,
					Role = Role,
					Label = nil,
					Player = ActualTarget,
				}

				local NameColor = "#FFFFFF"
				local RoleColor = "#2291a0"

				local NewModerator = Instance.new("TextLabel")
				NewModerator.Name = Name
				NewModerator.Parent = ModeratorsWorkspace
				NewModerator.BackgroundTransparency = 1
				NewModerator.Size = UDim2.new(1, -40, 0, 20)
				NewModerator.BorderSizePixel = 0
				NewModerator.FontFace = Framework.Theme.ModuleFont
				NewModerator.RichText = true
				NewModerator.Text = string.format(
					'<font color="%s">%s</font>   <font color="%s">%s</font>',
					RoleColor,
					Role,
					NameColor,
					Name
				)
				NewModerator.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
				NewModerator.TextSize = Framework.Theme.SecondaryFontSize
				NewModerator.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left

				Framework.ModeratorPanel.List[ActualTarget] = Moderator
				return Moderator
			end

						BulletTracers:AddSlider("Lifetime", "TracerLifetime", { Min = 0.3, Max = 3, Decimals = 3 })
					end
					--
					local Grass = RenderModule.CreateFeature(
						false,
						"Remove grass",
						"RemoveGrass",
						"Removes terrain grass",
						function()
							sethiddenproperty(
								Framework.GetService("Workspace").Terrain,
								"Decoration",
								not Framework.Flags.RemoveGrass.Value
							)

					)

					end
					--
					local XRay = RenderModule.CreateFeature(
						false,
						"XRay",
						"XRay",
						"Lets you see through bases",
						function()
							for Index, Part in next, Framework.XRayParts do
								if Framework.Flags.XRay.Value then
									Part.Transparency = Framework.Flags.XRayTransparency.Value
								else
									Part.Transparency = 0
								end
							end
						end
					)
					do
						XRay:AddSlider("Transparency", "XRayTransparency", { Min = 0, Max = 1, Decimals = 2 })
					end
					--
					local FreeCam = RenderModule.CreateFeature(false, "Free camera", "DebugCamera")
					do
						FreeCam:AddToggle("BTR Fly", "BTRFly")
						FreeCam:AddSlider("Speed", "DebugCameraSpeed", { Min = 1, Max = 100 })
					end
					--
					local ThirdPerson = RenderModule.CreateFeature(
						false,
						"Third person",
						"ThirdPerson",
						"Enables the use of third person",
						function()
							local Viewmodel = Workspace.VFX.VMs:GetChildren()[1]
							if Viewmodel then
								if Framework.Flags.ThirdPerson and Framework.Flags.ThirdPerson.Value then
									for Index, Part in Viewmodel:GetDescendants() do
										if Part:IsA("Part") or Part:IsA("MeshPart") then
											if Part.Transparency ~= 1 then
												Part:SetAttribute("OriginalTransparency", Part.Transparency)
											end
											Part.Transparency = 1
										end
									end
								else
									for Index, Part in Viewmodel:GetDescendants() do
										if Part:IsA("Part") or Part:IsA("MeshPart") then
											if Part:GetAttribute("OriginalTransparency") then
												Part.Transparency = Part:GetAttribute("OriginalTransparency")
											end
										end
									end
								end
							end
						end
					)
					do
						ThirdPerson:AddSlider("Distance", "ThirdPersonDistance", { Min = 0, Max = 1.7, Decimals = 3 })
					end
					local FOV = RenderModule.CreateFeature(false, "Change Field Of View", "FOVChanger")
					do
						FOV:AddSlider("Field of view", "CameraFOV", { Default = 100, Min = 60, Max = 120 })
					end
					local Zoom = RenderModule.CreateFeature(false, "Zoom", "Zoom")
					do
						Zoom:AddBind("Key", "ZoomKey", "Hold")
						Zoom:AddSlider("Field of view", "ZoomFOV", { Default = 10, Max = 60, Min = 0 })
					end
					--
					local Skyboxes = RenderModule.CreateFeature(true, "Skyboxes", "Skyboxes")
					do
						local Options = {}
						for Index, Value in Framework.Skyboxes do
							Options[#Options + 1] = Index
						end
						--
						local Dropdown = Skyboxes:AddDropdown("Sky", "Sky", Options, function(Name)
							Framework.Sky:SwitchSkybox(Name)
						end)
						Dropdown:Set("Default Sky")
					end

					local Config = Settings.CreateFeature(true, "Configuration", "Configuration_IGNORE")
					do
						local HttpService = Framework.GetService("HttpService")
						local ConfigsFolder = Framework.Configs
						--
						local function GetConfig()
							local ReturnTable = {}
							local Flags = Framework.Flags
							for FlagName, FlagData in Flags do
								local Class = FlagData.Class
								if
									Class == "Toggle"
									or Class == "Slider"
									or Class == "Textbox"
									or Class == "Dropdown"
								then
									ReturnTable[FlagName] = FlagData.Value
								end
								--
								if Class == "Feature" then
									if FlagData.Key and typeof(FlagData.Key) == "EnumItem" then
										ReturnTable[FlagName] = {
											Key = FlagData.Key.Name,
											Value = FlagData.Value,
										}
									else
										ReturnTable[FlagName] = {
											Key = FlagData.Key,
											Value = FlagData.Value,
										}
									end
								end
								--
								if Class == "Colorpicker" then
									local Color = FlagData.Value
									local Alpha = FlagData.Alpha
									ReturnTable[FlagName] = { Color = { Color.R, Color.G, Color.B }, Alpha = Alpha }
								end
								--
								if Class == "Bind" then
									if FlagData.Key then
										ReturnTable[FlagName] = FlagData.Key.Name
									else
										ReturnTable[FlagName] = nil
									end
								end
							end
							return ReturnTable
						end
						--
						local function PrettyPrintJSON(data, indent)
							indent = indent or 0
							local spacing = string.rep("  ", indent)
							local json = ""

							if typeof(data) == "table" then
								local isArray = #data > 0
								json = json .. (isArray and "[\n" or "{\n")
								local count = 0
								for k, v in pairs(data) do
									count += 1
									json = json .. string.rep("  ", indent + 1)
									if not isArray then
										json = json .. '"' .. tostring(k) .. '": '
									end
									if typeof(v) == "table" then
										json = json .. PrettyPrintJSON(v, indent + 1)
									elseif typeof(v) == "string" then
										json = json .. '"' .. v .. '"'
									else
										json = json .. tostring(v)
									end
									if count < (isArray and #data or table.getn(data)) then
										json = json .. ","
									end
									json = json .. "\n"
								end
								json = json .. spacing .. (isArray and "]" or "}")
							else
								json = json .. tostring(data)
							end

							return json
						end
						--
						Framework.GetConfig = GetConfig
						Config:AddTextbox("Configuration Name", "ConfigurationName", function(Text) end)
						--
						Config:AddButton("Load config", function()
							local ConfigName = Framework.Flags.ConfigurationName.Value

							if isfile(ConfigsFolder .. "/" .. Framework.Flags.ConfigurationName.Value, Config) then
								Framework.Notify(
									"Configuration status",
									"Loading config: " .. Framework.Flags.ConfigurationName.Value,
									10

											Config
										)

									local RealFlag = Framework.Flags[FlagName]
									if not RealFlag then
										continue
									end
									--
									local Class = RealFlag.Class
									--
									if
										Class == "Toggle"
										or Class == "Slider"
										or Class == "Textbox"
										or Class == "Dropdown"
									then
										RealFlag:Set(FlagData)
									end
									--
									if Class == "Colorpicker" then
										local ColorTable = FlagData.Color
										local Color = Color3.new(ColorTable[1], ColorTable[2], ColorTable[3])
										local Alpha = FlagData.Alpha
										--
										RealFlag:Set(Color, Alpha)
									end
									--
									if Class == "Bind" then
										local Key = FlagData
										if Key ~= nil and Key ~= "" then
											RealFlag:Set(Enum.KeyCode[Key])
										else
											RealFlag:Set()
										end
									end
									--
									if Class == "Feature" then
										local Key = FlagData.Key
										local Value = FlagData.Value
										RealFlag:Set(Value)
										if Key ~= nil and Key ~= "" then
											RealFlag:SetKey(Enum.KeyCode[Key])
										else
											RealFlag:SetKey()
										end
									end
								end
								--
								Framework.Notify(
									"Configuration status",
									"Loaded config: " .. Framework.Flags.ConfigurationName.Value .. "!",
									10
								)
								task.delay(0.3, function()
									Framework.LoadingConfig = false
								end)
							end
						end)

								"Configuration Status",

	--
	do --// Loops
		local RunService = Framework.GetService("RunService")
		Framework.Step = 0
		--
		Framework.Loops.RenderStepped = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Delta)
			Framework.Step += 1
			Framework.Delta = Delta
			Framework.FPS = 1 / Delta

			Framework.CanRender = false
			Framework.CanRender2 = false

			local Streamproof = Framework.Flags.Streamproof and Framework.Flags.Streamproof.Value

			if Streamproof then
				local Time = tick()
				local CycleTime = 1 / 29.97

				local FrameTime = Framework.Delta

				local MinWindow = 0.004
				local MaxWindow = 0.007

				local WindowDuration = math.clamp(FrameTime * 0.20, MinWindow, MaxWindow) + 0.005

				if Framework.FPS <= 60 then
					WindowDuration = 0.003
				end

				local TimeInCycle = Time % CycleTime
				local CanRenderNow = TimeInCycle < WindowDuration

				Framework.CanRender = CanRenderNow
				Framework.CanRender2 = CanRenderNow
			else
				Framework.CanRender = true
				Framework.CanRender2 = true
			end

			for Index, Thread in Framework.Threads.Input do
				local Error = Thread:Run()
			end
			--
			for Index, Thread in Framework.Threads.Entities do
				local Error = Thread:Run()
			end
			--
			for Index, Thread in Framework.Threads.Character do
				local Error = Thread:Run()
			end
			--
			for Index, Thread in Framework.Threads.Render do
				local Error = Thread:Run()
			end
		end))
	end

	do --// Hooks
		local GunmodsSuccess, Error = pcall(function()
			LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function() --// Gunmods bypass
				for Index, Function in pairs(getgc(false)) do
					if type(Function) == "function" and islclosure(Function) then
						local Source = getfenv(Function).script

						if Source and Source.Name == "VectorUtil" then
							local Constants = getconstants(Function)

							if Constants[8] == "Sky" and Constants[2] == "random" and Constants[12] == "assert" then
								hookfunction(Function, function(...)
									return
								end)
							end

							if Constants[3] == "kv" then
								hookfunction(Function, function(...)
									return coroutine.yield()
								end)
							end
						end
					end
				end
			end)()
			DebugPrint("bypass 1")
		end)

		if not GunmodsSuccess and Error then
			DebugPrint("failed to load bypass 1")
			return cloneref(game:GetService("Players")).LocalPlayer:Kick("malformed data, please open a ticket")

		--
		local HooksSuccess, Error2 = pcall(function()
			LPH_JIT_MAX(function()
				DebugPrint("beginning hooks")
				local ReplicatedStorage = Framework.GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
				local Players = Framework.GetService("Players")
				local Client = Players.LocalPlayer
				local Workspace = Framework.GetService("Workspace")
				local Camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera
				local RunService = Framework.GetService("RunService")

				if
					ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Modules") and ReplicatedStorage.Modules:FindFirstChild("Items")
				then
					local GameModules = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Modules")
					--// modules
					local VectorUtil = require(GameModules.VectorUtil)
					local VFXModule = require(GameModules.VFXModule)
					local ToolInfo = require(GameModules:FindFirstChild("ToolInfo"))
					local RaycastUtil = require(GameModules:FindFirstChild("RaycastUtil"))
					local Settings = GameModules:FindFirstChild("SettingsModule")
						and require(GameModules:FindFirstChild("SettingsModule"))
					local SoundModule = require(GameModules.SoundModule)

					function unchar(str)
						local result = ""
						for i = 1, #str do
							result = result .. string.byte(str, i) .. ", "
						end
						return result
					end
					--
					do --// sound module
						local ToggleFootstep
						ToggleFootstep = hookfunction(
							SoundModule.ToggleFootstep,
							LPH_NO_UPVALUES(function(...)
								local Arguments = { ... }
								--
								if Framework.Flags.SilentStep.Value and Arguments[3] then
									return SoundModule:StopSound(Arguments[3])
								end
								--
								return ToggleFootstep(...)
							end)
						)
						--
						local PlaySound
						PlaySound = hookfunction(
							SoundModule.PlaySound,
							LPH_NO_UPVALUES(function(...)
								local Arguments = { ... }
								--
								if
									Framework.Flags.SilentStep.Value
									and Arguments[2]
									and Arguments[2].Name == "WalkWater"
								then
									return SoundStable:StopSound(Arguments[2])
								end
								--
								return PlaySound(...)
							end)
						)
					end
					--
					do --// Settings
						if Settings then
							local Old
							Old = hookfunction(
								Settings.GetSetting,
								LPH_NO_UPVALUES(function(...)
									local Arguments = { ... }
									local Category = Arguments[1]
									local Setting = Arguments[2]
									if Setting == "Field Of View" then
										if Framework.Flags.ZoomKey.Value and Framework.Flags.Zoom.Value then
											return Framework.Flags.ZoomFOV.Value
										end
										if Framework.Flags.FOVChanger.Value then
											return Framework.Flags.CameraFOV.Value
										end
									end
									return Old(unpack(Arguments))
								end)
							)
						end
						DebugPrint("hooked settings")
					end
					--
					do --// Raycast util
						local OldRaycast
						OldRaycast = hookfunction(
							RaycastUtil.Raycast,
							LPH_NO_UPVALUES(function(self, ...)
								local Arguments = { ... }
								--[[
                                Arguments = { 
                                    Origin,
                                    Direction,
                                    FilterType,
                                    IgnoreList,
                                    DebugRay,
                                    FilterFunction,
                                    IgnoreWater,
                                    Depth
                                }
                            ]]
								if
									not checkcaller()
									and debug.traceback()
									and debug.traceback():find("ViewmodelController")
								then
									if Framework.Flags.Reach.Value and not Framework.Respawning then
										Arguments[2] = Arguments[2] * 10
									end
								end
								--
								if
									not checkcaller()
									and Framework.Flags.PerfectFarming.Value
									and not Framework.Respawning
								then
									local Output = { OldRaycast(self, ...) }
									local HitInstance = Output[1]
									local HitPosition = Output[2]

									if not HitInstance or typeof(HitInstance) ~= "Instance" then
										return unpack(Output)
									end

									if not HitPosition or typeof(HitPosition) ~= "Vector3" then
										return unpack(Output)
									end

									local Model = HitInstance.Parent

									if not Model or (not Model:IsA("Model")) then
										return unpack(Output)
									end

									local Folder = Model.Parent

									if
										Folder
										and (Folder.Name == "Trees" or Folder.Name == "Nodes")
										and Folder:IsA("Folder")
									then
										local CriticalPart = Model:FindFirstChild("NodeSpark")
											or Model:FindFirstChild("TreeX")
										if
											CriticalPart
											and typeof(CriticalPart) == "Instance"
											and CriticalPart:IsA("Model")
											and CriticalPart.PrimaryPart
										then
											Output[1] = CriticalPart.PrimaryPart
											return unpack(Output)
										end
									end
								end
								return OldRaycast(self, unpack(Arguments))
							end)
						)
						DebugPrint("hooked raycasting")
					end
					--
					do --// VFX
						local function CreateHitEffect(HitPosition)
							local HitColor = ColorSequence.new({
								ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0, Framework.Flags.HitEffectColor1.Value),
								ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1, Framework.Flags.HitEffectColor2.Value),
							})
							if Framework.Flags.HitEffect.Value == "Spark" then
								local Model = Instance.new("Model", Workspace)
								local Part0 = Instance.new("Part")
								Part0.Size = Vector3.new(0.2, 0.2, 0.2)
								Part0.Position = HitPosition
								Part0.Anchored = true
								Part0.CanCollide = false
								Part0.Transparency = 1
								Part0.Parent = Model
								Part0.CanQuery = false
								--
								local Emitter = Instance.new("ParticleEmitter")
								Emitter.Parent = Part0
								--
								Emitter.Texture = "rbxassetid://10198439352"
								Emitter.Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.3, 0.5)
								Emitter.Rate = 0
								Emitter.Speed = NumberRange.new(0, 0)
								Emitter.RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(0, 0)
								Emitter.Brightness = 5
								Emitter.Size = NumberSequence.new({
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 8),
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 8),
								})
								Emitter.Color = HitColor
								Emitter.LightEmission = 540
								Emitter.VelocitySpread = 0
								Emitter.Enabled = true
								Emitter.EmissionDirection = "Top"
								Emitter.FlipbookLayout = "Grid4x4"
								Emitter.FlipbookMode = "OneShot"
								Emitter.Shape = "Box"
								Emitter.ShapeInOut = "Outward"
								Emitter.ShapeStyle = "Volume"
								--
								Emitter.Transparency = NumberSequence.new({
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 0.6),
								})
								--
								Emitter:Emit(1)
								--
								Delay(2, function()
									Part0:Destroy()
									Model:Destroy()
								end)
							end
							--
							if Framework.Flags.HitEffect.Value == "SmokeRing" then
								local Model = Instance.new("Model", Workspace)
								local Part0 = Instance.new("Part")
								Part0.Size = Vector3.new(0.2, 0.2, 0.2)
								Part0.Position = HitPosition
								Part0.Anchored = true
								Part0.CanCollide = false
								Part0.Transparency = 1
								Part0.Parent = Model
								Part0.CanQuery = false
								--
								local Emitter = Instance.new("ParticleEmitter")
								Emitter.Parent = Part0
								--
								Emitter.Texture = "rbxassetid://12906276200"
								Emitter.Lifetime = NumberRange.new(1, 1)
								Emitter.Rotation = NumberRange.new(-1000, 1000)
								Emitter.SpreadAngle = Vector2.new(-1000, 1000)
								Emitter.Rate = 0
								Emitter.Speed = NumberRange.new(0, 0)
								Emitter.RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(0, 0)
								Emitter.Brightness = 5
								Emitter.Size = NumberSequence.new({
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 4),
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 4),
								})
								--
								Emitter.Transparency = NumberSequence.new({
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1),
								})
								--
								Emitter.Color = HitColor
								Emitter.LightEmission = 0
								Emitter.VelocitySpread = 0
								Emitter.Enabled = true
								Emitter.EmissionDirection = "Top"
								Emitter.FlipbookLayout = "Grid4x4"
								Emitter.FlipbookMode = "OneShot"
								Emitter.Shape = "Box"
								Emitter.ShapeInOut = "Outward"
								Emitter.ShapeStyle = "Volume"
								Emitter.Transparency = NumberSequence.new({
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1),
								})
								--
								Emitter:Emit(1)
								--
								Delay(2, function()
									Part0:Destroy()
									Model:Destroy()
								end)
							end
							--
							if Framework.Flags.HitEffect.Value == "particles.js" then
								local Model = Instance.new("Model", Workspace)
								local Part0 = Instance.new("Part")
								Part0.Size = Vector3.new(0.2, 0.2, 0.2)
								Part0.Position = HitPosition
								Part0.Anchored = true
								Part0.CanCollide = false
								Part0.Transparency = 1
								Part0.Parent = Model
								Part0.CanQuery = false
								--
								local Emitter = Instance.new("ParticleEmitter")
								Emitter.Parent = Part0
								--
								Emitter.Texture = "rbxassetid://14354336687"
								Emitter.Lifetime = NumberRange.new(1, 1)
								Emitter.Rotation = NumberRange.new(-1000, 1000)
								Emitter.SpreadAngle = Vector2.new(-1000, 1000)
								Emitter.Rate = 0
								Emitter.Color = HitColor
								Emitter.Speed = NumberRange.new(0, 0)
								Emitter.RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(-10, 10)
								Emitter.Brightness = 3.87
								Emitter.Size = NumberSequence.new({
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 3),
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 3),
								})
								--
								Emitter.Transparency = NumberSequence.new({
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1),
								})
								Emitter.LightEmission = -2
								Emitter.VelocitySpread = 0
								Emitter.Enabled = true
								Emitter.EmissionDirection = "Top"
								Emitter.FlipbookLayout = "Grid4x4"
								Emitter.FlipbookMode = "OneShot"
								Emitter.Shape = "Box"
								Emitter.ShapeInOut = "Outward"
								Emitter.ShapeStyle = "Volume"
								Emitter.Transparency = NumberSequence.new({
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
									NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1),
								})
								--
								Emitter:Emit(6)
								--
								Delay(2, function()
									Part0:Destroy()
									Model:Destroy()
								end)
							end
						end

						local EffectEvent = Instance.new("BindableEvent", Workspace)
						EffectEvent.Event:Connect(function(Position)
							CreateHitEffect(Position)
						end)
						Framework.EffectEvent = EffectEvent

						local HitVFX = VFXModule.HitVFX
						local CameraDistance = VFXModule.CheckCameraDistance

						do --// Hit Effects
							local CreateBlood
							CreateBlood = hookfunction(
								VFXModule.CreateBlood,
								LPH_NO_UPVALUES(function(...)
									local Arguments = { ... }

									if
										Framework.Flags.CustomHitEffects.Value and Framework.Flags.HitEffectAll.Value
									then
										local HitPart = Arguments[2]
										local HitCF = Arguments[3]
										local HitDirection = Arguments[4]

										local HitPos = HitCF
										if typeof(HitCF) == "CFrame" then
											HitPos = HitCF.p
										end
										task.spawn(function()
											Framework.EffectEvent:Fire(HitPos)
										end)
									end

									return CreateBlood(...)
								end)
							)
						end

						do --// Raid ESP
							local RaidEvent = Instance.new("BindableEvent", Framework.GetService("Workspace"))
							local RaidFolder = Instance.new("Folder", Framework.GetService("CoreGui"))

							RaidFolder.Name = "Raids"

							RaidEvent.Event:Connect(function(Type, CFrame)
								local Time = tick()

								local Part = Instance.new("Part", RaidFolder)
								Part.CanCollide = false
								Part.CanQuery = false
								Part.CanTouch = false
								Part.Transparency = 1
								Part.CFrame = CFrame

								Part.Name = Type

								local StartedAt = Instance.new("IntValue", Part)
								StartedAt.Name = "StartedAt"
								StartedAt.Value = Time
								Part:SetAttribute("StartedAt", Time)
								Part:SetAttribute("Type", Type)

								Delay(600, function()
									Part:Destroy()
								end)

								if Framework.Flags.RaidNotifications.Value then
									Framework.Notify(
										"Raid Alert",
										"A potential raid, of type " .. Type .. "has started!"
									)
								end
							end)

							local CreateExplosion
							CreateExplosion = hookfunction(
								VFXModule.CreateExplosion,
								LPH_NO_UPVALUES(function(...)
									local Arguments = { ... }

									local Type = tostring(Arguments[5])
									local CFrame = Arguments[2]

									task.spawn(function()
										RaidEvent:Fire(Type, CFrame)
									end)
