									return CreateExplosion(...)
								end)
							)
							DebugPrint("hooked secret sauce")
						end

						do --// Tracers, Silent Aim
							local TracerEvent = Instance.new("BindableEvent", Workspace)

							TracerEvent.Event:Connect(function(Origin, Destination, IsEnemy)
								local Color = not IsEnemy and Framework.Flags.TracerColor.Value
									or Framework.Flags.EnemyTracerColor.Value
								local Model = Instance.new("Model", Workspace)
								Model.Name = "Model"

								local Part0 = Instance.new("Part")
								do
									Part0.CanQuery = false
									Part0.Position = Origin
									Part0.Name = "Part"
									Part0.Anchored = true
									Part0.Transparency = 1
									Part0.CanCollide = false
									Part0.Parent = Model
									Part0.Size = Vector3.new(0.0001, 0.0001, 0.0001)
								end

								local Part1 = Instance.new("Part")
								do
									Part1.CanQuery = false
									Part1.Position = Origin
									Part1.Anchored = true
									Part1.Name = "Part"
									Part1.Transparency = 1
									Part1.CanCollide = false
									Part1.Parent = Model
									Part1.Size = Vector3.new(0.0001, 0.0001, 0.0001)
								end

								local Attachment0 = Instance.new("Attachment", Part0)
								local Attachment1 = Instance.new("Attachment", Part1)

								local Beam = Instance.new("Beam")
								do
									Beam.FaceCamera = true
									Beam.Name = "Beam"
									Beam.Color = ColorSequence.new({
										ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.0, Color),
										ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.5, Color3.new(1, 1, 1)),
										ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1.0, Color),
									})
									Beam.LightEmission = 1
									Beam.LightInfluence = 0
									Beam.Width0 = 0.3
									Beam.Width1 = 0.3
									Beam.Texture = "rbxassetid://12788927812"
									Beam.TextureLength = 10
									Beam.TextureMode = Enum.TextureMode.Wrap
									Beam.TextureSpeed = 1
									Beam.Parent = Model
									Beam.Brightness = Framework.Flags.TracerBrightness.Value
									Beam.Attachment0 = Attachment0
									Beam.Attachment1 = Attachment1
								end

								if Framework.Flags["BeamTexture"].Value == "Lightning" then
									Beam.Transparency = NumberSequence.new({
										NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
										NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 0),
									})
									Beam.TextureSpeed = 10
									Beam.Texture = "rbxassetid://12781800668"
									Beam.TextureLength = 4
									Beam.Width0 = 0.5
									Beam.Width1 = 0.5

									local SpeedTween = Framework.GetService("TweenService"):Create(
										Beam,
										TweenInfo.new(0.6, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.InOut, 2, true),
										{
											TextureSpeed = 2,
										}
									)
									SpeedTween:Play()
								end

								local Beam2
								local Beam3
								if Framework.Flags["BeamTexture"].Value == "Dark" then
									Beam.Texture = "rbxassetid://12781848822"
									Beam.TextureLength = 20
									Beam.TextureSpeed = 0.9
									Beam.Width0 = 0.5
									Beam.Width1 = 0.5
									Beam.TextureMode = Enum.TextureMode.Static
									Beam.LightInfluence = 1
									Beam.LightEmission = 0.25

									Beam2 = Beam:Clone()

									Beam2.Parent = Beam.Parent
									Beam2.Attachment0 = Attachment0
									Beam2.Attachment1 = Attachment1

									Beam3 = Beam:Clone()

									Beam3.Parent = Beam.Parent
									Beam3.Attachment0 = Attachment0
									Beam3.Attachment1 = Attachment1
								end

								local ReferenceDistance = 30
								local ReferenceTime = ReferenceDistance / Framework.Flags.ReferenceTime.Value

								local Distance = (Destination - Origin).Magnitude
								local Time = Distance / ReferenceDistance * ReferenceTime

								local MoveTween = Framework.GetService("TweenService"):Create(
									Part1,
									TweenInfo.new(Time, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
									{
										Position = Destination,
									}
								)
								MoveTween:Play()

								local PulseTween = Framework.GetService("TweenService"):Create(
									Beam,
									TweenInfo.new(0.1, Enum.EasingStyle.Sine, Enum.EasingDirection.InOut, 2, true),
									{
										Width0 = 0.35,
										Width1 = 0.35,
									}
								)
								PulseTween:Play()

								Delay(Framework.Flags.TracerLifetime.Value, function()
									local Tween = Framework.GetService("TweenService"):Create(
										Beam,
										TweenInfo.new(0.5, Enum.EasingStyle.Quint, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
										{
											Width0 = 0,
											Width1 = 0,
											TextureSpeed = 0,
											Brightness = 0,
										}
									)

									if Beam2 and Beam3 then
										local Tween2 = Framework.GetService("TweenService"):Create(
											Beam2,
											TweenInfo.new(0.5, Enum.EasingStyle.Quint, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{
												Width0 = 0,
												Width1 = 0,
												TextureSpeed = 0,
												Brightness = 0,
											}
										)
										local Tween3 = Framework.GetService("TweenService"):Create(
											Beam3,
											TweenInfo.new(0.5, Enum.EasingStyle.Quint, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
											{
												Width0 = 0,
												Width1 = 0,
												TextureSpeed = 0,
												Brightness = 0,
											}
										)
										Tween2:Play()
										Tween3:Play()
									end

									Tween:Play()
									Tween.Completed:Wait()
									Model:Destroy()
								end)
							end)

							local CreateProjectile
							CreateProjectile = hookfunction(
								VFXModule.CreateProjectile,
								LPH_NO_UPVALUES(function(self, BulletTable)
									--// Silent Aim / Wallbang / Instant Bullet
									local success, err = pcall(function()
										if
											BulletTable.StepFunction ~= "FakeStepFunc"
											and BulletTable.HitFunction ~= "FakeHitFunc"
											and not tostring(BulletTable.HitFunction):find("Ignore")
										then
											Framework.IsShooting = true
											task.delay(0.5, function()
												Framework.IsShooting = false
											end)

											--// Wallbang
											if Framework.Flags.Wallbang.Value then
												table.insert(
													BulletTable.Filters,
													Workspace:FindFirstChild("SpawnAreas")
												)
												table.insert(BulletTable.Filters, Workspace:FindFirstChild("Monuments"))
												table.insert(BulletTable.Filters, Workspace:FindFirstChild("Arenas"))
												table.insert(BulletTable.Filters, Workspace:FindFirstChild("RayParts"))
												table.insert(BulletTable.Filters, Workspace:FindFirstChild("Bases"))
											end

											--// Instant Bullet
											if Framework.Flags.InstantBullet.Value then
												BulletTable.Speed = 9e9
											end

											--// Teleport
											if Framework.Flags.Teleport.Value and Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter then
												local RootPart =
													Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
												if RootPart then
													Workspace.FallenPartsDestroyHeight = -9e9
													local Stages = {
														Vector3.new(-9e9, 9e9, 0),
														Client:GetMouse().Hit.Position,
														Vector3.new(-5000000, 5000, 0),
														Client:GetMouse().Hit.Position,
													}
													for _, pos in ipairs(Stages) do
														RootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(pos)
													end
												end
											end
										end
									end)

									if not success and err then
										DebugPrint(tostring(err))
									end

									--// Tracers
									task.spawn(function()
										if
											Framework.Flags.BulletTracers.Value
											and (BulletTable.Position - Camera.CFrame.Position).Magnitude < 1200
										then
											local IsEnemy = Framework.Flags.ShowEnemyTracers.Value
												and (
													BulletTable.StepFunction == "FakeStepFunc"
													or BulletTable.HitFunction == "FakeHitFunc"
													or tostring(BulletTable.HitFunction):find("Ignore")
												)

											local Params = RaycastParams.new()
											Params.FilterDescendantsInstances = {
												Workspace.VFX,
												Client.Character,
												Camera,
											}

											local Ray = Workspace:Raycast(
												BulletTable.Position,
												BulletTable.Direction * BulletTable.MaxRange,
												Params
											)

											if Ray and Ray.Position then
												TracerEvent:Fire(BulletTable.Position, Ray.Position, IsEnemy)
											end
										end
									end)

									return CreateProjectile(self, BulletTable)
								end)
							)
						end

						DebugPrint("hooked bullets")
					end
					--
					do --// Networking
						local LastFlash = tick()
						local R15Parts = {
							"Head",
							"HumanoidRootPart",
							"LowerTorso",
							"UpperTorso",
							"LeftHand",
							"RightHand",
							"LeftFoot",
							"RightFoot",
							"LeftLowerArm",
							"RightLowerArm",
							"LeftUpperArm",
							"RightUpperArm",
							"LeftLowerLeg",
							"RightLowerLeg",
							"LeftUpperLeg",
							"RightUpperLeg",
						}

						local function CalculateVerticalDrop(Origin, Destination, WeaponName)
							if Framework.Flags.InstantBullet and Framework.Flags.InstantBullet.Value then
								local Distance = (Origin - Destination).Magnitude
								local Speed, Gravity, range = Framework.Statistics.Functions.GetBulletStats(WeaponName)
								--
								Gravity = Gravity * -195
								local InitialVerticalVelocity = 0
								local TimeToHit = Distance / Speed
								local VerticalDrop = InitialVerticalVelocity * TimeToHit
									- 0.5 * Gravity * TimeToHit * TimeToHit
								--
								if tostring(VerticalDrop):find("nan") then
									VerticalDrop = 0
								end
								--
								return Vector3.new(0, VerticalDrop, 0)
							end
							--
							return Vector3.zero
						end
					end

					DebugPrint("hooked network")
					--
					DebugPrint("creating gun mods")
					--
					do --// Gun Mods
						local Modifications = {}
						--
						DeepCopy = function(Table)
							local Copy = {}
							for k, v in pairs(Table) do
								if type(v) == "table" then
									Copy[k] = DeepCopy(v)
								else
									Copy[k] = v
								end
							end
							return Copy
						end
						--
						do --// main
							local ToolModule = require(ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Modules").ToolInfo)
							local BenchInfo = require(ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Modules").BenchInfo)

							local OldBenchInfo = DeepCopy(BenchInfo)
							local OldToolInfo = DeepCopy(ToolModule)

							function Modifications:ApplyInteract(Value)
								for Bench, Data in BenchInfo do
									Data.InteractDistance = Value and 10 or OldBenchInfo[Bench].InteractDistance
								end
							end

							function Modifications:ApplyNoShake(Value)
								for K, Weapon in next, ToolModule do
									if rawget(Weapon, "Shake") and rawget(Weapon.Shake, "Speed") then
										Weapon.Shake.Speed = Value and 0 or OldToolInfo[K].Shake.Speed
									end
								end
							end

							function Modifications:ApplyBounce(Value)
								for K, Weapon in next, ToolModule do
									if rawget(Weapon, "Melee") and rawget(Weapon.Melee, "BounceMult") then
										Weapon.Melee.BounceMult = Value and 0 or OldToolInfo[K].Melee.BounceMult
									end
								end
							end

							function Modifications:ApplyOffsets(Value)
								for Index, Weapon in ToolModule do
									if Weapon.Offsets then
										for I, Val in Weapon.Offsets do
											if tostring(I):find("Local") then
												if Value then
													ToolModule[Index].Offsets[I] = OldToolInfo[Index].Offsets[I]
														* CFrame.new(
															Framework.Flags.ViewmodelX.Value,
															Framework.Flags.ViewmodelY.Value,
															Framework.Flags.ViewmodelZ.Value
														)
												else
													ToolModule[Index].Offsets[I] = OldToolInfo[Index].Offsets[I]
												end
											end
										end
									end
								end
							end

							function Modifications:ApplyRange(Value)
								for K, Weapon in next, ToolModule do
									if rawget(Weapon, "Melee") and rawget(Weapon.Melee, "MaxRange") then
										Weapon.Melee.MaxRange = Value and 10 or OldToolInfo[K].Melee.MaxRange
									end
								end
							end

							function Modifications:ApplyRecoil(Value)
								for K, Weapon in next, ToolModule do
									local s, e = pcall(function()
										if type(Weapon) == "table" then
											if rawget(Weapon, "Recoil") and rawget(Weapon.Recoil, "Camera") then
												if Value then
													Weapon.Recoil.Camera.Shake.X = { 0, 0 }
													Weapon.Recoil.Camera.Shake.Y = { 0, 0 }

													if Weapon.Shake then
														Weapon.Shake.Speed = 0
													end
													local start = OldToolInfo[K].Recoil.Camera.RecoilStart
													Weapon.Recoil.Camera.RecoilStart = LPH_NO_UPVALUES(function(_)
														local Value, Val2 = start(_)
														return Value * (Framework.Flags.RecoilPercent.Value / 100),
															Val2 * (Framework.Flags.RecoilPercent.Value / 100)
													end)

													local finish = OldToolInfo[K].Recoil.Camera.RecoilFinish
													Weapon.Recoil.Camera.RecoilFinish = LPH_NO_UPVALUES(function(_)
														local Value, Val2 = finish(_)
														return Value * (Framework.Flags.RecoilPercent.Value / 100),
															Val2 * (Framework.Flags.RecoilPercent.Value / 100)
													end)
												else
													Weapon.Recoil.Camera.Shake.X = OldToolInfo[K].Recoil.Camera.Shake.X
													Weapon.Recoil.Camera.Shake.Y = OldToolInfo[K].Recoil.Camera.Shake.Y
													if Weapon.Shake and OldToolInfo[K].Weapon.Shake then
														Weapon.Shake.Speed = OldToolInfo[K].Weapon.Shake.Speed
													end

													Weapon.Recoil.Camera.RecoilStart =
														OldToolInfo[K].Recoil.Camera.RecoilStart
													Weapon.Recoil.Camera.RecoilFinish =
														OldToolInfo[K].Recoil.Camera.RecoilFinish
												end
											end
										end
									end)

									if not s and e then
										DebugPrint(tostring(e))
									end
								end
							end

							local ReachTables = {}
							for Index, Table in getgc(true) do
								if type(Table) == "table" and rawget(Table, "Range") and rawget(Table, "Offset") then
									ReachTables[#ReachTables + 1] = Table
								end
							end

							local OldReachTables = DeepCopy(ReachTables)

							function Modifications:ApplyReach(Value)
								for Index, Table in ReachTables do
									Table.Range = Value and OldReachTables.Range * 10 or OldReachTable.Range
								end

								for Index, Table in ToolModule do
									if rawget(Table, "Melee") and rawget(Table.Melee, "MaxRange") then
										Table.Melee.MaxRange = Value and ToolModule[Index].Melee.MaxRange * 10
											or ToolModule[Index].Melee.MaxRange
									end
								end
							end

							function Modifications:ApplyVMRecoil(Value)
								for K, Weapon in next, ToolModule do
									local s, e = pcall(function()
										if type(Weapon) == "table" then
											if rawget(Weapon, "Recoil") and rawget(Weapon.Recoil, "VM") then
												if Value then
													Weapon.Recoil.VM.StartTime = 0
													Weapon.Recoil.VM.EndTime = 0
												else
													Weapon.Recoil.VM.StartTime = OldToolInfo[K].Recoil.VM.StartTime
													Weapon.Recoil.VM.EndTime = OldToolInfo[K].Recoil.VM.EndTime
												end
											end
										end
									end)

									if not s and e then
										DebugPrint(tostring(e))
									end
								end
							end

							function Modifications:ApplyVMBobbing(Value)
								for K, Weapon in next, ToolModule do
									local s, e = pcall(function()
										if type(Weapon) == "table" then
											if
												rawget(Weapon, "Weapon") and rawget(Weapon.Weapon, "VMMovementMults")
											then
												if Value then
													Weapon.Weapon.VMMovementMults.Bobbing = 0
													Weapon.Weapon.VMMovementMults.MouseSway = 0
													Weapon.Weapon.VMMovementMults.SprintTilt = 0
													Weapon.Weapon.VMMovementMults.SprintMoveDown = 0
													Weapon.Weapon.VMMovementMults.SprintMoveBackward = 0
												else
													Weapon.Weapon.VMMovementMults.Bobbing =
														OldToolInfo[K].Weapon.VMMovementMults.Bobbing
													Weapon.Weapon.VMMovementMults.MouseSway =
														OldToolInfo[K].Weapon.VMMovementMults.MouseSway
													Weapon.Weapon.VMMovementMults.SprintTilt =
														OldToolInfo[K].Weapon.VMMovementMults.SprintTilt
													Weapon.Weapon.VMMovementMults.SprintMoveDown =
														OldToolInfo[K].Weapon.VMMovementMults.SprintMoveDown
													Weapon.Weapon.VMMovementMults.SprintMoveBackward =
														OldToolInfo[K].Weapon.VMMovementMults.SprintMoveBackward
												end
											end
										end
									end)

									if not s and e then
										DebugPrint(tostring(e))
									end
								end
							end

							function Modifications:ApplySpread(Value)
								for K, Weapon in next, ToolModule do
									pcall(function()
										if type(Weapon) == "table" then
											if rawget(Weapon, "Spread") then
												local OldSpread = OldToolInfo[K].Spread
												do
													if rawget(Weapon.Spread, "Aiming") then
														if Value then
															Weapon.Spread.Aiming.Idle = OldSpread.Aiming.Idle
																* (Framework.Flags.SpreadPercent.Value / 100)
															Weapon.Spread.Aiming.ShootingExtra = OldSpread.Aiming.ShootingExtra
																* (Framework.Flags.SpreadPercent.Value / 100)
															Weapon.Spread.Aiming.Moving = OldSpread.Aiming.Moving
																* (Framework.Flags.SpreadPercent.Value / 100)
															Weapon.Spread.Aiming.Hide = OldSpread.Aiming.Hide
																* (Framework.Flags.SpreadPercent.Value / 100)
														else
															Weapon.Spread.Aiming.Idle = OldSpread.Aiming.Idle
															Weapon.Spread.Aiming.ShootingExtra =
																OldSpread.Aiming.ShootingExtra
															Weapon.Spread.Aiming.Moving = OldSpread.Aiming.Moving
															Weapon.Spread.Aiming.Hide = OldSpread.Aiming.Hide
														end
													end

													if rawget(Weapon.Spread, "Shooting") then
														if Value then
															Weapon.Spread.Shooting.Idle = OldSpread.Shooting.Idle
																* (Framework.Flags.SpreadPercent.Value / 100)
															Weapon.Spread.Shooting.ShootingExtra = OldSpread.Shooting.ShootingExtra
																* (Framework.Flags.SpreadPercent.Value / 100)
															Weapon.Spread.Shooting.Moving = OldSpread.Shooting.Moving
																* (Framework.Flags.SpreadPercent.Value / 100)
															Weapon.Spread.Shooting.Hide = OldSpread.Shooting.Hide
																* (Framework.Flags.SpreadPercent.Value / 100)
														else
															Weapon.Spread.Shooting.Idle = OldSpread.Shooting.Idle
															Weapon.Spread.Shooting.ShootingExtra =
																OldSpread.Shooting.ShootingExtra
															Weapon.Spread.Shooting.Moving = OldSpread.Shooting.Moving
															Weapon.Spread.Shooting.Hide = OldSpread.Shooting.Hide
														end
													end

													if rawget(Weapon.Spread, "Hip") then
														if Value then
															Weapon.Spread.Hip.Idle = OldSpread.Hip.Idle
																* (Framework.Flags.SpreadPercent.Value / 100)
															Weapon.Spread.Hip.ShootingExtra = OldSpread.Hip.ShootingExtra
																* (Framework.Flags.SpreadPercent.Value / 100)
															Weapon.Spread.Hip.Moving = OldSpread.Hip.Moving
																* (Framework.Flags.SpreadPercent.Value / 100)
															Weapon.Spread.Hip.Hide = OldSpread.Hip.Hide
																* (Framework.Flags.SpreadPercent.Value / 100)
														else
															Weapon.Spread.Hip.Idle = OldSpread.Hip.Idle
															Weapon.Spread.Hip.ShootingExtra =
																OldSpread.Hip.ShootingExtra
															Weapon.Spread.Hip.Moving = OldSpread.Hip.Moving
															Weapon.Spread.Hip.Hide = OldSpread.Hip.Hide
														end
													end
												end
											end
										end
									end)
								end
							end

							function Modifications:ApplyEquip(TOGGLE)
								for Index, Value in next, ToolModule do
									pcall(function()
										if type(Value) == "table" and rawget(Value, "Weapon") then
											local Old = OldToolInfo[Index].Weapon
											if rawget(Value, "Weapon") then
												Value.Weapon.EquipAnimSpeed = TOGGLE and 6 or Old.EquipAnimSpeed
											end
										end
									end)
								end
							end

							function Modifications:ApplyAim(TOGGLE)
								for Index, Value in next, ToolModule do
									if type(Value) == "table" and rawget(Value, "Weapon") then
										pcall(function()
											local Old = OldToolInfo[Index].Weapon
											if rawget(Value.Weapon, "AimDownSpeed") then
												Value.Weapon.AimDownSpeed.In = TOGGLE
														and Old.AimDownSpeed.In - (Old.AimDownSpeed.In * (Framework.Flags.AimSpeed.Value / 100))
													or Old.AimDownSpeed.In
												Value.Weapon.AimDownSpeed.Out = TOGGLE
														and Old.AimDownSpeed.Out - (Old.AimDownSpeed.Out * (Framework.Flags.AimSpeed.Value / 100))
													or Old.AimDownSpeed.Out
											end
										end)
									end
								end
							end

							function Modifications:ApplyAuto(TOGGLE)
								for Index, Value in next, ToolModule do
									if type(Value) == "table" and rawget(Value, "Weapon") then
										pcall(function()
											local Old = OldToolInfo[Index].Weapon
											if rawget(Value.Weapon, "RPM") then
												Value.Weapon.Auto = TOGGLE and true or Old.Auto
											end
										end)
									end
								end
							end

							function Modifications:ApplyRPM(TOGGLE)
								for Index, Value in next, ToolModule do
									if type(Value) == "table" and rawget(Value, "Weapon") then
										pcall(function()
											local Old = OldToolInfo[Index].Weapon
											if rawget(Value.Weapon, "RPM") then
												Value.Weapon.RPM = TOGGLE
														and (Old.RPM + (Old.RPM * Framework.Flags.FireRateMultiplier.Value))
													or Old.RPM
											end
										end)
									end
								end
							end

							function Modifications:ApplySwing(TOGGLE)
								for Index, Value in next, ToolModule do
									pcall(function()
										if
											type(Value) == "table"
											and rawget(Value, "Melee")
											and rawget(Value, "Weapon")
										then
											Value.Weapon.Cooldown = TOGGLE and OldToolInfo[Index].Weapon.Cooldown * 0.8
												or OldToolInfo[Index].Weapon.Cooldown
										end
									end)
								end
							end

							function Modifications:ApplyFastMed(TOGGLE)
								for Index, Value in next, ToolModule do
									pcall(function()
										if
											type(Value) == "table"
											and rawget(Value, "Weapon")
											and rawget(Value.Weapon, "HealthItem")
										then
											if tostring(Index) ~= "Chainsaw" and tostring(Index) ~= "Mining Drill" then
												Value.Weapon.Cooldown = TOGGLE
														and OldToolInfo[Index].Weapon.Cooldown / 1.3
													or OldToolInfo[Index].Weapon.Cooldown
											end
										end
									end)
								end
							end
						end

						Framework.Modifications = Modifications
					end
				end
			end)()

			LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
				local UserInputService = Framework.GetService("UserInputService")
				local Players = Framework.GetService("Players")
				local Workspace = Framework.GetService("Workspace")
				local Camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera
				local Client = Players.LocalPlayer

				--// Namecall
				local Namecall
				Namecall = hookmetamethod(game, "__namecall", function(self, ...)
					local Method = getnamecallmethod()
					local Arguments = { ... }

					if not checkcaller() and Method == "Clone" and Framework.Flags.SkinChanger.Value then
						if self.Parent and Framework.Flags["SkinChange_" .. self.Parent.Name] then
							local ItemName = self.Parent.Name
							local FolderName = self.Name
							if
								Framework.Flags["SkinChange_" .. ItemName]
								and Framework.Flags["SkinChange_" .. ItemName].Value
							then
								local Skin = Framework.Flags["Skin_" .. ItemName].Value
								if game.FindFirstChild(self.Parent, Skin) then
									self = game.FindFirstChild(self.Parent, Skin)
								end
							end
						end
					end

					if Method == "Invoke" and self and self.Name == "Fetch" and not checkcaller() then
						local Traceback = debug.traceback()

						if Traceback and Traceback:find("ViewmodelController") then
							local Table = Namecall(self, ...)
							if Table.Toolbar then
								for Index, Item in Table.Toolbar do
									if type(Item) == "table" and Item.Skin then
										local ID = Item.ID
										local ItemInfo = Framework.ItemInfoTable[ID]
										local Name = ItemInfo and ItemInfo.Name

										if
											Framework.Flags.SkinChanger.Value
											and Framework.Flags["SkinChange_" .. Name]
											and Framework.Flags["SkinChange_" .. Name].Value
										then
											local SkinName = Framework.Flags["Skin_" .. Name].Value
											Item.Skin = SkinName
										end
									end
								end
							end
							return Table
						end
					end

					if Method == "GetAttribute" and not checkcaller() and self then
						local Key = Arguments[1]
						local Name = self.Name

						if
							Name == "InteractController"
							and Key == "DefaultDistance"
							and Framework.Flags.ExtendInteractions.Value
						then
							return 10
						end

						if Name == "Lighting" and Key == "Stage" and Framework.Flags.EditTime.Value then
							return Framework.Flags.Time.Value < 7 and "Night" or "Day"
						end

						if Framework.Flags.DebugCamera.Value and not Framework.Flags.Fly.Value then
							if Key == "Direction" or Key == "IsSprint" or Key == "IsSwim" or Key == "IsClimb" then
								return Key == "Direction" and "" or false
							end
						end

						if Key == "IsSlowed" and Framework.Flags.NoSlow.Value then
							return false
						end

						if (Name == "StateController" or Name == "ViewmodelController") and Key == "Direction" then
							if
								Framework.Flags.OmniSprint.Value
								and UserInputService.IsKeyDown(UserInputService, Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift)
							then
								return "Forward"
							end
						end

						if
							Key == "IsSprint"
							and Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter
							and Framework.Flags.OmniSprint.Value
							and UserInputService.IsKeyDown(UserInputService, Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift)
						then
							Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 18
							return true
						end
					end

					return Namecall(self, ...)
				end)

				--// NewIndex
				local NewIndex
				NewIndex = hookmetamethod(game, "__newindex", function(self, Property, Value)
					if self then
						if
							Property == "CameraOffset"
							and Framework.Flags.RemoveCameraBobbing.Value
							and self
							and self.Name == "Humanoid"
							and not Framework.Respawning
						then
							return NewIndex(self, Property, Vector3.new())
						end

						if
							not checkcaller()
							and Property == "Text"
							and Framework.Flags.HideName.Value
							and self.ClassName == "TextLabel"
						then
							if Value == Client.Name then
								return NewIndex(self, Property, "Iridescent")
							end

							if Value == Client.DisplayName then
								return NewIndex(self, Property, "Iridescent")
							end
						end

						if
							Property == "Position"
							and self.Name == "HitMarker"
							and Framework.HitmarkerFlash
							and not checkcaller()
						then
							local Pos = Framework.HitmarkerPos()
							return NewIndex(self, Property, UDim2.new(0, Pos.X, 0, Pos.Y))
						end

						if self == Camera and Property == "CFrame" then
							local Traceback = debug.traceback()
							if Framework.Flags.ThirdPerson.Value then
								Value = Value + Camera.CFrame.LookVector * -Framework.Flags.ThirdPersonDistance.Value
							end
							if
								Framework.Flags.RemoveCameraBobbing.Value
								and Traceback
								and Traceback:find("ViewmodelController")
								and not Framework.Respawning
								and not Framework.Flags.OnlyMovementBobbing.Value
							then
								return NewIndex(self, Property, Camera.CFrame)
							end
						end
					end

					return NewIndex(self, Property, Value)
				end)

				DebugPrint("hooked metamethods")
			end)()
		end)
		--
		if not HooksSuccess and Error2 then
			warn("Hooks Failed Error: ", Error2)
			local Client = cloneref(game:GetService("Players")).LocalPlayer
			Client:Kick("0x03: " .. tostring(Error2))
		end
	end
	--
	do --// Connections / Threads
		local ScriptContext = Framework.GetService("ScriptContext")
		local UserInputService = Framework.GetService("UserInputService")
		local RunService = Framework.GetService("RunService")
		local ReplicatedStorage = Framework.GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
		local Workspace = Framework.GetService("Workspace")
		local Players = Framework.GetService("Players")
		local Lighting = Framework.GetService("Lighting")
		local NetworkClient = Framework.GetService("NetworkClient")
		local UserInputService = Framework.GetService("UserInputService")
		local SoundService = Framework.GetService("SoundService")
		--
		local Client = Framework.Client.GetClient()
		--
		local RotateLine = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Object, Thickness, From, To)
			local X1, Y1, X2, Y2 = From.X, From.Y, To.X, To.Y
			--
			local CenterX = (X1 + X2) / 2
			local CenterY = (Y1 + Y2) / 2
			--
			local DeltaX = math.abs(X1 - X2) ^ 2
			local DeltaY = math.abs(Y1 - Y2) ^ 2
			--
			local Distance = math.sqrt(DeltaX + DeltaY)
			local Rotation = math.deg(math.atan2(Y1 - Y2, X1 - X2))
			--
			Object.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
			Object.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(CenterX, CenterY)
			Object.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(Distance, Thickness)
			Object.Rotation = Rotation
		end)

		do --// Library Keybinds, Colprickers
			Framework:NewThread(
				"Library Keybinds",
				LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
					for Flag, Bind in Framework.Binds do
						if
							Bind.Mode == "Hold"
							and not UserInputService:GetFocusedTextBox()
							and Bind.Key ~= ""
							and UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Bind.Key)
						then
							Bind.Value = true
							task.spawn(function()
								pcall(Bind.Callback, Bind.Value)
							end)
						elseif Bind.Mode == "Hold" and Bind.Key ~= "" and not UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Bind.Key) then
							Bind.Value = false
						end
					end
				end),
				"Input"
			)

			Framework:NewThread(
				"Colorpicker dragging",
				LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
					for _, Drag in pairs(Framework.ActiveDrags) do
						local AbsolutePosition = Drag.Instance.AbsolutePosition
						local AbsoluteSize = Drag.Instance.AbsoluteSize
						local MouseLocation = UserInputService:GetMouseLocation()
						local X = math.clamp(MouseLocation.X - AbsolutePosition.X, 0, AbsoluteSize.X)
						local Percent = math.clamp(X / AbsoluteSize.X, 0, 1)
						Drag.Callback(Percent)
					end
				end),
				"Input"
			)
		end
		--
		do --// Character
			local AttackerEvent = Instance.new("BindableEvent", Workspace)
			local AttackerFolder = Instance.new("Folder", Framework.GetService("CoreGui"))
			local ServerPosition = {}
			local ESPGUI = Instance.new("ScreenGui", Framework.GetService("CoreGui"))
			local LastNotify = tick()
			local VectorUtil = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Modules")
					and require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.VectorUtil)
				or {}
			local ToolInfo = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Modules") and require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.ToolInfo)
				or {}
			local LastNetworkTick = tick()
			local LastReload = tick()

			local Desync = {}
			local Temp = 1
			local DesyncAnim = Instance.new("Animation")

			local VFX = Workspace:FindFirstChild("VFX") or Workspace
			local IsAnimating = nil
			local LastSwing = tick()
			local Modules = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Modules")
			local ToolInfo = Modules
				and Modules:FindFirstChild("ToolInfo")
				and require(Modules:FindFirstChild("ToolInfo"))
			local VectorUtil = Modules
				and Modules:FindFirstChild("VectorUtil")
				and require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.VectorUtil)

			local SelfHighlight = Instance.new("Highlight", Workspace)

			local Remote = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Remotes")
				and ReplicatedStorage.Remotes:FindFirstChild(
					string.char(
						136,
						151,
						150,
						79,
						83,
						47,
						12,
						43,
						83,
						127,
						29,
						120,
						155,
						32,
						59,
						102,
						175,
						55,
						75,
						15,
						144,
						155,
						96,
						107,
						90,
						79,
						115,
						186,
						42,
						82
					)
				)
			local Hash = string.char(
				32,
				160,
				72,
				124,
				151,
				12,
				176,
				39,
				65,
				28,
				122,
				173,
				98,
				61,
				159,
				172,
				72,
				11,
				80,
				134,
				29,
				124,
				104,
				3,
				156,
				125,
				40,
				19,
				24,
				15
			)
			local HitHash = string.char(
				63,
				185,
				85,
				143,
				181,
				42,
				176,
				169,
				42,
				28,
				185,
				69,
				146,
				23,
				65,
				25,
				81,
				156,
				122,
				115,
				80,
				75,
				175,
				156,
				99,
				9,
				117,
				72,
				112,
				120
			)

			local Reload = LPH_JIT_MAX(function()
				local Remote = ReplicatedStorage.Remotes:FindFirstChild(
					string.char(
						136,
						151,
						150,
						79,
						83,
						47,
						12,
						43,
						83,
						127,
						29,
						120,
						155,
						32,
						59,
						102,
						175,
						55,
						75,
						15,
						144,
						155,
						96,
						107,
						90,
						79,
						115,
						186,
						42,
						82
					)
				)
				local String = string.char(
					186,
					109,
					92,
					123,
					140,
					17,
					30,
					91,
					154,
					28,
					34,
					188,
					60,
					12,
					9,
					142,
					12,
					118,
					93,
					172,
					189,
					60,
					48,
					164,
					188,
					42,
					87,
					78,
					91,
					86
				)
				local Arguments = {
					[1] = "None",
					[2] = Workspace:GetServerTimeNow(),
				}
				pcall(function()
					VectorUtil:FireRemote(Remote, String, Arguments)
				end)
			end)

			local ApplyVisuals2 = LPH_JIT_MAX(function(Instance)
				if (Instance:IsA("MeshPart") or Instance:IsA("BasePart")) and Instance.Transparency ~= 1 then
					Instance:SetAttribute("OriginalMaterial", Instance.Material)
					Instance:SetAttribute("OriginalColor", Instance.Color)

					if Instance:IsA("MeshPart") then
						Instance:SetAttribute("OriginalTextureId", Instance.TextureID)
					end

					if Framework.Flags.CustomClientCharacter.Value then
						Instance.Color = Framework.Flags["ClientCharacterColor"].Value
						Instance.Material = Framework.Flags["ClientCharacterMaterial"].Value
						if Instance:IsA("MeshPart") and Instance.Material == Enum.Material.ForceField then
							Instance.TextureID = "rbxassetid://10913193650"
						elseif Instance:IsA("MeshPart") and Instance.Material ~= Enum.Material.ForceField then
							Instance.TextureID = ""
						end
					else
						Instance.Color = Instance:GetAttribute("OriginalColor")
						Instance.Material = Instance:GetAttribute("OriginalMaterial")
						if Instance:IsA("MeshPart") then
							Instance.TextureID = Instance:GetAttribute("OriginalTextureId")
						end
					end
				end
			end)

			local ApplyVisualsToChildren = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(container)
				for _, child in pairs(container:GetChildren()) do
					ApplyVisuals2(child)
					if Framework.ArmorCache[child.Name] then
						for _, grandChild in pairs(child:GetChildren()) do
							ApplyVisuals2(grandChild)
						end
					end
				end
			end)

			local OnClientCharacterAdded = LPH_JIT_MAX(function()
				Framework.Respawning = true
				Framework.InventoryControllerTable = {}

				repeat
					task.wait()
				until Client.Character
				local Character = Client.Character
				task.wait(3)

				local ClientGUI = Client.PlayerGui

				for _, Function in getgc(false) do
					if
						type(Function) == "function"
						and islclosure(Function)
						and not isfunctionhooked(Function)
						and not isexecutorclosure(Function)
					then
						local Info = debug.getinfo(Function)
						--
						local Constants = debug.getconstants(Function)
						local FunctionName = Info.name
						local FunctionSource = Info.source
						--
						--if FunctionName == "ChooseRandom" then
						--    if isfunctionhooked(Function) then
						--        restorefunction(Function);
						--    end;

						--    if Framework.Flags.InstantEoka.Value then
						--        if not LPH_OBFUSCATED then
						--            hookfunction(Function, function(...)
						--                return 0
						--            end)
						--        else
						--            hookfunction(Function, LPH_NO_UPVALUES(function(...)
						--                return 0
						--            end));
						--        end;
						--    end;
						--end;
						--
						--
						if FunctionName == "CreateHitMarker" and FunctionSource:find("ViewmodelController") then
							Framework.CreateHitMarker = Function
						end
						--
						if FunctionName == "PlayAnimation" and FunctionSource:find("ViewmodelController") then
							local OldPlayAnimation
							OldPlayAnimation = hookfunction(
								Function,
								LPH_NO_UPVALUES(function(...)
									local Arguments = { ... }
									if
										(Arguments[1] == "WindupLoop" or Arguments[1] == "Windup")
										and Framework.Flags.FastSwing.Value
									then
										--// makes the animation instantly reset
										OldPlayAnimation(unpack(Arguments))
										return { Length = 0.014 }
									end

									if Arguments[1] == "ThrowWindup" and Framework.Flags.InstantThrow.Value then
										--// self explanatory
										return { Length = 0.05 }
									end

									if Arguments[1] == "Use" and Framework.Flags.MedExploit.Value then
										--// just helps with speeding up anim. allows you to begin consuming the next med faster
										Arguments[2] = Arguments[2] * 2
										local Table = OldPlayAnimation(unpack(Arguments))
										return { Length = Table.Length / 2 }
									end

									if
										(
											Arguments[1] == "Aim"
											or Arguments[1] == "AimHold"
											or Arguments[1] == "AimStop"
											or Arguments[1] == "AimStart"
										)
										and Framework.Flags.InstantBow
										and Framework.Flags.InstantBow.Value
									then
										--// this allows you to fire your bow before aiming in.
										Arguments[2] = 50
										OldPlayAnimation(unpack(Arguments))
										return { Length = 0.014 }
									end

									if
										Arguments[1] == "Bolt"
										and Framework.Flags.InstantBolt
										and Framework.Flags.InstantBolt.Value
									then
										--// instant bolt aka the invalid machine but people love it! idk why.
										Arguments[2] = 50
										OldPlayAnimation(unpack(Arguments))
										return { Length = 0.014 }
									end

									return OldPlayAnimation(unpack(Arguments))
								end)
							)
						end
						--
						if FunctionName == "InventoryServer" and FunctionSource:find("InventoryController") then
							local Table = getupvalue(Function, 4)
							--// this table contains your toolbar, inventory, and armor list; maybe i do something with armor..
							Framework.InventoryControllerTable = Table
						end
						--
						if FunctionName == "QuickStackItem" then
							if not Framework.QuickStackFunctions then
								Framework.QuickStackFunctions = {}
							end
							table.insert(Framework.QuickStackFunctions, Function)
						end
						--
						if FunctionName == "CameraShake" then
							--// your camera shakes normally on like vfx, but this will remove that. also this technically isnt neccessary if you have remove bobbing on anyway lol
							local Old
							Old = hookfunction(
								Function,
								LPH_NO_UPVALUES(function(...)
									if Framework.Flags.RemoveShake and Framework.Flags.RemoveShake.value then
										return
									end
									return Old(...)
								end)
							)
						end
						--
						if
							Constants[2] == "Forward"
							and FunctionSource:find("StateAssetController")
							and type(debug.getupvalue(Function, 1)) == "table"
						then
							Framework.DirectionsTable = debug.getupvalue(Function, 1)
						end
						--
						local Positions = {}
						if
							FunctionSource:find("StateAssetController")
							and table.find(Constants, "BloodMarker")
							and not isfunctionhooked(Function)
						then
							local BloodMarker
							BloodMarker = hookfunction(
								Function,
								LPH_NO_UPVALUES(function(...)
									local Arguments = { ... }

									--// fallen please explain why you are telling the client who hit them? you only need to replicate position lol

									local Float = Arguments[1] --// idk what this is yet
									local Type = Arguments[2] --// Can be a player, fire, bleeding, etc
									local Position = Arguments[3]

									if
										Framework.Flags.ESPAttackers.Value
										and Players:FindFirstChild(tostring(Type))
										and not Positions[Position]
										and not Framework.Respawning
									then --// convert to string just incase ig
										Positions[Position] = true
										local Player = Players:FindFirstChild(tostring(Type))
										task.spawn(function()
											AttackerEvent:Fire(Player, Position)
										end) --// sigma (wrap in new thread so we dont interfere with fallens bs)
									end
									return BloodMarker(...)
								end)
							)
						end
					end
				end

				if Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
					for _, Connection in next, getconnections(Character.Humanoid.StateChanged) do
						if Connection.Function then
							local Source = debug.getinfo(Connection.Function).source
							if Source:find("ViewmodelController") and not isfunctionhooked(Connection.Function) then
								if LPH_OBFUSCATED then
									local AlwaysGrounded
									AlwaysGrounded = hookfunction(
										Connection.Function,
										LPH_NO_UPVALUES(function(...)
											local Arguments = { ... }

											if
												Framework.Flags.AlwaysGrounded.Value
												and Character.Humanoid.Health > 0.5
											then
												local Arguments = { ... }

												Arguments[1] = Enum.HumanoidStateType.Running
												Arguments[2] = Enum.HumanoidStateType.Running
												return AlwaysGrounded(unpack(Arguments))
											end

											return AlwaysGrounded(...)
										end)
									)
								else
									local AlwaysGrounded
									AlwaysGrounded = hookfunction(Connection.Function, function(...)
										if Framework.Flags.AlwaysGrounded.Value and Character.Humanoid.Health > 0.5 then
											local Arguments = { ... }

											Arguments[1] = Enum.HumanoidStateType.Running
											Arguments[2] = Enum.HumanoidStateType.Running
											return AlwaysGrounded(unpack(Arguments))
										end

										return AlwaysGrounded(...)
									end)
								end
							end
						end
					end
				end
				--
				task.wait(1)
				Framework.Respawning = false
			end)

			local Swing = LPH_JIT_MAX(function(Remote, Hash, Arguments)
				VectorUtil:FireRemote(Remote, Hash, Arguments)
			end)

			local Hit = LPH_JIT_MAX(function(Time, MeleeArguments)
				local ServerTime = Time or Workspace:GetServerTimeNow()
				local Seed = ServerTime * 10000
				local RoundedSeed = math.round(Seed)
				local RandomCode = Random.new(RoundedSeed):NextInteger(1, 1000000000)
				local RandomCode2 = Random.new(RoundedSeed):NextInteger(1, 10000000000)

				local Table = {
					MeleeArguments[1], -- Random Fuckass number
					MeleeArguments[2], -- CF
					MeleeArguments[3], -- TargetPart
					MeleeArguments[4], -- Angle
					MeleeArguments[5], -- Root To Tip
					MeleeArguments[6], -- Material
					RandomCode, -- used for  hashing
					RandomCode2, -- used for  hashing
				}

				do --// the logic for actual kill aura is here. the ones in the loop ive left are fake,
					--  because people kept trying to reverse it, i left unobfed arguments that actually ban you! and hid hashing
					local OriginCFrame = Table[2]
					local OriginPosition = OriginCFrame.Position
					local TargetPosition = Table[3].Position
					local Delta = TargetPosition - OriginPosition

					local Distance = Delta.Magnitude + 20
					local Direction = Delta.Unit * Distance
					local Parent = Table[3].Parent
					local AdjustedHitPosition

					local Params2 = RaycastParams.new()
					Params2.FilterDescendantsInstances = { Parent }
					Params2.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Whitelist
					Params2.IgnoreWater = true

					local Result = Workspace:Raycast(OriginPosition, Direction, Framework.Params)
					local Result2 = Workspace:Raycast(OriginPosition, Direction, Params2)
					if Result and Result.Instance then
						if Result.Normal.Magnitude ~= 1 then
							Table[5] = Result.Normal
						end

						if Result2 and Result2.Normal then
							Table[5] = Result2.Normal
						end
						local HitPos = Result.Position
						Table[4] = Table[3].CFrame:PointToObjectSpace(HitPos)

						if Parent:FindFirstChild("Hair") and Framework.Flags.KillAuraThroughWalls.Value then --// wallbang shit
							local magnitude = (HitPos - TargetPosition).Magnitude
							local EntityData = Framework.Entities.Cache[Players:FindFirstChild(Parent.Name)]
							--// if theyre too far behind the wall you get banned so
							--// and for some fucking reason args 5 keeps getting raped idk why
							if magnitude <= 9 and Parent.Hair:FindFirstChild("Head") then
								AdjustedHitPosition = HitPos
								Table[3] = Parent.Hair.Head

								if AdjustedHitPosition then
									Table[4] = Table[3].CFrame:PointToObjectSpace(AdjustedHitPosition)
								end

								-- v577 = raycast[2] / hit pos
								-- v_u_545 = v557
								-- p349[1] = HitPart
								-- p349[1] = v_u_541
								-- p349[2] = v_u_545
								-- v353 = p349[1];
								-- v354 = p349[2];

								-- args[5] = return 3 of raycast
								-- therefore

								-- args[4] = HitPart.CFrame:PointToObjectSpace(HitPosition)
								--
							end
						else
							if not Result.Instance:IsDescendantOf(Parent) then
								return
							end
						end
					end
				end

				if
					typeof(Table[3]) == "Instance"
					and typeof(Table[2]) == "CFrame"
					and typeof(Table[5]) == "Vector3"
					and type(Table[8]) == "number"
				then
					task.spawn(function()
						Client.PlayerGui.Main.HitMarker.Visible = true
						Framework.CreateHitMarker(Table[3].Name == "Head" and "HitHead" or "Hit")
						for _ = 1, 2 do
							Client.PlayerGui.Main.HitMarker.Visible = true
						end
					end)

					pcall(function()
						VectorUtil:FireRemote(Remote, HitHash, Table)
					end)
				end
			end)

			local RunNoFall = LPH_JIT_MAX(function()
				local Old = Framework.Client.CurrentHumanoid.RootPart.Velocity
				for Index, Part in Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter:GetChildren() do
					if Part:IsA("MeshPart") or Part:IsA("BasePart") then
						Part.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 9999, 0)
					end
				end

				RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()
				for Index, Part in Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter:GetChildren() do
					if Part:IsA("MeshPart") or Part:IsA("BasePart") then
						Part.Velocity = Old
					end
				end
			end)

			do --// Properties
				DesyncAnim.AnimationId = "rbxassetid://13435049596"
				SelfHighlight.Enabled = false
				Framework.LastReloadTick = tick()
				Framework.Params = RaycastParams.new()
				ESPGUI.IgnoreGuiInset = true
				AttackerFolder.Name = "AttackerFolder"

				do --// ServerPosition
					ServerPosition["Name"] = Instance.new("TextLabel")
					ServerPosition["Distance"] = Instance.new("TextLabel")

					ServerPosition["Name"].FontFace = Framework.Fonts.Cache.TahomaBold
					ServerPosition["Name"].Text = "Name"
					ServerPosition["Name"].TextStrokeTransparency = 0
					ServerPosition["Name"].TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(128, 255, 128)
					ServerPosition["Name"].TextSize = 13.00
					ServerPosition["Name"].BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
					ServerPosition["Name"].BackgroundTransparency = 1
					ServerPosition["Name"].BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
					ServerPosition["Name"].BorderSizePixel = 0
					ServerPosition["Name"].Position = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
					ServerPosition["Name"].Size = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 13)
					ServerPosition["Name"].Name = "CustomItem"
					ServerPosition["Name"].Parent = ESPGUI
					ServerPosition["Name"].TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Bottom
					ServerPosition["Name"].Visible = false
					local stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke", ServerPosition["Name"])
					stroke.Thickness = 1
					stroke.Name = "stroke"
					ServerPosition["Distance"].FontFace = Framework.Fonts.Cache.TahomaBold
					ServerPosition["Distance"].Text = "Distance"
					ServerPosition["Distance"].TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
					ServerPosition["Distance"].TextSize = 13.00
					ServerPosition["Distance"].TextStrokeTransparency = 0
					ServerPosition["Distance"].BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
					ServerPosition["Distance"].BackgroundTransparency = 1
					ServerPosition["Distance"].BorderColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
					ServerPosition["Distance"].BorderSizePixel = 0
					ServerPosition["Distance"].Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, 12)
					ServerPosition["Distance"].Size = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 13)
					ServerPosition["Distance"].Name = "Distance"
					ServerPosition["Distance"].Parent = ServerPosition["Name"]
					local stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke", ServerPosition["Distance"])
					stroke.Thickness = 1
					stroke.Name = "stroke"
				end
			end

			do --// Connections
				AttackerEvent.Event:Connect(function(Player, Position)
					local Part = Instance.new("Part", AttackerFolder)
					Part.Name = "Attacker - " .. Player.Name
					Part.Transparency = 1
					Part.Anchored = true
					Part.CFrame = CFrame.new(Position, Vector3.new())

					local Distance = math.floor((Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p - Position).Magnitude)
					local Entity = Framework.Entities.Cache[Player]
					local CachedItem = Entity.CachedItem
					if Framework.Flags.NotifyAttackers.Value and tick() - LastNotify > 0.2 then
						LastNotify = tick()
						if CachedItem then
							Framework.Notify(
								"Attacker",
								Player.Name
									.. " struck you with a\n"
									.. CachedItem.Name
									.. " from "
									.. tostring(Distance)
									.. " studs away!",
								2
							)
						else
							Framework.Notify(
								"Attacker",
								Player.Name .. " struck you from \n" .. tostring(Distance) .. " studs away!",
								2
							)
						end
					end

					if Framework.Flags.RetaliateOnHit.Value then
						Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame = CFrame.new(Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p, Position)
					end

					Delay(Framework.Flags.AttackerLength.Value, function()
						Part:Destroy()
					end)
				end)

				Framework.OnClientCharacterAdded = OnClientCharacterAdded
				--
				Client.CharacterAdded:Connect(OnClientCharacterAdded)
			end
			--
			Framework:NewThread(
				"Character Thread",
				LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
					local Character = Framework.Client.GetCharacter()
					Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter = Character
					Framework.Client.CurrentHumanoid = Character and Framework.Client.GetHumanoid()

					if Framework.Client.CurrentHumanoid then
						local Humanoid = Framework.Client.CurrentHumanoid
						local RootPart = Humanoid.RootPart

						--// Bunnyhop
						if Framework.Flags.Bunnyhop.Value then
							local Jump = Humanoid.Jump
							local FloorMaterial = Humanoid.FloorMaterial
							if tostring(FloorMaterial) ~= "Air" and UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.Space) then
								Humanoid.Jump = true
							end
						end

						--// Remove Weather
						if Framework.Flags.RemoveWeather.Value and RootPart then
							local WeatherPart = RootPart:FindFirstChild("WeatherPart")
							if WeatherPart then
								WeatherPart:Destroy()
							end
						end

						--// Omnisprint
						if
							Framework.DirectionsTable
							and Framework.Flags.OmniSprint.Value
							and UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.Shift)
						then
							Framework.DirectionsTable.Left, Framework.DirectionsTable.Right, Framework.DirectionsTable.Backward, Framework.DirectionsTable.Crouch =
								false, false, false, false
							Framework.DirectionsTable.Forward, Framework.DirectionsTable.Sprint = true, true
							Framework.DirectionsTable.BackwardLeft, Framework.DirectionsTable.BackwardRight =
								false, false
							Framework.DirectionsTable.ForwardLeft, Framework.DirectionsTable.ForwardRight = false, false
						end

						--// Custom Client Character
						if Framework.Flags.CustomClientCharacter.Value then
							Framework.NeedsToResetMaterials = true
							ApplyVisualsToChildren(Character)
						elseif Framework.NeedsToResetMaterials then
							Framework.NeedsToResetMaterials = false
							ApplyVisualsToChildren(Character)
						end

						--// AutoReload
						if
							Framework.Flags.AutoReload.Value
							and tick() - LastReload > 1
							and Framework.CurrentViewmodel
						then
							LastReload = tick()
							pcall(Reload)
						end

						--// Raycast filter params
						Framework.Params.FilterDescendantsInstances = {
							Workspace:FindFirstChild("SpawnAreas"),
							Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter,
							Workspace:FindFirstChild("VFX"),
							Workspace:FindFirstChild("Plants"),
							Workspace:FindFirstChild("Drops"),
						}

						Framework.Params.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Blacklist
						Framework.Params.IgnoreWater = true

						--// Instant Loot
						if Framework.QuickStackFunctions and #Framework.QuickStackFunctions > 0 then
							local constant18 = Framework.Flags.InstantLoot.Value and 0 or 0.3
							local constant19 = Framework.Flags.InstantLoot.Value and 0 or 0.1
							for _, func in pairs(Framework.QuickStackFunctions) do
								debug.setconstant(func, 18, constant18)
								debug.setconstant(func, 19, constant19)
							end
						end

						--// ViewmodelController attributes
						if
							Character:FindFirstChild("ViewmodelController")
							and not Framework.Respawning
							and Humanoid.Health > 0.5
						then
							local VMController = Character.ViewmodelController
							if Framework.Flags.SprintWhileAttacking then
								VMController:SetAttribute("CanUse", true)
							end
							VMController:SetAttribute("DebugDisableScriptAnims", Framework.Flags.RemoveVMBobbing.Value)
						end

						--// FlashPart and FlashpartOrigin async update
						task.spawn(function()
							local VFX = Workspace:FindFirstChild("VFX")
							if VFX and VFX:FindFirstChild("VMs") then
								local Viewmodels = VFX.VMs:GetChildren()
								local FlashpartOrigin = Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame
								if #Viewmodels == 1 then
									local VM = Viewmodels[1]
									local Weapon = VM:FindFirstChild("Weapon")
									local FlashPart

									if Weapon then
										local Barrel = Weapon:FindFirstChild("FlashPart")
										local Attachments = Weapon:FindFirstChild("Attachments")

										FlashPart = Barrel

										--[[if Attachments then
                                        local SilencerFlash = Attachments:FindFirstChild("Silencer") and Attachments.Silencer:FindFirstChild("FlashPart")
                                        local CompensatorFlash = Attachments:FindFirstChild("Compensator") and Attachments.Compensator:FindFirstChild("FlashPart")
                                        local MuzzleBoostFlash = Attachments:FindFirstChild("Muzzle Boost") and Attachments["Muzzle Boost"]:FindFirstChild("FlashPart")
            
                                        FlashPart = SilencerFlash or CompensatorFlash or MuzzleBoostFlash or FlashPart
                                    end]]
									end

									if FlashPart and Framework.Targetting.TargetPart then
										FlashpartOrigin =
											CFrame.new(FlashPart.CFrame.p, Framework.Targetting.TargetPart.CFrame.p)
									end

									Framework.FlashPart = FlashPart
								else
									Framework.FlashPart = nil
								end

								Framework.FlashpartOrigin = FlashpartOrigin
							else
								Framework.FlashPart = nil
								Framework.FlashpartOrigin = nil
							end
						end)

						--// Root and root-to-ground vector
						local Root = Framework.Client.GetRoot()
						local RootToGround = Root and (Root.Position - Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)) or Vector3.new(0, 3, 0)

						--// KillAura circle lines rendering
						if Framework.Flags.KillAura.Value then
							local LineCount = Framework.Targetting.LineCount
							local CircleLines = Framework.Targetting.CircleLines
							local KillAuraColor = Framework.Flags.KillAuraColor.Value
							local KillAuraRadius = Framework.Flags.KillAuraRadius.Value
							local Camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera

							for i = 1, LineCount do
								local Angle1 = ((i - 1) / LineCount) * math.pi * 2
								local Angle2 = (i / LineCount) * math.pi * 2

								local From = RootToGround
									+ Vector3.new(math.cos(Angle1), 0, math.sin(Angle1)) * KillAuraRadius
								local To = RootToGround
									+ Vector3.new(math.cos(Angle2), 0, math.sin(Angle2)) * KillAuraRadius

								local ScreenFrom, FromVisible = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(From)
								local ScreenTo, ToVisible = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(To)

								local Line = CircleLines[i]
								if FromVisible or ToVisible then
									Line.Visible = true
									Line:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIStroke").Color = KillAuraColor
									RotateLine(
										Line,
										0,
										Vector2.new(ScreenFrom.X, ScreenFrom.Y),
										Vector2.new(ScreenTo.X, ScreenTo.Y)
									)
								else
									Line.Visible = false
								end
							end
						else
							for i = 1, Framework.Targetting.LineCount do
								Framework.Targetting.CircleLines[i].Visible = false
							end
						end

						--// Self highlight
						if Framework.Flags.HighlightCharacter.Value then
							SelfHighlight.Adornee = Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter
							SelfHighlight.Enabled = true
							SelfHighlight.FillColor = Framework.Flags.SelfFillColor.Value
							SelfHighlight.FillTransparency = Framework.Flags.SelfFillColor.Alpha
							SelfHighlight.OutlineColor = Framework.Flags.SelfOutlineColor.Value
							SelfHighlight.OutlineTransparency = Framework.Flags.SelfOutlineColor.Alpha
						else
							SelfHighlight.Enabled = false
						end

						--// Debug Camera
						task.spawn(function()
							local Humanoid = Framework.Client.CurrentHumanoid
							local Camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera

							if
								Framework.Flags.DebugCamera.Value
								and not Framework.Flags.Fly.Value
								and Humanoid.RootPart
							then
								if not Framework.DebugStarted then
									Framework.DebugStarted = tick()
								end

								Framework.NeedToReturn = true

								local CameraLookVector = Camera.CFrame.LookVector
								local NormalCameraLookVector = CameraLookVector

								if not Framework.SavedPosition then
									Framework.SavedPosition = Humanoid.RootPart.CFrame
								end

								sethiddenproperty(Humanoid.RootPart, "NetworkIsSleeping", true)

								local UpPos = Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
								local DownPos = Vector3.new(0, -1, 0)
								local NonePos = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)

								local BaseCFrame = Humanoid.RootPart.CFrame
								local IsUpPressed = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.E)
								local IsDownPressed = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.Q)
								local IsForwardPressed = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(119) -- W
								local IsBackwardPressed = UserInputService:IsKeyDown(115) -- S

								local ScreenPos, OnScreen = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(Framework.SavedPosition.p)

								if OnScreen then
									ServerPosition.Name.Text = "Server Position"
									ServerPosition.Distance.Text = tostring(
										math.floor((Camera.CFrame.p - Framework.SavedPosition.p).magnitude)
									) .. "s"
									ServerPosition.Name.Visible = true
									ServerPosition.Name.Position = UDim2.new(0, ScreenPos.X, 0, ScreenPos.Y)
								else
									ServerPosition.Name.Visible = false
								end

								Humanoid.RootPart.Anchored = true
								Humanoid.RootPart.Velocity = NonePos

								local Delta = Framework.Delta * Framework.Flags.DebugCameraSpeed.Value * 3

								local MovementVector = (
									Humanoid.MoveDirection
									+ (IsUpPressed and UpPos or NonePos)
									+ (IsDownPressed and DownPos or NonePos)
									+ (IsForwardPressed and Vector3.new(0, NormalCameraLookVector.Y, 0) or NonePos)
									+ (IsBackwardPressed and Vector3.new(0, -NormalCameraLookVector.Y, 0) or NonePos)
								) * Delta

								BaseCFrame += MovementVector

								local Position = BaseCFrame.p
								Humanoid.RootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(
									Position,
									Position + Vector3.new(CameraLookVector.X, 0, CameraLookVector.Z)
								)
								Humanoid.AutoRotate = false

								if Framework.Flags.BTRFly.Value then
									local BTR = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Events")
										and Workspace.Events:FindFirstChild("BTR")
									local BTRRoot = BTR and BTR:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
									if BTRRoot and isnetworkowner(BTRRoot) then
										BTRRoot.CFrame = Humanoid.RootPart.CFrame
									end
								end
							else
								Framework.DebugStarted = nil
								if Framework.NeedToReturn then
									Humanoid.AutoRotate = true
									ServerPosition.Name.Visible = false
									Framework.NeedToReturn = false
									sethiddenproperty(Humanoid.RootPart, "NetworkIsSleeping", false)

									for _, Value in pairs(Character:GetChildren()) do
										if Value:IsA("BasePart") then
											sethiddenproperty(Value, "NetworkIsSleeping", false)
										end
									end

									Humanoid.RootPart.CFrame = Framework.SavedPosition
									Humanoid.RootPart.Anchored = false
									Framework.SavedPosition = nil
								end
							end
						end)

						--// Speedhack
						task.spawn(function()
							if Framework.Flags.Speedhack.Value and not Framework.Flags.Fly.Value and Root then
								RunService.Heartbeat:Wait()
								local Direction = Humanoid.MoveDirection
								if Humanoid:GetState() ~= Enum.HumanoidStateType.Climbing then
									local SpeedValue = Framework.Flags.SpeedValue.Value
									Root.CFrame = Root.CFrame
										+ Vector3.new(Direction.X * SpeedValue / 10, 0, Direction.Z * SpeedValue / 10)
								end
							end
						end)

						--// AntiAim
						if Framework.Flags.AntiAim and Framework.Flags.AntiAim.Value then
							local Root = Humanoid.RootPart
							if Root then
								--// Yaw calculation
								local LookVector = Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.LookVector
								local Angle = -math.atan2(LookVector.Z, LookVector.X) + math.rad(-90)

								if Framework.Flags.YawBase.Value == "Random" then
									Angle = -math.atan2(LookVector.Z, LookVector.X + math.rad(math.random(-180, 120)))
								elseif Framework.Flags.YawBase.Value == "Spin" then
									Angle = -math.atan2(LookVector.Z, LookVector.X) + (tick() * 10) % 360
								elseif Framework.Flags.YawBase.Value == "None" then
									Angle = -math.atan2(LookVector.Z, LookVector.X) + math.rad(-90)
								end

								local Offset = math.rad(Framework.Flags.YawModifier.Value)
								local Angled = CFrame.new(Root.Position) * CFrame.Angles(0, Angle + Offset, 0)

								if
									(
										Framework.Flags.OSAA.Value and Framework.IsShooting
										or Framework.Flags.YawBase.Value == "Targets"
									)
									and Framework.Targetting.TargetPart
									and not Framework.KATarget
								then
									Angled = CFrame.new(Root.Position, Framework.Targetting.TargetPart.Position)
										* CFrame.Angles(0, Offset, 0)
								end

								local _, Y, _ = Angled:ToOrientation()
								Framework.AntiAimAngle = CFrame.new(Angled.Position) * CFrame.Angles(0, Y, 0)

								Root.CFrame = Framework.AntiAimAngle
								Humanoid.AutoRotate = false
							end

							--// Pitch calculation
							local Pitch = Framework.Flags.PitchModifier.Value
							local PitchBase = Framework.Flags.PitchBase.Value

							if PitchBase == "Down" then
								Pitch = 0.7
							elseif PitchBase == "Up" then
								Pitch = -0.7
							elseif PitchBase == "Nod" then
								Pitch = math.sin(tick() * 3)
							elseif PitchBase == "Random" then
								Pitch = math.random() / 10
							end

							Pitch = math.clamp(Pitch, -0.7, 0.7)

							local TorsoController = Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter:FindFirstChild("TorsoController")
							local Look = TorsoController and TorsoController:FindFirstChild("Look")
							if Look then
								Look:FireServer(Pitch, 0)
							end
						else
							if
								Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter:FindFirstChild("CameraController")
								and not Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter.CameraController:GetAttribute("FreeLooking")
							then
								Humanoid.AutoRotate = true
							end
						end
					else
						for i = 1, Framework.Targetting.LineCount do
							Framework.Targetting.CircleLines[i].Visible = false
						end
					end
				end),
				"Character"
			)

			Framework.HeartbeatStep = 0
			RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
				Framework.HeartbeatStep += 1
				local Character = Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter
				if not (Character and Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")) then
					if IsAnimating then
						IsAnimating:Stop()
						IsAnimating:Destroy()
						IsAnimating = nil
					end
					return
				end

				local Root = Character.HumanoidRootPart

				--// KillAura
				if Framework.KATarget and Framework.Flags.KillAura.Value then
					local Weapon = Workspace.VFX.VMs:GetChildren()[1]
					local WeaponData = Weapon and ToolInfo[Weapon.Name]
					local TargetModel = Framework.KATarget

					if TargetModel:IsA("Player") then
						TargetModel = TargetModel.Character
					end

					if
						TargetModel
						and WeaponData
						and rawget(WeaponData, "Weapon")
						and rawget(WeaponData.Weapon, "Cooldown")
					then
						local Cooldown = WeaponData.Weapon.Cooldown
						local Tip = Weapon:FindFirstChild("Weapon") and Weapon.Weapon:FindFirstChild("Main")
							or Weapon.Weapon:FindFirstChild("Handle")
						local Target = TargetModel:FindFirstChild("Head")

						local AttackCFrame = CFrame.new(Root.Position + Vector3.new(0, 3, 0), Target.Position)
						if tick() - LastSwing > Cooldown then
							LastSwing = tick()

							task.spawn(function()
								local Time = Workspace:GetServerTimeNow()
								Swing(Remote, Hash, { Weapon.Name, Time })
								task.wait(Framework.Flags.KADelay.Value)

								local RootToTip = Root.CFrame:PointToObjectSpace(Tip.Position)
								local Angle = (Client.Character.Head.Position - Target.Position).Unit

								if Framework.Flags.ThirdPerson.Value then
									local WorldModel = Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter:FindFirstChild(Weapon.Name)
									Tip = WorldModel and WorldModel:FindFirstChild("Handle")
									if not Tip then
										warn("Can't find tip")
										return
									end
									RootToTip = Root.CFrame:PointToObjectSpace(Tip.Position) / 10
								end

								if AttackCFrame and Target and Angle and RootToTip then
									Hit(
										Time,
										{ math.random(1, 3), AttackCFrame, Target, Angle, RootToTip, "Plastic", "", "" }
									)
								end
							end)
						end
					end
				end

				--// Fly
				task.spawn(function()
					if Framework.Flags.Fly.Value and not Framework.Respawning then
						local Humanoid = Framework.Client.CurrentHumanoid
						if Humanoid and Humanoid.Health > 0 then
							local Delta = Framework.Delta * Framework.Flags.FlySpeed.Value * 3
							local MoveVector = Humanoid.MoveDirection

							if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.E) then
								MoveVector += Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
							end
							if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.LeftControl) then
								MoveVector += Vector3.new(0, -1, 0)
							end
							if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(119) then
								MoveVector += Vector3.new(0, Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.LookVector.Y, 0)
							end
							if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(115) then
								MoveVector += Vector3.new(0, -Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.LookVector.Y, 0)
							end

							local MovementDelta = MoveVector * Delta
							local Position = Root.CFrame.Position + MovementDelta
							Humanoid.PlatformStand = false
							Root.Velocity = Vector3.zero
							Root.CFrame = CFrame.new(
								Position,
								Position
									+ Vector3.new(
										Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.LookVector.X,
										0,
										Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.LookVector.Z
									)
							)
						end
					end
				end)

				--// Infinite Fly Fall Correction
				if
					Framework.Flags.InfiniteFly.Value
					and Framework.Flags.Fly.Value
					and Framework.Client.CurrentHumanoid
					and Framework.Client.CurrentHumanoid.Health > 0
				then
					local Origin = Framework.Client.CurrentHumanoid.RootPart.Position
					local Result = Workspace:Raycast(Origin, Vector3.new(0, -1000, 0), Framework.Params)

					if Result and Result.Distance > 4 then
						task.spawn(function()
							local OldVel = Framework.Client.CurrentHumanoid.RootPart.Velocity
							for _, Part in Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter:GetChildren() do
								if Part:IsA("BasePart") or Part:IsA("MeshPart") then
									Part.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, -9999, 0)
								end
							end
							RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()
							for _, Part in Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter:GetChildren() do
								if Part:IsA("BasePart") or Part:IsA("MeshPart") then
									Part.Velocity = OldVel
								end
							end
						end)
					end
				end

				--// NoFall
				if
					Framework.Flags.NoFall.Value
					and not Framework.Flags.Fly.Value
					and Framework.Client.CurrentHumanoid
					and Framework.Client.CurrentHumanoid.Health > 0
				then
					local Origin = Framework.Client.CurrentHumanoid.RootPart.Position
					local Result = Workspace:Raycast(Origin, Vector3.new(0, -1000, 0), Framework.Params)

					if Result and Result.Distance > 10 then
						task.spawn(RunNoFall)
					end
				end
			end))
		end
		--
		do --// Lighting / Toolbar management
			local Modules = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Modules")
			local ToolInfo = Modules
				and Modules:FindFirstChild("ToolInfo")
				and require(Modules:FindFirstChild("ToolInfo"))
			local VectorUtil = Modules
				and Modules:FindFirstChild("VectorUtil")
				and require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.VectorUtil)
			local Remote = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Remotes")
				and ReplicatedStorage.Remotes:FindFirstChild(
					string.char(
						32,
						175,
						56,
						160,
						50,
						187,
						113,
						77,
						49,
						22,
						130,
						142,
						126,
						38,
						59,
						102,
						17,
						6,
						168,
						41,
						9,
						180,
						85,
						142,
						105,
						14,
						66,
						146,
						142,
						126
					)
				)

			local Hash = string.char(
				27,
				172,
				20,
				5,
				103,
				62,
				136,
				82,
				35,
				178,
				177,
				27,
				40,
				69,
				51,
				169,
				95,
				77,
				172,
				4,
				97,
				63,
				55,
				189,
				180,
				173,
				72,
				135,
				187,
				25
			)

			local ConsumeItem = LPH_JIT_MAX(function(Index, Name)
				task.spawn(function()
					Framework.Notify("Auto consume meds", "Consuming " .. Name .. "!")
				end)

				if Index and Name then
					pcall(function()
						VectorUtil:FireRemote(Remote, Hash, {
							Index,
							"Toolbar",
						})
					end)
					--// haha cant spam my console with that bullshit error anymore.... its totally not erroring guys i promise
				end
			end)

			local RunHeal = LPH_JIT_MAX(function(Item, BestItemIndex)
				local ID = Item.ID
				local ItemInfo = Framework.ItemInfoTable[ID]
				local Name = ItemInfo and ItemInfo.Name

				pcall(function()
					ConsumeItem(BestItemIndex, Name)
				end)
				Framework.Consuming = true

				local Cooldown = 0.3
				if ToolInfo[Name] then
					Cooldown += ToolInfo[Name].Weapon.Cooldown
				end

				Delay(Cooldown, function()
					Framework.Consuming = false
				end)
			end)
			--
			Framework:NewThread(
				"Lighting_Toolbar_MGR",
				LPH_JIT_MAX(function()
					if tick() - Framework.Database.LastTick > 30 and not LPH_OBFUSCATED then
						Framework.Database.LastTick = tick()
						Framework.Database.Users = Framework.Database:Get()
					end

					if Framework.Flags.EditAmbient.Value then
						Lighting.Ambient = Framework.Flags.Ambient.Value
						Lighting.Brightness = Framework.Flags.Brightness.Value
					end
					if Framework.Flags.EditTime.Value then
						Lighting.ClockTime = Framework.Flags.Time.Value
					end

					local ControllerTable = Framework.InventoryControllerTable
					local Toolbar = ControllerTable and rawget(ControllerTable, "Toolbar")
					local Armor = ControllerTable and rawget(ControllerTable, "Armor")
					local Inventory = ControllerTable and rawget(ControllerTable, "Inventory")

					if Toolbar and not Framework.Respawning then
						local BestItemIndex = nil
						local MaxHealthGain = 0

						local Humanoid = Framework.Client.CurrentHumanoid
						local CurrentHealth = Humanoid and Humanoid.Health or 100

						for Index, Item in Toolbar do
							if type(Item) == "table" then
								local ID = Item.ID
								local ItemInfo = Framework.ItemInfoTable[ID]
								local Name = ItemInfo and ItemInfo.Name

								if
									Framework.Flags.SkinChanger.Value
									and Framework.Flags["SkinChange_" .. Name]
									and Framework.Flags["SkinChange_" .. Name].Value
								then
									local SkinName = Framework.Flags["Skin_" .. Name].Value
									Item.Skin = SkinName
								end
							end
						end

						for Index, Item in Toolbar do
							if type(Item) == "table" then
								local ID = Item.ID
								local ItemInfo = Framework.ItemInfoTable[ID]
								local Name = ItemInfo and ItemInfo.Name

								if Framework.Flags.AutoConsumeMeds.Value and not Framework.Consuming then
									local ConsumableStats = rawget(ItemInfo, "ConsumableStats")
									local InstantHealth = ConsumableStats and ConsumableStats.Health or 0
									local HealthQueue = ConsumableStats and ConsumableStats.HQueue or 0
									local TotalProjectedHealth = CurrentHealth + InstantHealth + HealthQueue

									if
										(Name == "Bandage" or Name == "Medkit")
										and not Framework.Flags.IncludeMedkits.Value
									then
										continue
									end

									if
										(InstantHealth ~= 0 or HealthQueue ~= 0)
										and CurrentHealth < 100
										and TotalProjectedHealth <= Framework.Flags.AutoConsumeCeiling.Value
									then
										local TotalHeal = InstantHealth + HealthQueue
										if TotalHeal > MaxHealthGain then
											MaxHealthGain = TotalHeal
											BestItemIndex = Index
										end
									end
								end
							end
						end

						if
							BestItemIndex
							and Framework.Flags.AutoConsumeMeds.Value
							and not Framework.Consuming
							and CurrentHealth > 0.5
						then
							local Item = Toolbar[BestItemIndex]
							RunHeal(Item, BestItemIndex)
						end
					end
				end),
				"Render"
			)
		end
		--
		do --// chatspammer
			local LastTick = tick()
			local Phrases = {
				"iridescent on top",
				"Wow, imagine your fishy paste doesn't even have manipulation. heh.",
				"divine.land for the best fallen survival services. Alternates and more!",
				"Best fallen services at dot gg / divineland",
				"nhack is the best hack",
			}

			local RunChatbot = LPH_JIT_MAX(function()
				local Phrase = Phrases[math.random(1, #Phrases)]

				local ChatRemote = ReplicatedStorage.Remotes:FindFirstChild(
					string.char(
						96,
						35,
						40,
						91,
						98,
						164,
						149,
						39,
						30,
						15,
						96,
						175,
						70,
						174,
						182,
						135,
						163,
						50,
						76,
						163,
						104,
						183,
						141,
						3,
						50,
						142,
						28,
						14,
						48,
						109
					)
				)
				local ChatHash = string.char(
					113,
					112,
					81,
					144,
					109,
					55,
					138,
					180,
					22,
					36,
					121,
					67,
					5,
					157,
					74,
					71,
					60,
					141,
					148,
					82,
					79,
					115,
					10,
					151,
					83,
					101,
					91,
					78,
					50,
					108
				)
				local Arguments = { "GLOBAL", Phrase }

				VectorUtil:FireRemote(ChatRemote, ChatHash, Arguments)
			end)

			if
				ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Modules") and ReplicatedStorage.Modules:FindFirstChild("VectorUtil")
			then
				local VectorUtil = require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.VectorUtil)

				Framework:NewThread(
					"Chatbot/Hitmarkers",
					LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
						if
							Client.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild("Main")
							and Client.PlayerGui.Main:FindFirstChild("HitMarker")
						then
							if Framework.Flags.DynamicHitMarkers.Value and Framework.HitmarkerFlash then
								local Pos, _ = Framework.HitmarkerPos()
								Client.PlayerGui.Main.HitMarker.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new()
								Client.PlayerGui.Main.HitMarker.Position = UDim2.new(0, Pos.X, 0, Pos.Y)
							else
								Client.PlayerGui.Main.HitMarker.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.5, 0)
								Client.PlayerGui.Main.HitMarker.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
							end
						end

						if Framework.Flags.Chatbot and Framework.Flags.Chatbot.Value and tick() - LastTick > 3 then
							pcall(function()
								RunChatbot()
								LastTick = tick()
							end)
						end
					end),
					"Render"
				)
			end
		end
		--
		do --// Entities
			local GetDistanceFromCenter = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(part)
				local position = part
				if typeof(part) == "Instance" then
					position = part.CFrame.p
				end
				--
				local ScreenPosition, OnScreen = Workspace.CurrentCamera:WorldToViewportPoint(position)
				if OnScreen then
					local Center = Vector2.new(
						Workspace.CurrentCamera.ViewportSize.X / 2,
						Workspace.CurrentCamera.ViewportSize.Y / 2
					)
					return (Center - Vector2.new(ScreenPosition.X, ScreenPosition.Y)).Magnitude
				end
				--
				return math.huge
			end)

			Framework.GetDistanceFromCenter = GetDistanceFromCenter
			--
			Framework.Targetting.Functions.IsPartVisible = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Destination, Origin)
				if not Destination then
					return false
				end

				local Params = RaycastParams.new()
				Params.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Blacklist
				Params.FilterDescendantsInstances =
					{ Workspace.CurrentCamera, Client.Character, Workspace:FindFirstChild("VFX") }

				local RaycastResult = Workspace:Raycast(Origin, (Destination.CFrame.p - Origin).Unit * 1100, Params)
				if RaycastResult and RaycastResult.Instance then
					if RaycastResult.Instance:IsDescendantOf(Destination.Parent) then
						return true
					end
				end
				return false
			end)
			--
			Framework.Targetting.Functions.CanWallbangTo = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(part, FromPosition, Penetration)
				if FromPosition then
					local direction = (part.Position - FromPosition)
					local ray = Workspace:Raycast(FromPosition, direction.Unit * 2048, Framework.RaycastParams)
					if ray then
						local distance = (part.Position - ray.Position).Magnitude
						return distance <= Penetration, ray.Position
					end
				end
				return false, nil
			end)

			Framework.Targetting.Functions.FindVisiblePosition = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Origin, Destination)
				local OriginalDestination = Destination
				if typeof(Destination) ~= "Vector3" then
