					Destination = Destination.Position
				end
				if typeof(Origin) ~= "Vector3" then
					Origin = Origin.Position
				end

				local CameraCFrame = Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame

				local function IsPartVisible(pos)
					return Framework.Targetting.Functions.IsPartVisible(OriginalDestination, pos)
				end

				if IsPartVisible(Origin) then
					return Origin
				end

				local ManipulationOffsets = {
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(3, 0, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(-3, 0, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(-6, 0, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(6, 0, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(3, 2, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(-3, 2, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(-6, 2, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(6, 2, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(4, 0, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(-4, 2, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(-4, 0, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(4, 2, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(7, 0, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(-7, 2, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(-7, 0, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(7, 2, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(0.2, 3.9, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(1.8, 4.1, 1),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(2.1, 4.4, 1.1),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(0.15, 5.2, 0.1),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(-1.8, 5.4, -0.2),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(-2.3, 6.35, -0.4),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(0.1, 7.5, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(0.1, 8, 0),
					CameraCFrame * CFrame.new(0.1, 8, 0),
				}

				local wallbangEnabled = Framework.Flags.Wallbang.Value
				local Penetration = Framework.Flags.WallbangPenCheck.Value

				for _, offset in ipairs(ManipulationOffsets) do
					local newOrigin = offset.Position

					if IsPartVisible(newOrigin) then
						return newOrigin
					elseif wallbangEnabled then
						local CanWallbang, WallbangHit =
							Framework.Targetting.Functions.CanWallbangTo(OriginalDestination, newOrigin, Penetration)
						if CanWallbang then
							return newOrigin, true
						end
					end
				end

				return nil
			end)
			--
			do --// Flags
				Framework.Entities.Functions.AddFlag({
					Name = "Iridescent",
					Flag = "Iridescent",
					Text = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
						return "IRIDESCENT"
					end),
					Allow = LPH_JIT_MAX(function(self)
						if
							self.ClassType == "Player"
							and Framework.Database.Users[tostring(self.Object.UserId)]
							and not LPH_OBFUSCATED
						then
							return true
						end
					end),
				})

				Framework.Entities.Functions.AddFlag({
					Name = "VIP",
					Flag = "VIP",
					Text = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
						return "VIP"
					end),
					Allow = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
						local Object = self.Object
						return Object and Object:GetAttribute("VIP")
					end),
				})

				Framework.Entities.Functions.AddFlag({
					Name = "Visible",
					Flag = "Visible",
					Text = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
						--[[if self.VisiblePart then 
                            if self.VisiblePart.Name == "HairPart" then 
                                return "Wallbang: Head";
                            end;

                            return "Visible: "..self.VisiblePart.Name;
                        end;]]
						--
						return "VIS"
					end),
					Allow = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
						local Character = self.Character
						local Visible = false
						local VisiblePart = nil
						for _, part in Framework.PartsTable do
							local FoundPart = Character:FindFirstChild(part)
							if FoundPart then
								local IsVisible = Framework.Targetting.Functions.IsPartVisible(
									FoundPart,
									Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p
								)
								if IsVisible then
									VisiblePart = FoundPart
									Visible = true
									break
								end
							end
						end
						self.VisiblePart = VisiblePart
						self.Visible = Visible
						return Visible
					end),
				})
				--
				Framework.Entities.Functions.AddFlag({
					Name = "Aiming",
					Flag = "Aiming",
					Text = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
						return "AIM"
					end),
					Allow = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
						if self.Character and self.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
							local Animations = self.Character.Humanoid:GetPlayingAnimationTracks()
							local Weapon = self.CachedItem
							local WeaponName = Weapon and WeaponName
							local Root = self.Character.Humanoid.RootPart
							if Root then
								local CanReturn = false
								if Weapon and WeaponName == "Wooden Bow" then
									if
										Root
										and Root:FindFirstChild("Wooden BowDraw")
										and Root:FindFirstChild("Wooden BowDraw").IsPlaying
									then
										return true
									end
								end

								for Index, Value in ipairs(Animations) do
									if Value.Animation.AnimationId == "rbxassetid://10982316984" then
										CanReturn = true
										break
									end
								end
								return CanReturn
							end
						end
						return false
					end),
				})
				--
				Framework.Entities.Functions.AddFlag({
					Name = "Reloading",
					Flag = "Reloading",
					Text = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
						return "RELOAD"
					end),
					Allow = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
						local Root = self.Character and self.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
						local Weapon = self.CachedItem
						local WeaponName = Weapon and Weapon.Name
						if Root and WeaponName then
							local MagIn = Root:FindFirstChild(WeaponName .. "MagIn")
							local MagOut = Root:FindFirstChild(WeaponName .. "MagOut")

							if WeaponName == "Crossbow" then
								MagIn = Root:FindFirstChild("CrossbowPlaceArrow")
								MagOut = Root:FindFirstChild("CrossbowPull")
							end

							if MagIn and MagOut and (MagIn.IsPlaying or MagOut.IsPlaying) then
								return true
							end
						end
						return false
					end),
				})

				--
				Framework.Entities.Functions.AddFlag({
					Name = "Healing",
					Flag = "Healing",
					Text = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
						return "HEAL"
					end),
					Allow = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
						if self.Character and self.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
							local Animations = self.Character.Humanoid:GetPlayingAnimationTracks()
							for Index, Track in Animations do
								local Id = Track.Animation.AnimationId
								if Id == "rbxassetid://14860445359" or Id == "rbxassetid://2529243689" then
									return true
								end
							end
						end
						return false
					end),
				})

				Framework.Entities.Functions.AddFlag({
					Name = "Manipulated",
					Flag = "MANIP",
					Text = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
						if self.ManipulatedPart.Name == "HairPart" then
							return "Manipulated: Wallbang"
						end
						--
						return "Manipulated: " .. self.ManipulatedPart.Name
					end),

					Allow = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
						if self == Framework.Targetting.TargetData and Framework.Targetting.ManipulatedPosition then
							return true
						end
						return false
					end),
				})

				Framework.Entities.Functions.AddFlag({
					Name = "Staff",
					Flag = "Staff",
					Text = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
						return "STAFF: " .. Framework.FlaggedStaff[self.Object]
					end),

					Allow = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
						return Framework.FlaggedStaff[self.Object]
					end),
				})
			end
			--
			do --// Players
				LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
					local FlaggedRoles = {
						"OG",
						"Game Tester",
						"Game Moderator",
						"Developers",
						"Lead Developer",
						"Co-Founder",
						"Founder",
					}
					--
					local function HandlePlayer(Player)
						if Player == Client or not Player:IsA("Player") then
							return
						end

						pcall(function()
							local Role
							if Player:IsInGroup(1154360) then
								Role = Player:GetRoleInGroup(1154360)
								if table.find(FlaggedRoles, Role) then
									Framework.Notify("Staff detected!", Player.Name .. " - " .. Role, 10)
									Framework.ModeratorPanel:New(Player, Player.Name, Role)
									Framework.FlaggedStaff[Player] = Role
								end
							end

							if Framework.AdminList[Player.UserId] and not Framework.FlaggedStaff[Player] then
								Role = Framework.AdminList[Player.UserId]
								Framework.Notify("Staff detected!", Player.Name .. " - " .. Role, 10)
								Framework.ModeratorPanel:New(Player, Player.Name, Role)
								Framework.FlaggedStaff[Player] = Role
							end

							Framework.Entities.Functions.New(Player, {
								Class = "Player",
								ClassType = "Player",
								Character = Player.Character,
							})
						end)
					end

					for _, Player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
						HandlePlayer(Player)
					end

					Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(HandlePlayer)

					Players.ChildRemoved:Connect(function(Player)
						local Cache = Framework.Entities.Cache[Player]
						DebugPrint("Player, ", Player, "has left the datamodel")
						if Cache then
							DebugPrint("Removing player,", Player, "from esp cache")
							Cache.Components.OffscreenArrow:Destroy()
							Cache.Components.BoxOutline:Destroy()
							Framework.Entities.Cache[Player] = nil
						end

						if Framework.FlaggedStaff[Player] then
							local WorkspaceUI = Framework.ModeratorPanel.Elements["ModeratorsWorkspace"]
							local ModEntry = WorkspaceUI:FindFirstChild(Player.Name)
							if ModEntry then
								ModEntry:Destroy()
							end
							Framework.FlaggedStaff[Player] = nil
						end
					end)
				end)()
			end
			--
			do --// Object Listeners
				LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
					local HttpService = Framework.GetService("HttpService")
					local Nodes = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Nodes")
					local Drops = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Drops")
					local Bases = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Bases")
					local Plants = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Plants")
					local FixedNames = {
						["Metal_Node"] = "Metal node",
						["Phosphate_Node"] = "Phosphate node",
						["Stone_Node"] = "Stone node",
					}

					if Nodes then
						Framework.MiscEntities.Functions.AddListener({
							Parent = Nodes,
							ClassName = "Model",
							Listener = "NodeListener",
							Flag = "Nodes",
							GetColor = function(Data)
								local Name = FixedNames[Data.Object.Name]
								return Framework.Flags[Name .. "Color"].Value
							end,
							GetAlpha = function(Data)
								local Name = FixedNames[Data.Object.Name]
								return Framework.Flags[Name .. "Color"].Alpha
							end,
							GetName = function(Data)
								local HealthPercent = math.floor(
									(Data.Object:GetAttribute("Health") / Data.Object:GetAttribute("MaxHealth")) * 100
								)
								local Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
									:lerp(Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0), HealthPercent / 100)
								local Name = FixedNames[Data.Object.Name]
								local NameColor = Framework.Flags[Name .. "Color"].Value
								return ("<font color='rgb(%d,%d,%d)'>[%s]</font> <font color='rgb(%d,%d,%d)'>%s</font>"):format(
									Color.R * 255,
									Color.G * 255,
									Color.B * 255,
									tostring(HealthPercent) .. "%",
									NameColor.R * 255,
									NameColor.G * 255,
									NameColor.B * 255,
									Name
								)
							end,
							GetPosition = function(Data)
								return Data.Object:FindFirstChild("Main")
									and Data.Object:FindFirstChild("Main").CFrame.p
							end,
							GetDistance = function(Data)
								return Data.Object:FindFirstChild("Main")
									and math.floor(
										(Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p - Data.Object:FindFirstChild("Main").CFrame.p).Magnitude
									)
							end,
							Validate = function(Data)
								local Name = FixedNames[Data.Object.Name]
								return Framework.Flags[Name .. "CanShow"].Value
							end,
						})
					end
					--
					if Drops then
						local ItemColors = {
							["Misc"] = Color3.fromRGB(210, 210, 210),
							["Gun"] = Color3.fromRGB(214, 20, 20),
							["Ammo"] = Color3.fromRGB(214, 50, 50),
							["Consumable"] = Color3.fromRGB(50, 214, 50),
							["Bench"] = Color3.fromRGB(210, 210, 210),
							["Attachment"] = Color3.fromRGB(252, 215, 3),
							["Resource"] = Color3.fromRGB(3, 252, 161),
							["Lock"] = Color3.fromRGB(210, 210, 210),
							["Tool"] = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255),
							["Armor"] = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 183),
						}

						Framework.MiscEntities.Functions.AddListener({
							Parent = Drops,
							ClassName = "Model",
							Listener = "ItemListener",
							Flag = "Items",
							GetColor = function(Data)
								return Framework.Flags["ItemsColor"].Value
							end,
							GetAlpha = function(Data)
								return Framework.Flags["ItemsColor"].Alpha
							end,
							GetName = function(Data)
								if not Data.DecodedInformation then
									local Item = Data.Object:FindFirstChild("Item")
									Item = HttpService:JSONDecode(Item.Value)
									local ID = Item.ID
									local Amount = Item.Amount

									local ItemInfo = Framework.ItemInfoTable[ID]
									local Type = ItemInfo.Type
									Data.Type = Type
									Data.DecodedInformation = {
										ID = ID,
										Amount = Amount,
									}
								end

								local Color = ItemColors[Data.Type]
								local Name = Data.Object.Name
								local NameColor = Framework.Flags["ItemsColor"].Value

								if Data.DecodedInformation.Amount > 1 then
									Name = Name .. " x" .. tostring(Data.DecodedInformation.Amount)
								end
								return ("<font color='rgb(%d,%d,%d)'>[%s]</font> <font color='rgb(%d,%d,%d)'>%s</font>"):format(
									Color.R * 255,
									Color.G * 255,
									Color.B * 255,
									Data.Type,
									NameColor.R * 255,
									NameColor.G * 255,
									NameColor.B * 255,
									Name
								)
							end,
							GetPosition = function(Data)
								return Data.Object.PrimaryPart and Data.Object.PrimaryPart.CFrame.p
							end,
							GetDistance = function(Data)
								return Data.Object.PrimaryPart
									and math.floor(
										(Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p - Data.Object.PrimaryPart.CFrame.p).Magnitude
									)
							end,
							Validate = function(Data)
								if Data.Object:FindFirstChild("Item") then
									if not Data.DecodedInformation then
										local Item = Data.Object:FindFirstChild("Item")
										Item = HttpService:JSONDecode(Item.Value)
										local ID = Item.ID
										local Amount = Item.Amount

										local ItemInfo = Framework.ItemInfoTable[ID]
										local Type = ItemInfo.Type
										Data.Type = Type
										Data.DecodedInformation = {
											ID = ID,
											Amount = Amount,
										}
									end
									return Framework.Flags["Include" .. Data.Type].Value
								end
							end,
						})

						Framework.MiscEntities.Functions.AddListener({
							Parent = Framework.GetService("CoreGui").Raids,
							ClassName = "Part",
							Listener = "RaidListener",
							Flag = "Raids",
							GetName = function(Data)
								local Object = Data.Object
								local Type = Object.Name
								local Time = tostring(math.floor(tick() - Object.StartedAt.Value))

								return "Potential Raid - " .. Object.Name .. "\n" .. tostring(Time) .. " seconds ago"
							end,
							GetPosition = function(Data)
								return Data.Object and Data.Object.CFrame.p
							end,
							GetDistance = function(Data)
								return Data.Object
									and math.floor((Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p - Data.Object.CFrame.p).Magnitude)
							end,
							Validate = function(Data)
								return true
							end,
						})

						Framework.MiscEntities.Functions.AddListener({
							Parent = Framework.GetService("CoreGui").AttackerFolder,
							ClassName = "Part",
							Listener = "AttackerListener",
							Flag = "Attackers",
							GetName = function(Data)
								return Data.Object.Name
							end,
							GetPosition = function(Data)
								return Data.Object and Data.Object.CFrame.p
							end,
							GetDistance = function(Data)
								return Data.Object
									and math.floor((Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p - Data.Object.CFrame.p).Magnitude)
							end,
							Validate = function(Data)
								return true
							end,
						})
					end
					--
					if Bases then
						local Loners = Bases:FindFirstChild("Loners")
						local TimedCrate = Loners:FindFirstChild("Timed Crate")
						local Sleeper = Loners:FindFirstChild("Sleeper")

						if TimedCrate then
							Framework.MiscEntities.Functions.AddListener({
								Parent = TimedCrate,
								ClassName = "Model",
								Listener = "TimedCrateListener",
								Flag = "TimedCrates",
								GetName = function(Data)
									local Name = Data.Object.Name
									local NameColor = Framework.Flags["TimedCratesMiscColor"].Value
									local Timer = Data.Object:FindFirstChild("Timer")
									local GuiHolder = Timer and Timer:FindFirstChild("GuiHolder")
									local SurfaceGui = GuiHolder and GuiHolder:FindFirstChild("Label")
									--workspace.Bases.Loners["Timed Crate"]["Timed Crate"].Timer.GuiHolder.Label
									local TextLabel = SurfaceGui and SurfaceGui:FindFirstChild("TextLabel")
									local TimeRemaining = TextLabel and TextLabel.Text or "12:00"

									return ("<font color='rgb(%d,%d,%d)'>[%s]</font> <font color='rgb(%d,%d,%d)'>%s</font>"):format(
										TextLabel.TextColor3.R * 255,
										TextLabel.TextColor3.G * 255,
										TextLabel.TextColor3.B * 255,
										TimeRemaining,
										NameColor.R * 255,
										NameColor.G * 255,
										NameColor.B * 255,
										Name
									)
								end,
								GetPosition = function(Data)
									return Data.Object.PrimaryPart and Data.Object.PrimaryPart.CFrame.p
								end,
								GetDistance = function(Data)
									return Data.Object.PrimaryPart
										and math.floor(
											(Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p - Data.Object.PrimaryPart.CFrame.p).Magnitude
										)
								end,
								Validate = function(Data)
									return true
								end,
							})
						end
						--
						if Loners then
							local CarePackage = Loners:FindFirstChild("Care Package")
							local BodyBag = Loners:FindFirstChild("Body Bag")
							if CarePackage then
								Framework.MiscEntities.Functions.AddListener({
									Parent = CarePackage,
									ClassName = "Model",
									Listener = "CarePackageListener",
									Flag = "CarePackages",
									GetName = function(Data)
										local Name = Data.Object.Name
										return Name
									end,
									GetPosition = function(Data)
										return Data.Object.PrimaryPart and Data.Object.PrimaryPart.CFrame.p
									end,
									GetDistance = function(Data)
										return Data.Object.PrimaryPart
											and math.floor(
												(Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p - Data.Object.PrimaryPart.CFrame.p).Magnitude
											)
									end,
									Validate = function(Data)
										return true
									end,
								})
							end

							if BodyBag then
								Framework.MiscEntities.Functions.AddListener({
									Parent = BodyBag,
									ClassName = "Model",
									Name = "Body Bag",
									Listener = "BodyBagListener",
									Flag = "BodyBags",
									GetName = function(Data)
										local Name = Data.Object.Name
										local OwnerName = Data.Object:GetAttribute("OwnerName")

										local FixedName = Name .. " - " .. OwnerName
										return FixedName
									end,
									GetPosition = function(Data)
										return Data.Object.PrimaryPart and Data.Object.PrimaryPart.CFrame.p
									end,
									GetDistance = function(Data)
										return Data.Object.PrimaryPart
											and math.floor(
												(Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p - Data.Object.PrimaryPart.CFrame.p).Magnitude
											)
									end,
									Validate = function(Data)
										return true
									end,
								})
							end
						end
						--
						if Sleeper then
							Framework.MiscEntities.Functions.AddListener({
								Parent = Sleeper,
								ClassName = "Model",
								Listener = "SleeperListener",
								Flag = "Sleepers",
								GetName = function(Data)
									local Name = Data.Object.Name
									local OwnerName = "Owner"
									local NameTag = Data.Object:FindFirstChild("NameTag")
									local Label = NameTag and NameTag:FindFirstChild("Label")
									OwnerName = Label and Label.Text or OwnerName

									local FixedName = Name .. " - " .. OwnerName
									return FixedName
								end,
								GetPosition = function(Data)
									return Data.Object.PrimaryPart and Data.Object.PrimaryPart.CFrame.p
								end,
								GetDistance = function(Data)
									return Data.Object.PrimaryPart
										and math.floor(
											(Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p - Data.Object.PrimaryPart.CFrame.p).Magnitude
										)
								end,
								Validate = function(Data)
									return true
								end,
							})
						end
					end
					--
					if Plants then
						Framework.MiscEntities.Functions.AddListener({
							Parent = Plants,
							Name = "Wool Plant",
							Listener = "WoolListener",
							Flag = "WoolPlants",
							GetName = function(Data)
								local Name = Data.Object.Name
								return Name
							end,
							GetPosition = function(Data)
								return Data.Object.PrimaryPart and Data.Object.PrimaryPart.CFrame.p
							end,
							GetDistance = function(Data)
								return Data.Object.PrimaryPart
									and math.floor(
										(Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p - Data.Object.PrimaryPart.CFrame.p).Magnitude
									)
							end,
							Validate = function(Data)
								return true
							end,
						})
					end

					do --// AI
						if Workspace:FindFirstChild("Military") then
							--workspace.Animals:GetChildren()[19].Detail.RootPart
							local Animals = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Animals")
							if Animals then
								Animals.ChildAdded:Connect(function(Animal)
									Framework.Entities.Functions.New(Animal, {
										Class = "Animal",
										ClassType = "Animal",
										Character = Animal,
										Clan = "Animal",
									})
								end)

								for Index, Animal in Animals:GetChildren() do
									Framework.Entities.Functions.New(Animal, {
										Class = "Animal",
										ClassType = "Animal",
										Character = Animal,
										Clan = "Animal",
									})
								end

								Animals.ChildRemoved:Connect(function(Animal)
									if Framework.Entities.Cache[Animal] then
										DebugPrint("Removing Animal,", Animal, "from esp cache")
										Framework.Entities.Cache[Animal].Components.OffscreenArrow:Destroy()
										Framework.Entities.Cache[Animal].Components.BoxOutline:Destroy()
										Framework.Entities.Cache[Animal] = nil
									end
								end)
							end
							--
							local function AddSoldier(Soldier)
								if Soldier:IsA("Model") and Soldier:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then
									local Class = "AI"
									if
										Soldier.Name == "Boris"
										or Soldier.Name == "Brutis"
										or Soldier.Name == "Brutus"
										or Soldier.Name == "Bruno"
									then
										Class = "Boss"
									end
									--
									Framework.Entities.Functions.New(Soldier, {
										Class = "AI",
										ClassType = Class,
										Character = Soldier,
										Clan = Class,
									})
								end
							end

							local function RemoveSoldier(Soldier)
								if Framework.Entities.Cache[Soldier] then
									DebugPrint("Removing AI,", Soldier, "from esp cache")
									Framework.Entities.Cache[Soldier].Components.OffscreenArrow:Destroy()
									Framework.Entities.Cache[Soldier].Components.BoxOutline:Destroy()
									Framework.Entities.Cache[Soldier] = nil
								end
							end
							--
							for Index, Value in next, Workspace.Military:GetChildren() do
								for _, Soldier in next, Value:GetChildren() do
									AddSoldier(Soldier)
								end

								Value.ChildAdded:Connect(function(Soldier)
									task.wait(0.3)
									AddSoldier(Soldier)
								end)

								Value.ChildRemoved:Connect(function(Soldier)
									RemoveSoldier(Soldier)
								end)
							end

							local Events = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Events")

							if Events then
								pcall(function()
									for _, Value in next, Events:GetChildren() do
										if Value.Name == "BTR" then
											Framework.Entities.Functions.New(Value, {
												Class = "AI",
												ClassType = "Boss",
												Character = Value,
												Clan = "Boss",
											})
										end
									end

									Events.ChildAdded:Connect(function(Value)
										if Value.Name == "BTR" then
											Framework.Entities.Functions.New(Value, {
												Class = "AI",
												ClassType = "Boss",
												Character = Value,
												Clan = "Boss",
											})
										end
									end)

									Events.ChildRemoved:Connect(function(Value)
										if Framework.Entities.Cache[Value] then
											DebugPrint("Removing BTR,", Value, "from esp cache")
											Framework.Entities.Cache[Value].Components.OffscreenArrow:Destroy()
											Framework.Entities.Cache[Value].Components.BoxOutline:Destroy()
											Framework.Entities.Cache[Value] = nil
										end
									end)
								end)
							end
						end
					end
				end)()
			end
			--
			local AnimalNames = {
				["PREFAB_ANIMAL_WILDBOAR"] = "Wild Boar",
				["PREFAB_ANIMAL_DEER"] = "Deer",
				["PREFAB_ANIMAL_WOLF"] = "Wolf",
			}

			local IgnoreNames = {
				["HairPart"] = true,
				["HeadPart"] = true,
				["HumanoidRootPart"] = true,
				["LeftHand"] = true,
				["RightHand"] = true,
			}

			local LastSwing = tick()
			local LastShootAttempt = tick()

			ApplyVisuals = LPH_JIT_MAX(function(Object, Instance)
				if (Instance:IsA("MeshPart") or Instance:IsA("BasePart")) and Instance.Transparency ~= 1 then
					Instance:SetAttribute("OriginalMaterial", Instance.Material)
					Instance:SetAttribute("OriginalColor", Instance.Color)

					if Instance:IsA("MeshPart") then
						Instance:SetAttribute("OriginalTextureId", Instance.TextureID)
					end

					if
						Framework.Flags.CustomCharacters.Value
						and Framework.Flags["Sandbox" .. Object.ClassType]
						and Framework.Flags["Sandbox" .. Object.ClassType].Value
					then
						Instance.Color = Framework.Flags[Object.ClassType .. "CharacterColor"].Value
						Instance.Material = Framework.Flags[Object.ClassType .. "CharacterMaterial"].Value
						if Instance:IsA("MeshPart") and Instance.Material == Enum.Material.ForceField then
							Instance.TextureID = "rbxassetid://10913193650"
						elseif Instance:IsA("MeshPart") and Instance.Material ~= Enum.Material.ForceField then
							Instance.TextureID = ""
						end
					else
						Instance.Color = Instance:GetAttribute("OriginalColor")
						Instance.Material = Instance:GetAttribute("OriginalMaterial")
						if Instance:IsA("MeshPart") then
							Instance.TextureID = Instance:GetAttribute("OriginalTextureId")
						end
					end
				end
			end)
			--
			Framework:NewThread(
				"Entity Loop",
				LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
					Framework.LOSIndicator.Text = ""
					local LastDistance, ClosestTarget, ActualTarget = nil, nil, nil
					local KADistance, KATargets, ActualKATarget = nil, {}, nil
					local ClientTeam = Client.Team
					local CameraPosition = Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p
					local ViewAngle = Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.lookVector

					local ArrowWidth = Framework.Flags.OffscreenWidth.Value
					local ArrowHeight = Framework.Flags.OffscreenHeight.Value
					local ArrowColor = Framework.Flags.OffscreenColor.Value
					local ArrowImageTransparency = Framework.Flags.OffscreenColor.Alpha
					local OffscreenRadius = Framework.Flags.OffscreenRadius.Value

					for Entity, Data in Framework.Entities.Cache do
						Data.Friendly = false
						--
						if Entity:IsA("Player") and not Data.Character then
							Data.Character = Entity.Character
						end
						--
						if Entity:IsA("Player") and Framework.Flags.IgnoreTMs.Value then
							local ClientTeam = tostring(Client.Team)
							local EntityTeam = tostring(Entity.Team)
							--
							if EntityTeam == "Attackers" and ClientTeam == "Attackers" then
								Data.Friendly = true
							end
							--
							if EntityTeam == "Defenders" and ClientTeam == "Defenders" then
								Data.Friendly = true
							end
						end
						--
						if
							Entity:IsA("Player")
							and Framework.Flags.IgnoreFriends.Value
							and Client:IsFriendsWith(Entity.UserId)
						then
							Data.Friendly = true
						end
						--
						local Components = Data.Components
						local Armor = Data.CachedArmor
						local Item = Data.CachedItem
						--
						local Clan = Data.Clan
						local Class = Data.Class
						local ClassType = Data.ClassType
						--
						local Character = Data.Character
						local Health, MaxHealth = Data:GetHealth()
						local Distance, Suffix = Data:GetDistance()
						--
						local BoxOutline = Components.BoxOutline
						local Box = Components.Box
						local BoxInnerStroke = Components.BoxInnerStroke
						local BoxOutlineStroke = Components.BoxOutlineStroke
						local BoxGlow = Components.BoxGlow
						--
						local ClothesList = Components.ClothesList
						--
						local FlagsLabel = Components.FlagsLabel
						local DistanceLabel = Components.DistanceLabel
						local NameLabel = Components.NameLabel
						local WeaponLabel = Components.WeaponLabel
						local Healthbar = Components.Healthbar
						local HealthbarGlow = Components.HealthbarGlow
						local HealthbarBlackout = Components.HealthbarBlackout
						local OffscreenArrow = Components.OffscreenArrow
						--
						local BoxData = Data:GetBoxSize()

						if BoxData then
							local Width = BoxData.Width
							local Height = BoxData.Height
							local OnScreen = BoxData.OnScreen
							local Center = BoxData.Center2D
							local Size = BoxData.Size
							local Position = BoxData.Position
							--
							if Character and Health > 0 then
								if ClassType == "Player" then
									local Highlight = Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Highlight")
									if Framework.Flags.Highlights.Value then
										if not Highlight then
											Highlight = Instance.new("Highlight", Character)
										end
										Highlight.FillColor = Framework.Flags.HighlightColor.Value
										Highlight.OutlineColor = Framework.Flags.OutlineColor.Value
										Highlight.Enabled = Framework.CanRender2 and Framework.CanRender
										Highlight.FillTransparency = Framework.Flags.HighlightColor.Alpha
										Highlight.OutlineTransparency = Framework.Flags.OutlineColor.Alpha
										Highlight.DepthMode = Framework.Flags.HighlightMode.Value
										Highlight.Adornee = Character
									else
										if Highlight then
											Highlight.Enabled = false
										end
									end

									local ClientHead = Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter
										and Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter:FindFirstChild("Head")
									local EnemyHead = Data.Character and Data.Character:FindFirstChild("Head")
									if EnemyHead and ClientHead and Framework.Flags.LockonIndicator.Value then
										local Delta = (ClientHead.Position - EnemyHead.Position)
										local Distance = Delta.Magnitude
										local Direction = Delta.Unit
										local LookVector = EnemyHead.CFrame.LookVector

										local DotProduct = LookVector:Dot(Direction)
										local CrossProduct = LookVector:Cross(Direction).Magnitude
										local Angle = math.deg(math.atan2(CrossProduct, DotProduct))

										local MaxAngle = math.clamp(60 - (Distance / 10), 15, 60)

										local Percentage =
											math.floor(math.clamp(100 - (Angle / MaxAngle * 100), 0, 100))

										local IsLooking = Angle <= MaxAngle

										local ThroughWalls = false
										local RayDistance = math.min(Distance + 5, 1000)
										local Result = Workspace:Raycast(
											EnemyHead.Position,
											Direction * RayDistance,
											Framework.Params
										)
										if Result then
											ThroughWalls =
												not Result.Instance:IsDescendantOf(Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter)
										end

										if
											IsLooking
											and Percentage
												>= math.max(Framework.Flags.LockonIndicatorThreshold.Value, 50)
										then
											Framework.LOSIndicator.Text = Framework.LOSIndicator.Text
												.. string.format(
													"%s %s (%d%%) [%d studs]\n",
													Entity.Name,
													ThroughWalls and "is looking at you through walls"
														or "is looking at you",
													Percentage,
													math.floor(Distance)
												)
										end
									end
								end

								task.spawn(function() --// Adornments
									if
										tick() - Data.AdornmentTick > Framework.Flags.RefreshRate.Value
										and table.find({ "Boss", "AI", "Player" }, ClassType)
									then
										for _, Value in next, Data.Character:GetChildren() do
											ApplyVisuals(Data, Value)

											if
												Framework.ArmorCache[Value.Name]
												or (ClassType == "AI" or ClassType == "Boss" or ClassType == "Animal")
											then
												for _, Part in Value:GetChildren() do
													ApplyVisuals(Data, Part)
												end
											end

											if Item == Value then
												for _, Part in Value:GetChildren() do
													ApplyVisuals(Data, Part)
												end
											end

											do --// Adornments
												if
													Value:IsA("BasePart")
													and not Data.Adornments[Value]
													and not IgnoreNames[Value.Name]
												then
													local AdornmentsTable = {}

													for Vis = 1, 2 do
														local Adornment

														if Value.Name == "Head" then
															Adornment = Instance.new("CylinderHandleAdornment")
															Adornment.Height = Vis == 1 and 0.87 or 1.02
															Adornment.Radius = Vis == 1 and 0.5 or 0.65
															Adornment.CFrame =
																CFrame.new(Vector3.new(), Vector3.new(0, 1, 0))
														else
															Adornment = Instance.new("BoxHandleAdornment")
															local SizeOffset = Vis == 1 and -0.05 or 0.05
															Adornment.Size = Value.Size
																+ Vector3.new(SizeOffset, SizeOffset, SizeOffset)
														end

														Adornment.Name = Vis == 1 and "Invisible" or "Visible"
														Adornment.ZIndex = Vis == 1 and 2 or 1
														Adornment.AlwaysOnTop = Vis == 1
														Adornment.Adornee = Value
														Adornment.Parent = Value

														AdornmentsTable[Vis] = Adornment
													end

													Data.Adornments[Value] = AdornmentsTable
												end

												local Adornments = Data.Adornments[Value]
												if Adornments then
													-- Occluded (index 1)
													local OccludedFlag = Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "OccludedColor"]
													Adornments[1].Visible =
														Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "Adornments"].Value
													Adornments[1].Color3 = OccludedFlag.Value
													Adornments[1].Transparency = OccludedFlag.Alpha

													-- Visible (index 2)
													local VisibleFlag =
														Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "ChamsVisibleColor"]
													Adornments[2].Visible =
														Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "Adornments"].Value
													Adornments[2].ZIndex = Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "GlowChams"].Value
															and 9e9
														or 1
													Adornments[2].AlwaysOnTop =
														Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "GlowChams"].Value
													Adornments[2].Color3 = VisibleFlag.Value
													Adornments[2].Transparency = VisibleFlag.Alpha
												end
											end
										end

										Data.AdornmentTick = tick()
									end
								end)
								--
								do --// Rendering
									BoxOutline.Position = UDim2.new(0, Position.X, 0, Position.Y)
									BoxOutline.Size = UDim2.new(0, Size.X, 0, Size.Y)
									BoxOutline.Visible = Framework.CanRender
											and (OnScreen and Framework.Flags["ESP" .. ClassType].Value)
										or false
									OffscreenArrow.Visible = (
										Framework.CanRender
										and Framework.Flags.OffscreenIndicators.Value
										and Framework.Flags["Offscreen" .. ClassType]
										and BoxData.Root
										and (not OnScreen and Framework.Flags["Offscreen" .. ClassType].Value)
									) or false
									--
									if OffscreenArrow.Visible then
										if tick() - Data.LastUpdate > 0.013 then
											Data.LastUpdate = tick()
											local RootPosition = BoxData.Root.CFrame.p

											local ScreenPos, _ =
												Workspace.CurrentCamera:WorldToScreenPoint(RootPosition)

											local Center = Workspace.CurrentCamera.ViewportSize / 2
											local Direction = (Vector2.new(ScreenPos.X, ScreenPos.Y) - Center).Unit
											local ClampedPosition = Center + Direction * OffscreenRadius

											local HalfWidth = ArrowWidth * 0.5
											local HalfHeight = ArrowHeight * 0.5

											OffscreenArrow.Size = UDim2.new(0, ArrowWidth, 0, ArrowHeight)
											OffscreenArrow.Position = UDim2.new(
												0,
												ClampedPosition.X - HalfWidth,
												0,
												ClampedPosition.Y - HalfHeight
											)
											OffscreenArrow.Rotation = math.deg(math.atan2(Direction.Y, Direction.X))
												+ 90
											OffscreenArrow.ImageColor3 = ArrowColor
											OffscreenArrow.ImageTransparency = ArrowImageTransparency
											--print(OffscreenArrow.Visible)
										end
									end
									--
									if BoxOutline.Visible then
										do --// Box
											BoxOutlineStroke.Enabled = Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "Boxes"].Value
											BoxInnerStroke.Enabled = Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "Boxes"].Value

											BoxGlow.Visible = BoxInnerStroke.Enabled
												and Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "GlowingBoxes"].Value

											BoxInnerStroke.Color = Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "BoxColor"].Value
											BoxGlow.ImageColor3 = Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "BoxGlowColor"].Value
											BoxGlow.ImageTransparency =
												Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "BoxGlowColor"].Alpha
											do --// Box Glow Sizing
												if Size.X > 43 then
													BoxGlow.Size = UDim2.new(1, 47, 1, 47)
												else
													BoxGlow.Size = UDim2.new(1, 40, 1, 40)
													if Size.X <= 8 then
														BoxGlow.Size = UDim2.new(1, 15, 1, 15)
													elseif Size.X <= 11 then
														BoxGlow.Size = UDim2.new(1, 20, 1, 20)
													elseif Size.X <= 17 then
														BoxGlow.Size = UDim2.new(1, 25, 1, 25)
													elseif Size.X <= 27 then
														BoxGlow.Size = UDim2.new(1, 30, 1, 30)
													end
												end
											end
										end
										--
										do --// Name Label
											NameLabel.Visible = Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "Name"].Value
											if NameLabel.Visible then
												local NameColor = Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "NameColor"].Value

												local NameR, NameG, NameB =
													NameColor.R * 255, NameColor.G * 255, NameColor.B * 255

												local Name = Entity.Name

												if Framework.Flags.UseDisplayNames.Value and ClassType == "Player" then
													Name = Entity.DisplayName
												end

												if AnimalNames[Name] then
													Name = AnimalNames[Name]
												end
												NameLabel.Text = ("<font color='rgb(%d,%d,%d)'>%s</font>"):format(
													NameR,
													NameG,
													NameB,
													Name
												)

												if
													Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "Clan"]
													and Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "Clan"].Value
												then
													local ClanColor = Entity:GetAttribute("ClanColor")
														or Color3.fromRGB(255, 87, 51)
													local ClanR, ClanG, ClanB =
														ClanColor.R * 255, ClanColor.G * 255, ClanColor.B * 255
													local ClanTag = Entity:GetAttribute("ClanTag")
															and ("%s "):format(Entity:GetAttribute("ClanTag"))
														or ""
													NameLabel.Text = ("<font color ='rgb(%d, %d, %d)'>%s</font><font color='rgb(%d,%d,%d)'>%s</font>"):format(
														ClanR,
														ClanG,
														ClanB,
														ClanTag,
														NameR,
														NameG,
														NameB,
														Name
													)
												end

												NameLabel.FontFace = Framework.ESPFont
												NameLabel.TextSize = Framework.ESPTextSize
											end
										end
										--
										do --// Distance Label
											DistanceLabel.Visible = Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "Distance"].Value
											if DistanceLabel.Visible then
												if WeaponLabel.Visible then
													DistanceLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 22)
												else
													DistanceLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 10)
												end
												--
												DistanceLabel.TextColor3 =
													Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "DistanceColor"].Value
												DistanceLabel.Text = tostring(Distance) .. Suffix
												DistanceLabel.FontFace = Framework.ESPFont
												DistanceLabel.TextSize = Framework.ESPTextSize
											end
										end
										--
										do --// Weapon Label
											if game.PlaceId == 4483381587 then
												if not Data.TimeElapsed then
													Data.TimeElapsed = tick()
												end
												--
												if tick() - Data.TimeElapsed > 3 then
													Data.TimeElapsed = tick()
													for _, V in next, Data.Character:GetChildren() do
														if V:GetAttribute("Weapon") then
															V:Destroy()
														end
													end
													local Model = Instance.new("Model")
													Model:SetAttribute("Weapon", true)
													Model.Name = Framework.ItemList[math.random(1, #Framework.ItemList)]
													task.wait()
													Model.Parent = Data.Character
												end
											end
											--

											if Item then
												WeaponLabel.FontFace = Framework.ESPFont
												WeaponLabel.TextSize = Framework.ESPTextSize
												WeaponLabel.Visible = Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "Item"].Value
												WeaponLabel.Text = Item.Name
												WeaponLabel.TextColor3 = Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "ItemColor"].Value
											else
												WeaponLabel.Visible = false
												WeaponLabel.Text = "None"
											end
										end
										--
										do --/ Armor List
											ClothesList.Visible = ClassType == "Player"
												and Framework.Flags["PlayerArmorList"].Value

											if
												Framework.Flags.OnlyShowTargetArmor.Value
												and Data ~= Framework.Targetting.TargetData
											then
												ClothesList.Visible = false
											end

											if ClothesList.Visible then
												for Index = 1, 8 do
													ClothesList:FindFirstChild(tostring(Index)).Image = ""
													ClothesList:FindFirstChild(tostring(Index)).Visible = false
												end
												--
												local Iteration = 0
												for InstanceName, ArmorData in Armor do
													Iteration = Iteration + 1
													local ImageLabel = ClothesList:FindFirstChild(tostring(Iteration))
													--
													if ImageLabel and ArmorData then
														ImageLabel.Image = ArmorData.Image
														ImageLabel.Visible = true
													end
												end
											end
										end
										--
										do --// Flags
											FlagsLabel.Visible = Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "Flags"].Value
											if FlagsLabel.Visible then
												FlagsLabel.Text = ""
												FlagsLabel.FontFace = Framework.FlagsFont
												FlagsLabel.TextSize = Framework.FlagsTextSize
												for _, FlagData in Framework.Entities.Flags do
													if
														Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "Flag" .. FlagData.Flag]
														and Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "Flag" .. FlagData.Flag].Value
														and FlagData.Allow(Data)
													then
														Data.Object = Entity
														local Text = FlagData.Text(Data)
														local Color = Framework.Flags[FlagData.Flag .. "Color"]
																and Framework.Flags[FlagData.Flag .. "Color"].Value
															or Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
														Color = string.format(
															"#%02X%02X%02X",
															Color.R * 255,
															Color.G * 255,
															Color.B * 255
														)
														if Text then
															FlagsLabel.Text = FlagsLabel.Text
																.. string.format(
																	'<font color="%s">%s</font>\n',
																	Color,
																	Text
																)
														end
													end
												end
											end
										end
										--
										do --// Health
											Healthbar.Visible = Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "Healthbars"].Value
											if Healthbar.Visible then
												Healthbar.BackgroundColor3 =
													Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "LowerHealthColor"].Value:lerp(
														Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "HigherHealthColor"].Value,
														Health / MaxHealth
													)
												HealthbarBlackout.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(1, 0)
												HealthbarBlackout.Size = UDim2.new(1 - (Health / MaxHealth), 0, 1, 0)

												HealthbarGlow.Visible =
													Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "GlowingHealth"].Value
												HealthbarGlow.ImageColor3 =
													Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "HealthGlowColor"].Value
												HealthbarGlow.ImageTransparency =
													Framework.Flags[ClassType .. "HealthGlowColor"].Alpha
											else
												HealthbarGlow.Visible = false
											end
											--[[Components.HealthbarInvert.Size = UDim2.new(0, (Components.Healthbar.AbsoluteSize.X * (1 - self.Info.ActualHealth / MaxHealth)), 0, 1);
                                        Components.HealthbarInvert.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(1, 0);]]
										end
									end
								end
								--
								do --// Targetting
									if
										Entity ~= Client
										and OnScreen
										and not Data.Friendly
										and Framework.Flags["Aimbot"].Value
										and Framework.Flags["Target" .. Data.ClassType]
										and Framework.Flags["Target" .. Data.ClassType].Value
									then
										task.spawn(function()
											local Distance =
												GetDistanceFromCenter(Data.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart"))
											if Distance <= (Framework.Targetting.FOVCircle.AbsoluteSize.X / 2) then
												if not ClosestTarget or Distance < LastDistance then
													--
													ClosestTarget =
														Data.Character:FindFirstChild(Framework.Flags.TargetPart.Value)
													--
													if Framework.Flags.RandomHitPart.Value then
														local Parts = {}
														--
														for Index, Value in Data.Character:GetChildren() do
															if
																Value:IsA("BasePart")
																and table.find(
																	{ "Head", "UpperTorso", "LowerTorso" },
																	Value.Name
																)
															then
																table.insert(Parts, Value)
															end
														end
														--
														if #Parts ~= 0 then
															local Part = Parts[math.random(1, #Parts)]
															ClosestTarget = Part
														end
													end
													--
													if Data.Character.Name == "BTR" then
														ClosestTarget =
															Data.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
													end
													--
													ActualTarget = Data
													ActualTargetName = Entity.Name
													LastDistance = Distance
												end
											end
										end)
									end

									if
										Data.Character:FindFirstChild("Head")
										and Framework.Flags.KillAura
										and Framework.Flags.KillAura.Value
										and Client.Character
										and Client.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
										and Client.Character.Humanoid.RootPart
										and Entity ~= Client
										and not Data.Friendly
									then
										local Distance = (
											Client.Character.Humanoid.RootPart.CFrame.p
											- Data.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame.p
										).Magnitude
										if Distance <= Framework.Flags.KillAuraRadius.Value then
											table.insert(
												KATargets,
												{ Data.Character:FindFirstChild("Head"), Distance, Entity }
											)
										end
									end

									local Hair = Data.Character:FindFirstChild("Hair")
									local HeadPart = Data.Character:FindFirstChild("HeadPart")
										or (Hair and Hair:FindFirstChild("Head"))

									if not HeadPart then
										for _, Child in ipairs(Data.Character:GetChildren()) do
											if Child:IsA("Part") and Child.Name == "Head" then
												HeadPart = Child
												break
											end
										end
									end

									if HeadPart and not Data.Friendly then
										local Highlight = Data.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Highlight")
										local WallbangEnabled = Data.Character:GetAttribute("UndergroundLoser")

										if Highlight and WallbangEnabled then
											Highlight.Enabled = false
											Highlight:Destroy()
										end

										HeadPart.Parent = WallbangEnabled and Data.Character or Hair
										HeadPart.CanQuery = WallbangEnabled
										HeadPart.Transparency = WallbangEnabled and 0.99 or 1

										if WallbangEnabled and HeadPart.Size ~= Vector3.new(6, 6, 6) then
											HeadPart.Size = Vector3.new(6, 6, 6)
											HeadPart.CollisionGroup = "PlayersTop"
										end
									end
								end
							else
								OffscreenArrow.Visible = false
								BoxOutline.Visible = false
							end
						else
							OffscreenArrow.Visible = false
							BoxOutline.Visible = false
						end
					end

					Framework.Targetting.TargetData = ActualTarget
					Framework.Targetting.TargetName = ActualTargetName

					if ClosestTarget then
						if Framework.Flags.Multipointing.Value and not Framework.Flags.Manipulation.Value then
							local FoundVisible = false
							local Parent = ClosestTarget.Parent
							if AutoPart then
								Framework.Targetting.TargetPart = AutoPart
							else
								for Index, Value in
									{
										"Head",
										"UpperTorso",
										"LowerTorso",
										"RightUpperArm",
										"RightHand",
										"LeftUpperArm",
										"LeftHand",
										"LeftLowerLeg",
										"RightLowerLeg",
									}
								do
									if Parent:FindFirstChild(Value) then
										local IsVisible = Framework.Targetting.Functions.IsPartVisible(
											Parent:FindFirstChild(Value),
											Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p
										)
										if IsVisible then
											FoundVisible = true
											Framework.Targetting.TargetPart = Parent:FindFirstChild(Value)
											break
										end
									end
								end
							end
							if not FoundVisible then
								Framework.Targetting.TargetPart = nil
							end
						else
							Framework.Targetting.TargetPart = ClosestTarget
						end

						local Camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera
						local ViewportSize = Camera.ViewportSize
						local TargetPosition = ClosestTarget.Position
						local Position, OnScreen = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(TargetPosition)

						local ShowTarget = Framework.Flags.ShowTarget.Value
						local ThirdPerson = Framework.Flags.ThirdPerson.Value
						Framework.Targetting.PredictionIndicator.Visible = ShowTarget
						Framework.Targetting.PredictionIndicator.Position = UDim2.new(0, Position.X, 0, Position.Y)

						Framework.Targetting.TargetLine.Visible = ShowTarget

						if Framework.FlashPart and ShowTarget and not ThirdPerson then
							local FlashPos, FlashOnScreen = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(Framework.FlashPart.Position)
							Framework.Targetting.TargetLine.Visible = FlashOnScreen
							RotateLine(
								Framework.Targetting.TargetLine,
								0,
								Vector2.new(FlashPos.X, FlashPos.Y),
								Vector2.new(Position.X, Position.Y)
							)
						else
							RotateLine(
								Framework.Targetting.TargetLine,
								0,
								Vector2.new(ViewportSize.X / 2, ViewportSize.Y / 2),
								Vector2.new(Position.X, Position.Y)
							)
						end

						local ClientCharacter = Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter
						local CanManipulate = Framework.Flags.Manipulation.Value
							and ClientCharacter
							and ClientCharacter:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")

						local TargetData = Framework.Targetting.TargetData
						local ManipulatedPart, ManipulatedPosition = nil, nil
						local ShouldWallbang = false

						local IsVisible = Framework.Targetting.Functions.IsPartVisible(
							Framework.Targetting.TargetPart,
							ClientCharacter.HumanoidRootPart.Position
						)

						if not IsVisible then
							local Penetration = Framework.Flags.WallbangPenCheck.Value
							local CanWallbang, WallbangHit = Framework.Targetting.Functions.CanWallbangTo(
								ClosestTarget,
								ClientCharacter.HumanoidRootPart.Position,
								Penetration
							)

							if CanWallbang then
								ShouldWallbang = true
							end

							if CanManipulate and not ShouldWallbang then
								local StartPos = ClientCharacter.HumanoidRootPart.Position
								local VisiblePos, IsWallbang =
									Framework.Targetting.Functions.FindVisiblePosition(StartPos, ClosestTarget)

								if VisiblePos then
									ManipulatedPart, ManipulatedPosition = ClosestTarget, VisiblePos
									if IsWallbang then
										ShouldWallbang = true
									end

									--[[elseif not VisiblePos and Framework.Flags.Wallbang.Value then
                                local CanWallbang, WallbangHit = Framework.Targetting.Functions.CanWallbangTo(ClosestTarget, VisiblePos, Penetration)
                                if CanWallbang then
                                    ShouldWallbang = true;
                                    ManipulatedPart, ManipulatedPosition = ClosestTarget, ManipulatedPosition
                                end]]
								end
							end
						end

						Framework.Targetting.ManipulatedPart = ManipulatedPart
						Framework.Targetting.ManipulatedPosition = ManipulatedPosition
						TargetData.ManipulatedPart = ManipulatedPart or nil

						if Framework.Flags.ResolveUndergroundAA.Value then
							local TargetChar = TargetData.Character
							if
								TargetChar
								and TargetChar:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
								and TargetChar.Humanoid.Health > 0.2
							then
								local Hum = TargetChar.Humanoid
								for _, anim in ipairs(Hum:GetPlayingAnimationTracks()) do
									if anim.Animation.AnimationId == "rbxassetid://13435049596" then
										hasFoundAA = true
										TargetChar:SetAttribute("UndergroundLoser", true)
									end
								end
							end
						end

						local VisibleColor = "#67FF38"
						local ManipulatedColor = "#FF6D38"
						local NameColor = "#FFFFFF"

						Framework.Targetting.TargetInfo.Text = ""
						local AutoPart, CanShoot = nil, false
						if Framework.Flags.DisplayInfo.Value then
							TargetData.VisiblePart = nil
							local Part = Framework.Targetting.TargetPart
							if Part and not ManipulatedPart then
								local Status = "Visible"
								local Color = VisibleColor
								local CanContinue = false
								if ShouldWallbang then
									Status = "Wallbang"
									Color = "#eb347d"
									CanContinue = true
								else
									CanContinue = IsVisible
								end

								if CanContinue then
									AutoPart = Part
									if Status == "Visible" then
										TargetData.VisiblePart = Part
									end

									CanShoot = true
									Framework.Targetting.ManipulatedPart = nil
									Framework.Targetting.ManipulatedPosition = nil

									ManipulatedPosition = nil
									ManipulatedPart = nil
									Framework.Targetting.TargetInfo.Text = string.format(
										'<font color="%s">%s</font>\n<font color="%s">%s</font>',
										Color,
										Status .. " - " .. Part.Name,
										NameColor,
										ActualTargetName
									)
								end
							elseif ManipulatedPart and ManipulatedPosition and not IsVisible and not CanShoot then
								AutoPart = ManipulatedPart
								CanShoot = true
								local Color = ManipulatedColor
								local Status = "Manipulated"
								if ShouldWallbang then
									Status = "Wallbang Manipulated"
									Color = "#ebeb34"
								end

								local Distance = math.floor((Camera.CFrame.Position - ManipulatedPosition).Magnitude)
								Framework.Targetting.TargetInfo.Text = string.format(
									'<font color="%s">%s</font>\n<font color="%s">%s</font>',
									Color,
									Status .. " - " .. AutoPart.Name,
									NameColor,
									ActualTargetName .. "\n" .. tostring(Distance) .. " studs"
								)
							end
						end
					else
						Framework.Targetting.TargetPart = nil
						Framework.Targetting.TargetInfo.Text = ""
						Framework.Targetting.TargetLine.Visible = false
						Framework.Targetting.PredictionIndicator.Visible = false
					end

					--[[if Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter and Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter:FindFirstChild("ViewmodelController") then 
                    local VMController = Framework.Client.CurrentCharacter:FindFirstChild("ViewmodelController")
                    local LocalAmmo = VMController:GetAttribute("LocalAmmo")
                    local CurrentRPM = 0.08;
                    if Framework.CurrentStats then 
                        CurrentRPM = Framework.CurrentStats.RPM ~= nil and (60 / Framework.CurrentStats.RPM) or 0.08;
                    end;
                    
                    if Framework.CurrentViewmodel and Framework.Targetting.AutoshootPart and Framework.Flags.AutoShoot.Value and tick() - LastShootAttempt >= (CurrentRPM / 2.5) and LocalAmmo > 0 and Framework.CurrentViewmodel.Name ~= "Salvaged RPG" then 
                        local MaxRange = Framework.CurrentStats.MaxRange

                        if (Framework.Targetting.AutoshootPart.CFrame.p - Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p).Magnitude < MaxRange then 
                            task.spawn(function()
                                if Framework.CurrentViewmodel.Name ~= "Wooden Bow" then 
                                    mouse1click();
                                    LastShootAttempt = tick();
                                else 
                                    mouse2press();
                                    task.wait(0.88);
                                    mouse1click();
                                    LastShootAttempt = tick();
                                    mouse2release();
                                end;
                            end);
                        end;
                    end;
                end;]]

					local KATarget = nil
					if #KATargets ~= 0 and Client.Character then
						for Index, Data in KATargets do
							local Distance = Data[2]
							local HitPart = Data[1]
							--
							if not KATarget or Distance < KADistance then
								KATarget = HitPart
								KADistance = Distance
								ActualKATarget = Data[3]
							end
						end
					end

					Framework.KATarget = ActualKATarget
				end),
				"Entities"
			)
			--
			Framework:NewThread(
				"Misc entity loop",
				LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
					for Index, Data in Framework.DamageESP do
						local Started = Data.Started
						local Time = (tick() - Started)
						local Label = Data.Label
						local Position = Data.Position
						local Damage = Data.Damage

						if Time > 0.25 then
							Position = Position + Vector3.new(0, 0.05, 0)
							Data.Position = Position
						end

						local ScreenPos, OnScreen = Workspace.CurrentCamera:WorldToViewportPoint(Position)
						Label.Visible = OnScreen

						if Label.Visible then
							Label.Position = UDim2.new(0, ScreenPos.X, 0, ScreenPos.Y)
							Label.Text = tostring(Damage)
						end
					end

					for Entity, Data in Framework.MiscEntities.Cache do
						Data.Object = Entity
						if not Data.Object and Components.NameLabel then
							Components.NameLabel:Destroy()
							continue
						end

						local Components = Data.Components
						local Position = Data.Listener.GetPosition(Data)
						local Distance = Data.Listener.GetDistance(Data)
						--
						local CanShow = false
						CanShow = Framework.CanRender
							and Framework.Flags["ESP" .. Data.Listener.Flag]
							and Framework.Flags["ESP" .. Data.Listener.Flag].Value
							and Data.Listener.Validate(Data)

						if
							not Framework.Flags.CombatHide.Value
							and CanShow
							and Distance
							and Distance <= Framework.Flags[Data.Listener.Flag .. "Distance"].Value
						then
							local Measurement = Framework.DistanceMeasurement
							local Suffix = Framework.Conversions.Distance[Measurement][2]
							local DivideBy = Framework.Conversions.Distance[Measurement][1]
							Distance = Distance / DivideBy
							local ScreenPosition, OnScreen = Workspace.CurrentCamera:WorldToViewportPoint(Position)
							if OnScreen then
								Components.NameLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, ScreenPosition.X, 0, ScreenPosition.Y)
								Components.NameLabel.Name = Data.Listener.GetName(Data)
								Components.NameLabel.Text = Data.Listener.GetName(Data)
									.. "\n"
									.. tostring(math.floor(Distance))
									.. Suffix
								Components.NameLabel.TextColor3 = Data.Listener.GetColor(Data)
								Components.NameLabel.TextTransparency = Data.Listener.GetAlpha(Data)
								Components.NameLabel.UIStroke.Transparency = Data.Listener.GetAlpha(Data)
								Components.NameLabel.FontFace = Framework.ESPFont
								Components.NameLabel.TextSize = Framework.ESPTextSize
								Components.NameLabel.Visible = true

								if Framework.Flags.SmartESP.Value then
									local FadeDistance = Framework.Flags.FadeRadius.Value
									local DistanceFromCenter = Framework.GetDistanceFromCenter(Position)

									local FadeTransparency = math.clamp(DistanceFromCenter / FadeDistance, 0, 1)
									Components.NameLabel.TextTransparency = FadeTransparency

									Components.NameLabel.UIStroke.Transparency = FadeTransparency
								else
									Components.NameLabel.TextTransparency = 0

									Components.NameLabel.UIStroke.Transparency = 0
								end
							else
								Components.NameLabel.Visible = false
							end
						else
							Components.NameLabel.Visible = false
						end
					end
				end),
				"Render"
			)
		end
		--
		do --// Base modifications
			local DamageParts = {}
			local XRayParts = {}
			local TouchCollisions = {}
			local BGrade = {
				["Wood"] = 1,
				["Stone"] = 2,
				["Metal"] = 3,
				["Steel"] = 4,
			}

			if Workspace:FindFirstChild("VFX") then
				local VectorUtil = require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.VectorUtil)

				local AllowedBuildings = {
					"Wall",
					"Half Wall",
					"Low Wall",
					"Doorway",
					"Window",
					"Foundation",
					"Floor",
					"Triangle Floor",
					"Wall Frame",
					"Floor Frame",
					"Triangle Floor Frame",
					"L-Shaped Stairs",
					"U-Shaped Stairs",
					"Foundation Steps",
					"Foundation",
					"Triangle Foundation",
				}
				--
				LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
					for Index, Value in next, Workspace.Bases:GetDescendants() do
						if Value:IsA("MeshPart") and Value.Name == "Detail" then
							if Value.Parent and table.find(AllowedBuildings, Value.Parent.Name) then
								XRayParts[#XRayParts + 1] = Value
							end
						end

						if
							Value.Name == "TouchCollision"
							and Value.Parent
							and Value.Parent.Name == "Shotgun Turret"
						then
							TouchCollisions[#TouchCollisions + 1] = Value
						end

						if Value.Name == "DamagePart" then
							DamageParts[#DamageParts + 1] = Value
						end
					end
					--
				end)()
				--
				--[[Workspace.VFX.Fire.DescendantAdded:Connect(LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Value)
                    task.wait(0.345);
                    if Value.Parent and Value.Name == "Collision" and Value.Parent.Name == "FirePart" then 
                        FireCollisions[#FireCollisions+1] = Value.Parent;
                        if Framework.Flags.RemoveFire.Value then 
                            Value.CanCollide = false;
                            Value.CanTouch = false;
                            Value.CanQuery = false;

                            Value.Parent.Main.CanCollide = false;
                            Value.Parent.Main.CanTouch = false;
                            Value.Parent.Main.CanQuery = false;
                        end;
                    end;
                end));]]
				--

				local Upgrade = LPH_JIT_MAX(function(BuildingGrade, Part)
					VectorUtil:FireRemote(
						ReplicatedStorage.Remotes:FindFirstChild(
							string.char(
								75,
								121,
								79,
								188,
								126,
								63,
								141,
								137,
								5,
								132,
								117,
								32,
								190,
								12,
								68,
								117,
								78,
								118,
								140,
								65,
								50,
								109,
								56,
								50,
								110,
								58,
								36,
								182,
								159,
								121
							)
						),
						string.char(
							172,
							58,
							85,
							34,
							15,
							1,
							172,
							16,
							57,
							91,
							101,
							87,
							7,
							2,
							26,
							53,
							18,
							135,
							188,
							124,
							173,
							148,
							27,
							119,
							24,
							7,
							38,
							70,
							179,
							13
						),
						{
							[1] = BuildingGrade,
							[2] = Part,
						}
					)
				end)

				Workspace.Bases.DescendantAdded:Connect(LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Value)
					task.wait(0.5)
					if Value:IsA("MeshPart") and Value.Name == "Detail" then
						if Value.Parent and table.find(AllowedBuildings, Value.Parent.Name) then
							XRayParts[#XRayParts + 1] = Value
						end
					end

					if
						Client.Character
						and Client.Character:FindFirstChild("Blueprint")
						and Framework.Flags.AutoUpgrade.Value
						and Value:IsA("Model")
						and table.find(AllowedBuildings, Value.Name)
					then
						if not Value.PrimaryPart then
							repeat
								task.wait()
							until Value.PrimaryPart
						end
						local Main = Value.PrimaryPart
						if (Main.CFrame.p - Workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame.p).Magnitude < 20 then
							local BuildingGrade = BGrade[Framework.Flags.UpgradeMaterial.Value]

							Upgrade(BuildingGrade, Value)
						end
					end

					if Value.Name == "TouchCollision" and Value.Parent and Value.Parent.Name == "Shotgun Turret" then
						TouchCollisions[#TouchCollisions + 1] = Value
						Value.CanQuery = not Framework.Flags.DisableShotguns.Value
						Value.CanTouch = not Framework.Flags.DisableShotguns.Value
					end

					if Value.Name == "DamagePart" then
						DamageParts[#DamageParts + 1] = Value
						Value.CanQuery = not Framework.Flags.DisableDamageParts.Value
						Value.CanTouch = not Framework.Flags.DisableDamageParts.Value
					end
				end))
			end
			Framework.DamageParts = DamageParts
			Framework.TouchCollisions = TouchCollisions
			Framework.XRayParts = XRayParts
			Framework.AllowedBuildings = AllowedBuildings
		end
		--
		do --// VFX
			local VFX = Workspace:FindFirstChild("VFX")
			local ReplicatedStorage = Framework.GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
			local Modules = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Modules")
			local ToolInfo = Modules and Modules:FindFirstChild("ToolInfo") and require(Modules.ToolInfo)
			if VFX then
				VFX.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(Value)
					if Value:IsA("Trail") and Framework.Flags.CustomBulletTrails.Value then
						Value.Color = ColorSequence.new({
							ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.00, Framework.Flags.BulletColor.Value),
							ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1.00, Framework.Flags.BulletColor.Value),
						})
						Value.Brightness += Framework.Flags.TrailBrightness.Value
						Value.Lifetime += Framework.Flags.TrailLifetime.Value
					end
				end)

				local VMs = VFX:FindFirstChild("VMs")
				VMs.ChildAdded:Connect(LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(Viewmodel)
					if Viewmodel:IsA("Model") then
						local Arms = Viewmodel:WaitForChild("Arms")
						local Weapon = Viewmodel:WaitForChild("Weapon")
						local Highlight = Viewmodel:WaitForChild("Highlight", 1)

						Framework.CurrentViewmodel = Viewmodel
						if ToolInfo[Viewmodel.Name] and rawget(ToolInfo[Viewmodel.Name], "Weapon") then
							if
								rawget(ToolInfo[Viewmodel.Name], "Bullet")
								and rawget(ToolInfo[Viewmodel.Name].Bullet, "MaxRange")
							then
								Framework.CurrentStats = {
									RPM = ToolInfo[Viewmodel.Name].Weapon.RPM,
									MaxRange = ToolInfo[Viewmodel.Name].Bullet.MaxRange,
								}
							elseif
								rawget(ToolInfo[Viewmodel.Name], "Melee")
								and rawget(ToolInfo[Viewmodel.Name].Melee, "MaxRange")
							then
								Framework.CurrentStats = {
									RPM = ToolInfo[Viewmodel.Name].Weapon.RPM,
									MaxRange = ToolInfo[Viewmodel.Name].Melee.MaxRange,
								}
							end
						end

						if Arms and Weapon then
							if Framework.Flags.ViewmodelSandbox.Value then
								if Highlight then
									Highlight.FillColor = Framework.Flags.VMFillColor.Value
									Highlight.FillTransparency = Framework.Flags.VMFillColor.Alpha

									Highlight.OutlineColor = Framework.Flags.VMOutlineColor.Value
									Highlight.OutlineTransparency = Framework.Flags.VMOutlineColor.Alpha
								end

								for Index, Part in next, Arms:GetDescendants() do
									if Part:IsA("MeshPart") then
										if
											(Part.Name == "Sleeve" or Part.Name == "Armor")
											and Framework.Flags.ShirtChams
											and Framework.Flags.ShirtChams.Value
										then
											Part.Material = Framework.Flags.ShirtMaterial.Value
											Part.Color = Framework.Flags.ShirtColor.Value
											Part.Transparency = Framework.Flags.ShirtColor.Alpha
										end

										if
											(Part.Name == "Sleeve" or Part.Name == "Armor")
											and Framework.Flags.RemoveClothing
											and Framework.Flags.RemoveClothing.Value
										then
											Part.Transparency = 1
										end

										if
											(Part.Name == "Glove" or Part.Name == "Wrap")
											and Framework.Flags.GloveChams
											and Framework.Flags.GloveChams.Value
										then
											Part.Material = Framework.Flags.GloveMaterial.Value
											Part.Color = Framework.Flags.GloveColor.Value
											Part.Transparency = Framework.Flags.GloveColor.Alpha
										end

										if
											(Part.Name == "RightArm" or Part.Name == "LeftArm")
											and Framework.Flags.ArmChams
											and Framework.Flags.ArmChams.Value
										then
											Part.Material = Framework.Flags.ArmMaterial.Value
											Part.Color = Framework.Flags.ArmColor.Value
											Part.Transparency = Framework.Flags.ArmColor.Alpha
										end

										if
											Part.Material == Enum.Material.SmoothPlastic
											or Part.Material == Enum.Material.Glass
											or Part.Material == Enum.Material.Neon
										then
											Part.TextureID = ""
										end

										if Part.Material == Enum.Material.ForceField then
											Part.TextureID = "rbxassetid://5843010904"
										end
									end
								end

								if Framework.Flags.ItemChams.Value then
									for Index, Part in next, Weapon:GetDescendants() do
										if Part and Part:IsA("MeshPart") then
											if Weapon:FindFirstChild("Attachments") then
												if Part:IsDescendantOf(Weapon:FindFirstChild("Attachments")) then
													if not Framework.Flags.IgnoreAttachments.Value then
														Part.Material = Framework.Flags.VMItemMaterial.Value
														Part.Color = Framework.Flags.VMItemColor.Value
														Part.Transparency = Framework.Flags.VMItemColor.Alpha
													end
												else
													Part.Material = Framework.Flags.VMItemMaterial.Value
													Part.Color = Framework.Flags.VMItemColor.Value
													Part.Transparency = Framework.Flags.VMItemColor.Alpha
												end
											else
												Part.Material = Framework.Flags.VMItemMaterial.Value
												Part.Color = Framework.Flags.VMItemColor.Value
												Part.Transparency = Framework.Flags.VMItemColor.Alpha
											end

											if
												Part.Material == Enum.Material.SmoothPlastic
												or Part.Material == Enum.Material.Glass
												or Part.Material == Enum.Material.Neon
											then
												Part.TextureID = ""
											end

											if Part.Material == Enum.Material.ForceField then
												Part.TextureID = "rbxassetid://5843010904"
											end
										end
									end
								end
							end

							--// third person prioritizes after this
							if Framework.Flags.ThirdPerson and Framework.Flags.ThirdPerson.Value then
								for Index, Part in Viewmodel:GetDescendants() do
									if Part:IsA("MeshPart") or Part:IsA("Part") then
										if Part.Transparency ~= 1 then
											Part:SetAttribute("OriginalTransparency", Part.Transparency)
										end
										Part.Transparency = 1
									end
								end
							end
						end
					end
				end))

				VMs.ChildRemoved:Connect(function(Viewmodel)
					Framework.CurrentViewmodel = nil
				end)
			end
		end
	end
	--
	Framework.HasConfigured = true
end
--
Framework.OnClientCharacterAdded()
